title: Backyard Design & Permit Research VA for Luxury Hillside Home Project – Claremont, CA
description:
We are looking for a highly capable, detail-obsessed Virtual Assistant to help lead the design coordination, research, and planning process for a luxury backyard project at our home in Claremont, California.



This is not a basic Pinterest or Canva role.



We want someone who can take a high-end inspiration concept and turn it into a serious, organized, buildable project package that helps us move toward real-world execution with the correct local professionals.



The backyard we want is inspired by elevated luxury hillside designs with features such as:

 • resort-style pool and spa

 • multi-level hardscape / terraced layout

 • integrated stairs and retaining features

 • fire feature

 • premium lighting

 • outdoor lounge / entertaining areas

 • strong visual symmetry

 • clean, modern, upscale finish selections

 • hillside-aware planning and drainage-conscious design



The property is on a sloped lot in Claremont, CA, so the design must be grounded in real feasibility, not just aesthetics.



Your Role



You will act as a design coordinator + research lead + project management VA.



You will help us:

 1. translate our inspiration into a realistic design direction

 2. research local permitting, zoning, pool, retaining wall, grading, drainage, and hillside constraints

 3. organize all findings into a clear decision-making package

 4. source and coordinate the right professionals needed for permit-ready plans

 5. help us avoid wasting time on concepts that are not actually buildable



Core Responsibilities

 • Review our inspiration images/videos and extract the key design language

 • Create a polished concept brief for the backyard vision

 • Develop 2–3 layout concepts based on the lot conditions and slope challenges

 • Research City of Claremont requirements related to:

 • pool/spa permits

 • retaining walls

 • grading

 • slope setbacks

 • fencing / pool barriers

 • drainage considerations

 • landscape documentation requirements

 • Call or
 local city departments, contractors, designers, engineers, and expeditors when needed

 • Build a list of required professionals for execution, such as:

 • pool designer / pool contractor

 • landscape architect or landscape designer

 • structural engineer

 • civil engineer

 • geotechnical engineer

 • surveyor

 • permit expeditor

 • Source highly rated local firms in Southern California / Inland Empire / Los Angeles County

 • Build vendor comparison sheets with:

 • scope

 • pricing

 • timing

 • reviews

 • strengths / weaknesses

 • Prepare a likely permitting roadmap and project sequence

 • Organize everything into clean folders, trackers, summaries, and presentations

 • Help coordinate revisions and next steps until we have a serious pre-construction direction



Deliverables



We expect the VA to produce:

 • a luxury concept / inspiration board

 • a backyard vision brief

 • a site feasibility research summary

 • city/permit research notes with sources

 • a list of likely required permits and consultant types

 • a local vendor shortlist

 • a rough project phasing plan

 • a budget range matrix

 • a decision memo on the best next step

 • weekly progress updates with real movement, not filler



Required Skills

 • Excellent research ability

 • Strong English writing and communication

 • Ability to think critically, not just gather surface-level information

 • Experience coordinating construction, architecture, landscape, pool, or permitting projects

 • Ability to create polished summaries, spreadsheets, and presentations

 • Strong visual taste for luxury residential design

 • Organized, responsive, and proactive

 • Able to distinguish between a concept drawing and something actually permit-feasible



Strong Preference For Candidates With Experience In:

 • luxury residential projects

 • pool / spa design coordination

 • hillside or slope-site projects

 • California permitting research

 • landscape architecture support

 • construction coordination

 • vendor sourcing and bid comparison



Important



This role is about building a real-world actionable plan.



We are not looking for someone who only sends inspiration photos or generic design ideas.



We want someone who can help bridge the gap between:

vision -> feasibility -> professional team -> execution



To Apply



Please send:

 1. a short introduction

 2. examples of any design coordination, architecture, pool, landscape, or permitting-related work

 3. examples of research summaries / project trackers / presentations you have created

 4. a brief explanation of how you would approach a luxury hillside backyard project in California

 5. your hourly rate

 6. your weekly availability



Bonus



In your application, include the phrase:

“permit-first design wins”



This helps us know you actually read the full post.

title: Client Coach (Coaching and Feedback) – $1,100/month
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role



Start at $935 per month base.

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

- All tools provided

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

- Join daily team check-ins

- Your role is to help clients succeed and stay long-term.



What We’re Looking For



- Strong English (written and spoken)

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Quiet workspace

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#2: Years of short-form content experience

#3: Years of client management experience

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

#5: Your portfolio



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Company: Simplify AI



Position Type: Full-Time Remote



About Us:



Simplify AI is revolutionizing healthcare delivery by providing AI-powered solutions designed specifically for clinics. We're scaling rapidly across US, Singapore, and Australia, and we need a force multiplier—someone who can anticipate needs, execute independently, and keep our operations running smoothly.



The Role:



You're not a typical VA. You're a trusted operator who thinks like a founder. You'll manage calendars,
s, projects, and communications—but more importantly, you'll identify bottlenecks, solve problems before they arise, and drive initiatives that move the needle. You'll be the backbone of our operations, handling everything from scheduling to strategic coordination.



What You'll Do:



Core Responsibilities:



Manage founder/leadership calendar across multiple time zones (US, Singapore, Australia)

Filter, prioritize, and respond to
s on behalf of leadership (with authority to make decisions)

Schedule and coordinate meetings, pitches, and calls with clinic prospects and partners

Track and follow up on action items fro
etings and decisions

Maintain CRM records, sales pipeline updates, and deal status tracking

Prepare briefing documents, meeting agendas, and follow-up summaries

Coordinate between sales team, leadership, and external partners

Handle invoicing, payment tracking, and basic financial admin

High-Impact Initiatives (You'll Own These):



Identify operational inefficiencies and propose solutions

Create and optimize internal processes and workflows

Manage project timelines and deadlines across teams

Build templates and systems that scale as we grow

Research and implement tools that improve productivity

Coordinate hiring, onboarding, and team logistics

Monitor market conditions, competitor activity, and trends relevant to our business

Proactively flag risks, opportunities, and strategic decisions that need attention

What We're Looking For:



Non-Negotiable:



Exceptional English Communication: Written and verbal fluency. You're drafting
s on behalf of leadership, so your communication must be polished, professional, and persuasive.

Independent Problem-Solver: You don't wait for instructions. You see a problem and fix it. You ask questions only when necessary and propose solutions.

Strategic Thinking: You understand business priorities. You know what matters and what doesn't. You can prioritize ruthlessly.

Initiative-Taker: You're constantly looking for ways to improve operations, streamline processes, and create leverage. You're uncomfortable with inefficiency.

Reliability & Ownership: You own your deliverables. You follow through. You're organized and detail-oriented without being micro-managed.

Adaptability: You work across multiple time zones, contexts, and priorities. You're comfortable with ambiguity and changing priorities in a startup.

Discretion & Professionalism: You handle sensitive information confidently. You're a trusted advisor, not just a task manager.

Preferred Experience:



3+ years as an executive assistant, operations manager, or similar high-autonomy role

Experience in startups, scale-ups, or fast-paced environments

Familiarity with CRM tools (HubSpot, Pipedrive, etc.)

Project management experience (Asana, 
, Notion, etc.)

Sales operations or business development background

Healthcare or SaaS industry experience

Comfort with multiple time zones and asynchronous communication

Compensation & Benefits:



Competitive salary based on experience and location

Flexible remote work arrangement

Equity or performance bonuses for exceptional performers

Professional development budget

Flexible hours (core hours required, but flexibility on timing)

What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days):



Month 1: You've mastered the calendar,
 flow, and project tracking. Leadership feels relief.

Month 2: You've identified 3-5 operational inefficiencies and implemented fixes. You're proactive, not reactive.

Month 3: You're running initiatives independently. You've built systems that scale. Leadership trusts you completely.

Why This Role Matters:



Founders and leaders are only as effective as their operations. A great VA multiplies a leader's capacity by 3-5x. If you can think strategically, act independently, and care about outcomes (not just tasks), this role will make you invaluable to our team and our mission.



How to Apply:



Send an
 to 
 with subject header: I AM A ROCKSTAR VA



Application Requirements:



Resume/CV: Highlight examples of independent initiatives you've led, not just tasks you've completed

Cover Letter: (500 words max) Answer this: "What's one operational inefficiency you've identified and solved in a previous role, and how did you approach it?"

Writing Sample: Provide 2-3 professional
s you've written on behalf of leadership (or similar high-stakes communication)

Video Introduction: (2 minutes) Introduce yourself, highlight why you're excited about this role, and give us a sense of your communication style and personality

 and inbox management

title: Customer Service Representative (Airbnb Guest Support – Remote)
description:
Nomad Equity is a growing U.S.-based short-term rental management company that manages vacation rental properties across the United States.



Our mission is to deliver an exceptional guest experience while operating high-quality properties for our homeowners.



We are looking for a reliable and professional Guest Communications Specialist to join our remote team and help support our Airbnb and VRBO guests.



This role is extremely important because you will be the primary point of contact for guests staying in our homes.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

• Answering questions before arrival and providing check-in instructions

• Helping guests during their stay and resolving issues calmly

• Coordinating maintenance issues with our operations team

• Escalating urgent problems when needed

• Responding to guest reviews when necessary

• Ensuring every guest interaction delivers a 5-star hospitality experience



Our goal is simple: every guest should feel taken care of and supported.



Work Schedule

Monday – Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM PST

Requirements



• Excellent written & verbal English (very important)

• Strong customer service and problem-solving skills

• Ability to stay calm and professional in stressful situations

• Ability to respond quickly and handle multiple conversations at once

• Reliable high-speed internet connection

• Quiet work environment

• Experience working with Airbnb, VRBO, or short-term rental companies

• Experience using guest messaging platforms (Hostaway, Guesty, Zendesk, etc.)





The Ideal Candidate



• Hospitality-minded and naturally helpful

• Extremely responsive and organized

• Detail-oriented and dependable

• Comfortable handling urgent guest situations

• Takes ownership and communicates clearly



Why Join Us



• Work with a professional U.S. company

• Long-term stable position

• Fully remote work environment

• Clear systems and support from our operations team

• Opportunity to grow as the company expands



How to Apply



To move forward, please complete our quick application form — it only takes a few minutes: ????

title: Operations Manager - Short-Term Rental Portfolio (Airbnb)
description:
Nomad Equity is a growing short-term rental property management company looking for an experienced Operations Manager to take full ownership of day-to-day property operations across our portfolio.



This is not a guest communications role. We need someone who has been in the trenches of STR operations — coordinating maintenance, managing cleaning teams, running inspections, handling Airbnb resolution cases, and producing accurate owner financials. If you've done this work before, you know exactly what this role looks like.



What You'll Own:

- Maintenance issues and quarterly property inspections across all properties

- Cleaning team management, including sending the cleaning coordinator the next day's check-in and check-out schedule daily

- Purchasing consumable supplies for all properties

- Bad review disputes — any review 4 stars or below gets added to 
 and you work with the guest and Airbnb to get it removed

- Airbnb resolution cases end-to-end

- Categorizing and identifying transactions throughout the month

- Monthly owner statements, drafting owner performance
s, and transferring owner funds after admin approval

- Enforcing sub-5-minute response time to all guest messages and inquiries

- Processing guest refunds

- Ensuring the task queue is being cleared on a daily basis



What We're Looking For:

- Significant hands-on experience managing short-term rental operations — not just guest messaging, but actual property ops including maintenance coordination, vendor management, cleaning logistics, inspections, and supply chain

- Experience with financial reporting in the STR space: owner statements, transaction categorization, and fund transfers

- Familiarity with Airbnb's resolution center and review dispute process

- Experience with project management tools like 
 or Asana for tracking operational tasks

- Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal

- Ability to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and enforce standards across a team

- Strong problem-solving skills for real-world Airbnb operational situations



Schedule: Wednesday–Sunday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Pacific Standard Time

Compensation: Hourly (rate based on experience)



How to Apply:

Please apply using this Google Form link: 



After submitting the form, you'll be invited to a brief AI-powered voice interview. This helps us quickly assess communication skills and operational experience so we can move qualified candidates forward faster. We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Web Developer & SEO Specialist
description:
We are looking for a talented and experienced Web Developer & SEO Specialist to build and grow our online presence. The ideal candidate can both design and develop professional websites AND drive organic traffic to them through effective SEO strategies.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

This is a fully remote position. Please include a link to websites you have built and/or improved in your application. We look forward to working with you!

title: Happy Call Team(CS)
description:
About Haulla

Haulla, a smart waste collection service by Ecube Labs, operates in major U.S. markets including Dallas, Houston, Austin, Denver, and Chicago — with plans for further expansion across North America. We help small and mid-sized businesses across the U.S. find better, more affordable waste solutions.



What You'll Do

The Happy Call Team (CS) is responsible for ensuring customers have a positive experience with Haulla service by analyzing feedback, identifying improvements, and implementing effective solutions. Core responsibilities will include:



- Customer Satisfaction & Retention: Conduct proactive satisfaction checks ("Happy Calls") to verify customer satisfaction and identify potential friction points before they escalate into churn.

- AR & Collection Management: Proactively manage and collect outstanding AR (Accounts Receivable) to improve overall collection rates while minimizing customer attrition.

- Churn Mitigation & Recovery: Identify churn risks during the collection process and implement personalized recovery plans for long-term past-due accounts to encourage service re-entry and long-term loyalty.

- Billing Dispute Resolution: Serve as the primary point of contact for customer billing disputes and grievances, providing swift and effective resolutions that restore service confidence.

- Trust Rebuilding: Leverage positive collection experiences as an opportunity to rebuild trust and enhance the overall customer lifecycle value.



What We're Looking for

- This is a full-time remote position

- Available to work during U.S. business hours (7 AM–3 PM PST), Monday to Friday.

- Strong communication and problem-solving skills

- Native-level English fluency

- Familiarity in CRM tool (e.g., HubSpot) is a plus





Good To Have

- Experience in Collection Agency(Over 3+ years)

- Experience in Call Center

- Language Skills: Proficiency in Spanish is not required but is considered a significant advantage.



What You’ll Need (System Requirements)

- A desktop or laptop computer

- A quiet home workspace

- A noise-cancelling headset



Compensation



- Base salary plus performance-based bonuses

- Total earning potential: Php 60,000–130,000+/month

- Performance-based commission structure



Interested applicants may apply through the following Google form :

title: Cost Estimator (Construction/Demolition)
description:
Join Binners – a fast-growing construction services company in Toronto, Canada.



Binners provides demolition, bin rentals, waste removal, and construction support services across the Greater Toronto Area. Reliability is our brand, and strong estimating is critical to ensuring our projects are profitable, well-executed, and set up for success from day one.



If you’re analytical, detail-oriented, and experienced in construction estimating, we want you on our team.



About the Role

As a Demolition Estimator, you will be responsible for reviewing project scopes, performing takeoffs, and building accurate, profitable estimates for demolition and related services.

You will work closely with sales and operations to ensure every job is priced correctly, clearly scoped, and aligned with execution in the field.

This is a full-time remote role based in the Philippines, working Toronto business hours.



Responsibilities

-- Reviewing drawings, photos, and project details to understand full scope of work

-- Performing quantity takeoffs for demolition projects

-- Building detailed cost estimates including labour, equipment, disposal, and materials

-- Ensuring all estimates meet target margins and profitability goals

-- Identifying risks, missing scope, and potential cost issues before quoting

-- Clearly defining scope inclusions, exclusions, and assumptions

-- Coordinating with sales to finalize pricing and submit quotes

-- Supporting operations with clear job handoffs and documentation

-- Comparing estimated vs actual job performance to improve future accuracy

-- Continuously improving estimating templates, pricing models, and processes



Requirements

-- Experience in construction estimating (demolition experience strongly preferred)

-- Strong understanding of construction or demolition workflows

-- Ability to read drawings, plans, and project scopes

-- Strong analytical and numerical skills

-- Advanced proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

-- High attention to detail and accuracy

-- Strong written and verbal English communication skills

-- Ability to work independently and make decisions

-- Organized and process-driven mindset

-- Stable internet connection, reliable computer, and quiet workspace

-- Willing to work Toronto timezone hours



Nice to Have

-- Experience estimating demolition, waste removal, or site services

-- Familiarity with construction drawings, blueprints, and takeoff tools

-- Familiarity with AutoCAD

-- Experience with estimating or project management software

-- Understanding of disposal costs, labour productivity, and job costing

title: Sales Representative
description:
About Us

Web Dynamics International is a fast-growing full-service digital marketing agency serving over 1,000 clients across four countries, the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and Australia. We help small and medium-sized businesses build their online presence through social media management, paid advertising, and lead generation.

Founded in 2017, we started with door-to-door sales in Phoenix, Arizona and grew into an international agency with a team of 50+ employees. We are a company built on integrity, communication, and delivering a WOW customer experience to every client we work with.

We are expanding our sales team and are looking for driven, disciplined, and hungry sales representatives to join us full-time.



What You'll Be Doing

As a Sales Representative at Web Dynamics, you will be responsible for contacting inbound leads, running discovery calls, recommending the right package, closing deals, and managing your pipeline through our CRM system.

This is a high-volume outbound calling role. Leads are generated through our paid advertising campaigns, you are NOT cold calling strangers. You are calling people who have already expressed interest in our services.

Your daily responsibilities will include:



Contacting inbound leads through our dialer system

Running discovery to understand the prospect's business and needs

Recommending and presenting the right social media management package

Handling objections and closing deals on the call

Following up consistently with leads in your pipeline

Updating the CRM accurately after every call (notes, dispositions, opportunity value, tags)

Ensuring proper handoff to the onboarding team after every sale

Hitting a minimum of 300 calls per day

Working toward a goal of 50 sales per month or $5,000 in monthly revenue



What We're Looking For

We are not looking for order-takers. We are looking for closers  people who are hungry, disciplined, and don't take no for an answer easily.

You are a great fit if you:

Have a strong command of English (spoken and written)  this is non-negotiable as you will be speaking with US, Canadian, Australian, and UK business owners

Are comfortable making high volumes of outbound calls every day

Are coachable and willing to follow a proven sales process

Are self-motivated and don't need someone standing over your shoulder

Have a competitive mindset and are driven by results and commission

Can handle rejection without getting discouraged

Are organized and disciplined with CRM updates and follow-up

Have a quiet, professional workspace with a reliable internet connection

Have a working computer/laptop and headset



Preferred Experience & Skills

Previous sales experience (phone sales preferred)

Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM is a big plus

Familiarity with 
 for team communication

Experience working with a US-based company or US clients

Digital marketing or social media knowledge is a plus but not required



What We Offer



Commission on every sale you close  the more you sell, the more you make

Full training provided through our comprehensive sales training portal

A structured, proven sales process with scripts and systems in place

A high-energy team environment with clear performance expectations

Room to grow within a fast-expanding international agency

Consistent leads  you will never have to prospect or cold call



Performance Expectations

We want to be upfront about what is expected here so there are no surprises:

Minimum 300 calls per day

Maximum 3-minute wrap time between calls

50 sales per month or $5,000 in monthly revenue is the baseline target

You are expected to be profitable within your first 30 days

Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly

CRM must be updated accurately after every single call

This is a performance-based role. If you show up, follow the process, and put in the work  you will make money. If you are looking for a relaxed job where you can coast, this is not the right fit.



Requirements

Stable, high-speed internet connection (wired preferred)

Quiet, professional workspace with no background noise

Working computer/laptop

Quality headset for calls

Smartphone or ability to use 
 for team communication

Must be available Monday – Friday 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Arizona Time (MST)  no exceptions

title: Lead Generation & Sales Closer (AI Solutions)
description:
Company: Simplify AI 



Position Type: Commission-Based Sales Role (Rapid Deployment)



Locations: United States, Singapore, Australia



About Us:



Simplify AI is revolutionizing healthcare delivery by providing AI-powered solutions designed specifically for clinics. Our platform streamlines operations, enhances patient care, and reduces administrative burden—solving real pain points that clinic owners face daily.



The Opportunity:



We're in hyper-growth mode and building an elite sales force to establish our presence across three key markets. This is a high-impact, high-reward role for driven individuals who thrive in fast-paced, commission-based environments. You'll be part of a founding sales team that's shaping the future of healthcare AI.



What You'll Do:



Identify and qualify clinic prospects across your assigned market through research, networking, and direct outreach

Share our professionally produced 5-10 minute Loom video pitch (we provide this) that explains our solution and pricing

Collect payment from interested clinics

collect screenshot of invoice for processed payments

Maintain accurate records and reporting on all leads and closures

Provide feedback on market conditions and prospect interest levels

That's it. Simple, repeatable, scalable.



Compensation Structure:



Per Closed Deal: 20% commission on the $3,000 SGD clinic onboarding fee

Calculation: Close a clinic ? Earn $600 SGD (~$450 USD) per signed deal

High-Volume Opportunity: Top performers closing 10-15 clinics per month can earn $6,000-$9,000 SGD monthly

Payment processed monthly for verified closures



What We're Looking For:



Essential Qualities:



Relentless Drive: You're motivated by results and commission. Pure hunters only.

Prospecting Excellence: You know how to find clinic owners, get contact info, and get meetings without hand-holding.

Persistence: You can handle rejection. You don't take "no" personally.

Basic Communication: You can introduce yourself professionally, share a link, and follow up. No complex sales skills needed—the video does the selling.

Reliability: You track your own pipeline and deliver accurate reporting.



Preferred Experience:



1+ years of sales, business development, or lead generation experience

Experience prospecting B2B or healthcare contacts

Comfort with independent, commission-based work

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Why Join Now:



Pure upside: No salary, no overhead—you only earn when you close

Simple process: Find prospect ? Send video ? Collect payment ? Get paid

Work entirely independently across a massive market

Low friction, high reward model

Be part of a mission improving healthcare delivery globally

Application & Group Interview Process:



We're running a competitive selection process designed to identify the top 10-20 candidates:



Submit: Tell us why you're the right fit (brief video or written response)

Group Interview Round: Participate in a 45 mins - 1 hour intensive session with
candidates where we evaluate prospecting skills, resilience, and drive

Real-World Challenge: You'll be given 10 clinic names and need to get as many responses/interest as possible—we evaluate your prospecting ability live

Final Selection: Top performers move directly to deployment with live onboarding



How to Apply:

Send an
 to 
 with the subject header: "I AM A WARRIOR CLOSER" to express your interest.

title: Airbnb & Property Management Rockstar | OwnerRez Expert (PST Shift)
description:
Are you an Airbnb Property Management Rockstar who is fast, efficient, and tech-savvy?



We are an established, San Francisco Bay Area-based property management firm with nearly 8 years of success in the Short-Term Rental (STR/Airbnb/VRBO) and Long-Term Rental (LTR) industry. We have built a reputation for excellence, and we are looking for a seasoned professional to join our stable, high-performing team.



We don’t just need "customer service"—we need an Airbnb & Property Management Expert who understands the mechanics of the industry, moves quickly, and never lets a detail slip through the cracks.



Why Join Us?

Proven Stability: Work for a company with an 8-year track record in Airbnb and LTR management.

High-Speed Environment: We value efficiency. If you are fast and productive, you will thrive here.

Professional Standards: We have clear processes in place—no "startup" guesswork.

100% Remote: Long-term, stable remote work from your home office.



The Requirements (Strict)

Please do not apply if you only have general Call Center/BPO experience. We require specific Airbnb and Property Management expertise.

Direct Experience: Minimum 2+ years managing Short-Term Rentals (Airbnb/VRBO) and Long-Term Rentals.

PMS Mastery: Advanced proficiency in OwnerRez is highly preferred. You should know how to navigate workflows, triggers, and guest communication within the platform.

Operational Speed: Fast-thinking, fast-typing (60+ WPM), and able to handle multiple guest issues simultaneously.



Tech Stack: Knowledge of AI tools (ChatGPT), Time Doctor, and dual-monitor setups.



Your Responsibilities

Airbnb & Guest Management: Manage inquiries, bookings, and high-stakes resolution cases across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct sites.

Property Oversight: Coordinate check-ins/outs, send lease agreements, and monitor security.

Logistics & Maintenance: Schedule cleaning teams and review quality assurance photos.

Listing Optimization: Maintain and optimize Airbnb listings to ensure maximum occupancy and 5-star reviews.



Compensation & Benefits

Base Pay: Starting at $5/hour (Negotiable for extensive experience).

Schedule: Pacific Standard Time (PST) | Includes Weekends

Paid Leave: Accrued leave credits after 1 year.

Bonus: Performance-based bonuses.



How to Apply

To filter for the high-attention-to-detail candidates we need, please follow these steps exactly:



 your Resume to 
 Introduction: Record a brief intro highlighting your specific experience with OwnerRez, Airbnb, and STR/LTR management. (Share via Dropbox/Google Drive link).

Subject Line: Must be: [Property Management Specialist] – (Last Name, First Name)

 by telling us who the current Prime Minister of the United Kingdom is.

title: [URGENT] Guest Support Specialist – Direct Hire
description:
The Mission:

Join Luxostays, an established property management company with 8 years of industry expertise in the San Francisco Bay Area. We are not a hiring agency; you will be working directly for our internal team. We are seeking a high-caliber professional who thrives on operational precision, logic-based problem-solving, and the fast-paced nature of short-term rental (STR) management.



Why This Role?

Direct Engagement: Work directly with our leadership team (no middleman or agency).

Stability: Join a company with nearly a decade of success in the SF market.

High-Level Autonomy: We value "High D" personalities who can take command of a situation and drive resolutions without hand-holding.

Systems-Driven: We utilize a sophisticated tech stack (OwnerRez, VRBO, Slack, Time Doctor) for those who appreciate structured, efficient workflows.



The Schedule:

Full-Time (40 hours/week) | PST Timezone.

Rotating shifts including weekends (Business-critical coverage).



Your Core Responsibilities:

Command & Control: Oversee guest reservations, handle complex Airbnb resolutions, and manage security monitoring (CCTV). You are our first line of defense and the final word in guest satisfaction.

Logistics Coordination: Manage the "ripple effect" of turnovers. You will schedule cleaners, verify quality via photo audits, and coordinate specialized vendors (contractors, handymen) directly.

Asset Optimization: Maintain listing integrity across platforms, conduct due diligence research, and execute special administrative projects with 100% accuracy.

What We Require (The High-Standard Filter):

Critical Thinking: You must be able to de-escalate "urgent" maintenance or guest issues using logic and a "High D" approach—firm, fair, and fast.

Technical Proficiency: 2–4+ years in Airbnb/STR Management is mandatory. You must be comfortable with Time Doctor and AI-driven workflows.

The Setup: Reliable high-speed internet, a quiet environment, and a dual-monitor setup for maximum multitasking efficiency.

Education: College Degree required.

Compensation & Growth:

Starting Rate: $5/hour (Negotiable based on proven expertise in property operations).



Tiered Rewards: Skill-based pay increases, healthcare options, and year-end performance bonuses after 1 year of consistent excellence within our company.

:

?

Core Skills & Responsibilities



You should be comfortable with:

	•	Reviewing Shopify product pages and identifying CRO opportunities

	•	Suggesting improvements to:

	•	Layout

	•	Content structure

	•	Trust elements

	•	UX flow

	•	Making backend Shopify edits, including:

	•	Product setup

	•	Variants

	•	SKUs

	•	Pricing / bundles

	•	Basic product organisation

	•	Implementing changes cleanly without breaking existing setups

	•	Explaining your thinking in a clear, structured way



You do not need to be a designer, but you should understand how design and UX impact conversion.



?



How the Process Will Work



We want to be very clear and transparent about this.



Step 1: Shortlisting



We’ll review applications and shortlist candidates based on:

	•	Experience

	•	Portfolio (if applicable)

	•	How clearly you communicate



Step 2: CRO Logic Exercise (Unpaid)



Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a short CRO reasoning exercise.



This is not real client work and nothing will be used commercially.



You’ll be asked to:

	•	Review a Shopify product page

	•	Explain what you would improve

	•	Explain why those changes matter for conversion



This step is purely to understand how you think.



Step 3: Paid Project



Once we d
 who to move forward with, we’ll start with a real paid project.

	•	Budget for the first project is around $500 USD

	•	Scope will be clearly defined upfront

	•	This will be real client work



If the collaboration goes well, there is strong potential for:

	•	Additional projects

	•	Ongoing work

	•	Longer-term collaboration



?



Who This Role Is Best For



This role is ideal if you:

	•	Enjoy CRO and problem-solving

	•	Prefer clear projects over vague hourly work

	•	Want to build a longer-term working relationship

	•	Are comfortable working independently and taking ownership



?



How to Apply



Please include:

	•	A short explanation of your Shopify and CRO experience

	•	Any relevant examples of past work (if available)

	•	A brief note on how you typically approach improving conversion on a product page



?



Final note (important tone-setting)



We care far more about how you think and communicate than buzzwords or long CVs.

If you’re thoughtful, organised, and serious about your work, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Technical Support Supervisor/Team Leader
description:
Our Support Department operates 24/7, 365 days a year, and we are expanding our leadership team. We are looking for a Support Supervisor/Manager who can lead by example, guide agents, and also work hands on with technical support tasks. This role requires flexibility, strong analytical thinking, and the ability to manage both people and processes in a fast paced environment.

A standard work week is 40 hours, with paid overtime available when authorized.



What You’ll Do (Leadership + Hands On Technical Work)

Leadership Responsibilities

- Supervise, mentor, and support a team of customer service and technical support agents.

- Monitor performance, provide coaching, and ensure KPIs, SLAs, and quality standards are met.

- Handle escalations and guide agents through complex customer issues.

- Review tickets, chats, and call logs to identify training needs and process improvements.

- Coordinate shift schedules, coverage, and workflow distribution across a 24/7 operation.

- Work closely with management to improve service quality, efficiency, and customer satisfaction.

- Assist with hiring, onboarding, and training new agents.

Hands On Technical Support Responsibilities

- Connect with customers via phone,
, ticket support, and live chat to deliver a personalized help desk experience without scripts.

- Walk customers through setup and troubleshooting of:

- Game servers

- VPS and dedicated servers

- Web hosting, cPanel, FTP clients

-
 services

- Other hosting related systems

- Diagnose and resolve technical issues with a structured, analytical approach.

- Provide customer feedback to leadership to improve products, services, and user experience.

- Assist with marketing tasks when needed.

- Support other agents with customer service, sales, and technical inquiries.



What You’ll Get

- Competitive pay rate.

- Bonuses based on customer feedback (“Kudos”).

- Opportunities for overtime.

- Advancement opportunities after 90 days.

- Leadership and technical training to support your growth.

- Work?from?home convenience — no commute required.



Ideal Candidates MUST Have

- Excellent English writing and speaking skills.

- Strong technical mindset and troubleshooting ability.

- Stable, high speed internet connection.

- Ability to work effectively from home.

- Self motivation and the ability to work independently or with a team.

- Help Desk or Call Center experience.

- Basic website and WordPress knowledge.

- Prior experience in a supervisory, team lead, or managerial role OR strong leadership potential with analytical skills.



Ideal Candidates Also Have

- Experience with video games and game?server configuration/setup.

- Experience with web hosting environments.

- Familiarity with Linux systems (Ubuntu, CentOS, RedHat).

- Familiarity with Windows systems (Windows Server 2016/2019/2022, Windows 10/11).

- A helpful, friendly, and customer?focused attitude.

- A degree in an IT?related field.

- Certifications (CompTIA, Microsoft, Google, etc.).

- Strong diagnostic and analytical thinking skills.

- Experience managing or mentoring support teams.



Additional Details

This is a full?time, long?term remote position.

Due to our international and Canadian operations, flexibility in scheduling is preferred as we operate 24/7/365.

You must have:

- A reliable computer capable of running graphical applications (games, Microsoft Office, etc.)

- Stable, high speed internet

- A quiet, professional work environment

We conduct our own assessments during the selection process (English proficiency, background check, IQ, etc.).



How to Apply

If this role interests you and you feel you meet the requirements above, please complete the application form at:


Include any supporting information that may strengthen your application.

title: Web Developer (HTML, CSS & WordPress Specialist)
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a highly efficient WordPress Web Developer who specialises in HTML and CSS to help us build, optimise, and scale high-performing websites.



This role is focused purely on execution within WordPress — no design tools, no handover workflows. You’ll be working directly in WordPress, using HTML and CSS to create, refine, and optimise pages at speed.



You’ll also leverage AI tools to accelerate production, improve output quality, and increase the volume of content (blogs, landing pages, and service pages) without compromising performance or SEO.



Key Responsibilities



Build and optimise pages directly within WordPress

Use HTML and CSS to customise layouts, improve structure, and enhance performance

Rapidly create and publish blog content and landing pages using AI-assisted workflows

Ensure all pages are mobile responsive and load quickly

Continuously improve site speed, Core Web Vitals, and overall performance

Structure pages for strong SEO and AEO (Answer Engine Optimisation) outcomes

Maintain consistency across multiple pages and websites

Troubleshoot layout, styling, and performance issues



Required Skills & Experience



Strong hands-on experience with WordPress (core platform, themes, page builders)

Advanced proficiency in HTML and CSS

Experience building and publishing pages directly in WordPress (no reliance on design files)

Understanding of website performance optimisation (speed, load times, Core Web Vitals)

Strong knowledge of on-page SEO and content structuring

Ability to work quickly while maintaining accuracy and quality



Highly Valued



Experience using AI tools to improve workflow speed and content production

Understanding of AEO (structuring content for featured snippets, FAQs, and search intent)

Experience working on content-heavy websites (blogs, service pages, SEO-driven sites)

Familiarity with WordPress performance tools and optimisation techniques



What We’re Looking For



Speed and efficiency — you can produce high-quality work quickly

A practical, execution-focused mindset (not design-dependent)

Strong attention to detail in layout, spacing, and responsiveness

Someone who takes ownership and continuously improves output



What Success Looks Like



Faster turnaround of new pages and blog content

Noticeable improvements in site speed and performance

Strong SEO rankings and increased organic visibility

Scalable systems for producing high-quality content consistently

title: Level 2 Helpdesk Technician
description:
Position Summary



We are a small managed service provider (MSP) looking for a Helpdesk Technician who can own the full support lifecycle — from first-contact triage through advanced troubleshooting — across our client base. You’ll be the primary point of contact for end users, handling everything from password resets and printer issues to Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace administration, network diagnostics, and systems troubleshooting. Because we’re a small team, you’ll wear many hats, work directly with clients, and have real impact on how we deliver service.\



Essential Duties and Responsibilities



Front-Line Support



• Answer incoming calls,
s, and tickets; log all requests accurately in the PSA/ticketing system (Superops)

• Perform initial triage — gather symptoms, identify urgency, and resolve straightforward issues on first contact when possible

• Handle common requests: password resets, MFA setup, account unlocks, new-user onboarding/offboarding,
 and calendar issues, printer troubleshooting, and basic software installs

• Walk end users through solutions clearly and patiently, adapting communication style to non-technical audiences

Advanced Troubleshooting

• Troubleshoot complex workstation, laptop, and peripheral issues across Windows 10/11 and macOS environments

• Administer and maintain Active Directory, Azure AD / Entra ID, Microsoft 365 tenants, and Group Policy across multiple client environments

• Diagnose network connectivity problems including DNS, DHCP, VPN, Wi-Fi, firewall rules, and switching/routing basics

• Support and maintain RMM tools (Superops) for monitoring, patching, and remote access

• Investigate recurring issues, perform root-cause analysis, and implement lasting fixes rather than repeated band-aids

• Support cloud platforms and SaaS applications common to the client base (Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, line-of-business apps)



MSP Operations



• Manage and prioritize your own ticket queue across multiple clients, meeting or exceeding SLA response and resolution targets

• Create and maintain client-specific documentation, SOPs, and knowledge base articles in the company documentation platform (Hudu)

• Participate in onboarding new clients — inventorying assets, documenting environments, and setting up monitoring and management tools

• Coordinate with vendors and third-party providers when escalation beyond our scope is needed

• Assist with project work as needed: workstation deployments, migrations, network upgrades, and office moves

• Contribute to improving internal processes, automation, and service delivery quality



Required Qualifications



• Excellent English Language Skills, both written and verbal

• 4+ years of hands-on IT support experience; MSP experience strongly preferred

• Solid working knowledge of Windows 10/11, macOS, Microsoft 365 administration, and Active Directory / Azure AD

• Expertise in Google workspace administration

• Understanding of networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN, VLANs, and basic firewall concepts

• Experience with a PSA or ticketing system and an RMM platform

• Ability to manage multiple client environments and context-switch effectively throughout the day

• Strong communication skills — comfortable speaking directly with clients ranging from small business owners to office staff

• Self-motivated and able to work independently; you won’t always have someone looking over your shoulder



Preferred Qualifications



• Industry certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft 365 Certified

• Experience with endpoint management tools (Intune, Jamf)

• Familiarity with scripting or automation (PowerShell, Bash, or Python)

• Experience supporting backup and disaster recovery solutions (Datto, Veeam, Acronis)

• Exposure to basic security concepts: EDR tools,
 filtering, security awareness training platforms

title: Project based Web Designer (No Code and Low Code CMS Specialist)
description:
We are looking for a creative and detail oriented Web Designer with 3+ years of experience designing and building modern websites using no code and low code CMS platforms such as Wix, Squarespace, Shopify, and WordPress with Elementor. This role is also  intended for Filipino independent contractors, as hiring and engagement will be managed through the OnlineJobs.ph platform based on the client’s preference.



The role focuses on creating visually compelling, responsive, and high performing websites with strong UX and UI execution. You will work on business websites, landing pages, and e commerce experiences, translating design ideas into clean, functional digital experiences with minimal custom code. 



Role Overview



Project based contract role. Work will be assigned per project depending on client needs and internal project allocation.



Project based contract with an hourly rate starting at $7 per hour, with adjustments based on experience, role fit, and application performance, up to $8 per hour.



Key Responsibilities

title: Launch & Campaign Marketing Specialist
description:
About the Business



Intentional Travelers is an online education business that helps independent travelers plan their own meaningful trips and travel smarter.



Through our website 
, we provide:

- Travel planning tutorials and online courses

- The Intentional Travelers Toolkit membership

- A free
 newsletter and blog

- The annual DIY Trip Summit (an online conference for independent travelers featuring 30+ travel experts)



Our mission is to help travelers cut through overwhelming information online and make confident decisions about their trips. We focus on practical guidance from our own real-world experience, helping people travel smarter with simple tools - even if they didn’t grow up with today’s technology.



We’re a married couple who have run online businesses since 2014 and have experience in managing remote team members, including one VA that has been with us since 2020. We hope to find a valuable partnership with someone who can commit to at least a year or two part-time. 



About the Role



We are seeking a part-time marketing specialist who can help plan and execute promotional campaigns for our membership and virtual events.



This role focuses on marketing strategy, campaign planning, and promotional copywriting.



You will collaborate directly with the founder to plan marketing campaigns and events, then take ownership of executing those campaigns across
 and sales funnels.



The ideal person enjoys thinking strategically about promotions, understands customer psychology, can translate ideas into effective marketing copy and systems, and uses basic campaign data to test and improve promotions.



What Success Looks Like



Your primary responsibility will be helping plan and execute quarterly promotional campaigns that drive membership sales.

This includes promotions connected to:

- The annual DIY Trip Summit

- Smaller virtual events or workshops related to our course content

-
 course promotions that drive Toolkit membership sales



Over time, this role may expand into evergreen
 funnels, additional promotional campaigns, or other online platforms if it’s a strong fit.



Success in this role means:

- Marketing campaigns are well organized and executed smoothly

- Promotional messaging resonates with our audience

- Campaigns generate consistent membership sales

- Our marketing systems become easier to run and improve over time



Responsibilities



Your work will include a mix of campaign execution, system improvements, and ongoing optimization. 



A. Campaign Strategy & Planning



Work with the founder to plan promotional campaigns including:

- Quarterly course/membership promotions

- DIY Trip Summit marketing



During monthly planning calls you may:

- Review past campaign results

- Brainstorm promotional ideas together

- Help shape messaging and angles

- Plan campaign timelines



You will be expected to propose ideas and improvements, while the founder retains final decision authority.



B. Campaign Execution



Once campaigns are approved, you will execute much of the marketing work, including:

- Drafting or refining promotional
 sequences

- Updating sales pages

- Optimizing
 funnels

- Scheduling
 campaigns

- Other implementation tasks



C. Copywriting



A key part of this role is writing clear, persuasive marketing copy.

Typical copy projects include:

- Promotional
s

- Launch
 sequences

- Sales page updates

- Opt-in pages and funnel messaging



Our brand voice is practical, encouraging, and educational. We avoid hype and focus on helping travelers make better decisions. Our audience is primarily mature independent travelers from North America who value practical, trustworthy guidance and are not necessarily digital natives.



D. Funnel Improvements



When there is no active promotion, your focus will shift to improving existing marketing systems, which may include:

-
 funnels

- Promotion calendars

- Campaign messaging

- Offer positioning

- Ad campaigns

- Affiliate collaborations



Work Structure



This is a part-time remote position.



- Start with approximately 8-10 hours per week

- Opportunity to increase hours over time if it’s a good fit



We will typically have one or two planning calls per month to check in about marketing plans and campaign performance.

Most work can be completed independently between those meetings.



Required Skills



Strong candidates will demonstrate:

- Strategic copywriting ability

- Understanding of customer psychology

- Experience with optimizing online marketing campaigns or product launches

- Strong written English

- Ability to work independently and manage projects

- Willingness to learn new tools and systems

- Honesty and not afraid to ask questions 

- Initiative to analyze relevant data and generate new ideas and projects

- Clear communication and reliability



Other Requirements

- Available approximately 10 hours per week

- Reliable computer and internet



Nice to Have

Experience with any of the following is helpful but not required:

-
 marketing platforms (ConvertKit / Kit or similar)

- Sales page platforms (Thrivecart or similar)

- AirTable databases

- Basic website editing (Wordpress and Squarespace)

- Search Engine Optimization

- Funnel planning

- Online course businesses 

- Affiliate programs

- Virtual summits

- Digital product launches

- International travel



We can train the right person on our specific tools and systems.



Benefits



- Flexibility! Most of the work can be done any time that’s convenient for you.

- Opportunity to learn about travel around the world and online entrepreneurship

- If there are particular skills you’d like to develop, we’ll try to work that into your job.

- Hourly pay based on experience (starting around $5 - $10 USD / hr)

- Potential performance bonuses tied to successful campaigns.

- We make 13th month payments for those in good standing.

- Opportunity to increase hours and responsibility over time, if desired.



We reward reliable, long-standing workers as you grow into a key role on our team.



To Apply



Please message with the subject line: Applying for Marketing Specialist – Intentional Travelers



At the top of your message include:

- 2–3 sentences about why this position interests you

- One example of a marketing campaign, launch, or
 promotion you have worked on

- What is one marketing angle you would test to promote a travel planning membership for North Americans age 50+? 

*Please do not generate responses with A.I., we want to see your own thoughts and writing ability.*



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete written interview questions by April 15. Final candidates will be invited to a Zoom interview. New hire will have a fully paid 1 month probation period, including paid training.

Why this role is different

title: Fluent English Payroll & Commission Specialist (Advanced Spreadsheets)
description:
About the Role:



We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Payroll & Commission Specialist to join our team long-term. Your primary mission will be managing our payroll and calculating commissions for our sales team.



Because our sales commissions are calculated manually, this is not a standard data-entry job. You need to be a true expert in Excel or Google Sheets. If you love working with large data sets, building complex formulas, and ensuring everyone gets paid flawlessly and on time, this is the perfect role for you.



Key Responsibilities:



Manual Commission Calculations: Take raw sales data and use advanced spreadsheets to accurately calculate commissions for our sales team on a regular basis.



Payroll Processing: Track employee hours, verify payouts, and accurately process our regular payroll runs so the team is paid on time, every time.



Spreadsheet Mastery & Organization: Build, maintain, and optimize the spreadsheets we use to track sales, payouts, and financial data.



General Financial Admin: Keep our back-office organized, manage digital receipts, and assist with light, general bookkeeping as needed (credit card reconciliation is a very minor part of this role).



What You Need to Succeed:



Advanced Spreadsheet Skills: This is the most critical skill. You must be fast and highly proficient in Excel/Google Sheets (you should use tools like Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, IF statements, and complex formulas in your sleep).



Flawless English Communication: You will be communicating directly with the business owner and the sales team regarding their pay, so clear, C1/C2 level written and spoken English is strictly required.



Extreme Attention to Detail: When calculating commissions by hand, a single typo costs the company money or makes a salesperson angry. We need someone who obsessively double-checks their work.



Trust & Reliability: You will be handling highly sensitive payroll data, so high integrity is non-negotiable.



Work Hours & Compensation:



Schedule: [Insert Days of the week] from [Insert Start Time] to [Insert End Time] [Insert Time Zone, e.g., EST / PST].



Pay:$700 - $900/month], depending on your level of spreadsheet expertise.



How to Apply:

We only hire people with excellent attention to detail. To prove you have read this entire post and can follow instructions, please do not use a standard copy-paste application. Instead:



Change the subject line of your application message to: Green Calculator - [Your Name]



In the very first sentence of your cover letter, tell us what your favorite Excel or Google Sheets formula is and exactly why you like it.



Briefly explain (in 2 to 3 sentences maximum) your personal process for double-checking your own work when calculating payroll or commissions to ensure there are zero errors.



Include a link to a short voice recording (using Vocaroo or a similar tool) introducing yourself, summarizing your experience with payroll/spreadsheets, and confirming your internet setup is reliable.



Applications that do not follow these exact instructions will be automatically deleted. We look forward to meeting you!

title: Fluent English Customer & Admin Support Specialist (Voice/Tickets/CRM)
description:
About the Role:



We are looking for a reliable, highly skilled Virtual Assistant to join our team long-term in a hybrid role. In this position, you will wear two hats. First, you will be the frontline voice and face of our company, handling customer inquiries with empathy and professionalism. Second, you will be our behind-the-scenes organizer, processing orders and managing our CRM to keep our business running smoothly.



If you love helping people solve problems but also enjoy checking items off a to-do list and organizing data, this is the perfect role for you.



Part 1: Customer Support Responsibilities



Voice Support: Handle inbound and outbound customer calls to answer questions, troubleshoot issues, and provide excellent service.



Ticket Management: Read, investigate, and reply to customer support tickets with impeccable grammar and a friendly tone.



Problem Solving: Investigate customer complaints, figure out what went wrong, and provide fair, timely resolutions.



Part 2: Administrative & Operations Responsibilities



Order Entry: Accurately input customer orders and process them through our system.



CRM Management: Update customer records, track issues, and manage data within [GoHighLevel., Zendesk, Shopify, HubSpot]. We are developing our own CRM, but you must have experience with management software.



General Admin: Assist with daily back-office tasks, maintain spreadsheets, and help keep our operations organized.



What You Need to Succeed:



Impeccable English: You must have C1/C2 advanced spoken English with a neutral accent, and flawless written grammar.



The "Hybrid" Mindset: The ability to switch gears quickly from talking to a frustrated customer to quietly executing detailed order entry.



Tech-Savvy: Quick to learn new software and comfortable navigating CRM platforms.



Strict Technical & Workspace Requirements:

Because you will be speaking with customers on the phone, a professional environment is non-negotiable. You must have:



A dedicated, quiet workspace with absolutely ZERO background noise (no dogs, roosters, or street traffic).



A professional-grade, noise-canceling headset (e.g., Jabra, Plantronics).



A wired, high-speed internet connection (Minimum 25 Mbps).



A reliable backup internet connection and a backup power source in case of brownouts.



Work Hours & Compensation:



Schedule: Forty hours a week, from 8 am PST to 4 pm PST.



Pay: $500 - $900month], depending on experience.



How to Apply:

We only hire people with excellent attention to detail. To prove you have read this entire post and can follow instructions, please do not use a standard copy-paste application. Instead:



Change the subject line of your application message to: Blue Penguin - [Your Name]



In the very first sentence of your cover letter, tell us the name of your favorite movie.



Include a link to a short voice recording (using Vocaroo or a similar tool) introducing yourself and explaining why you are a great fit for this hybrid role. This is required so we can hear your spoken English and verify there is no background noise in your workspace.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will be automatically deleted. We look forward to meeting you!

title: Executive Assistant - Finance & Property Management Support
description:
About the Role



As the Executive Assistant - Finance & Property Management Support you will act as a strategic partner to the Managing Director of Property Management and the broader leadership team, ensuring seamless executive operations while driving structured and scalable finance administration processes. This role blends high-level executive support with hands-on financial reporting, requiring both organisational excellence and analytical capability.



You will be responsible for streamlining workflows, managing priorities, and systemising recurring financial and administrative processes to improve efficiency across the business. If you are detail-oriented, process-driven, and thrive in a remote, fast-paced environment where you can take ownership, this role is an excellent fit.





Key Responsibilities

Executive Support:



Manage complex calendars, scheduling, and travel arrangements for the Managing Director and leadership team.

Prepare meeting materials, reports, and executive briefing packs.

Draft, review, and manage professional correspondence, including
s and internal communications.

Coordinate with accountants, advisors, and external stakeholders to ensure alignment and timely communication.

Process expense claims and perform credit card reconciliations accurately and efficiently.

Provide day-to-day executive and administrative support, ensuring priorities are managed effectively.

Handle ad-hoc administrative tasks, including data entry and document preparation.





Finance Reporting & Administration:



Develop, maintain, and improve recurring financial reports and KPI dashboards.

Support month-end reporting processes and preparation of board reporting materials.

Maintain and update revenue and expense tracking templates for accuracy and consistency.

Assist in CRM management (e.g., HubSpot), ensuring data integrity and process efficiency.

Identify opportunities to automate and streamline financial reporting workflows.

Ensure financial data is organised, accessible, and aligned with business reporting requirements.





Process Improvement & Coordination:



Build structured systems and processes to support scalability and operational efficiency.

Continuously review workflows to identify inefficiencies and recommend improvements.

Collaborate with internal teams to standardize reporting and administrative procedures.

Support cross-functional coordination between finance, operations, and leadership.



Other Responsibilities



Complete additional tasks and projects as assigned by leadership.

Maintain confidentiality and professionalism in handling sensitive financial and executive information.

Stay proactive in identifying opportunities to improve systems, reporting, and support processes.

Contribute to a collaborative and high-performing remote team environment.



About You



Strong experience as an Executive Assistant, with exposure to finance or accounting support.

Advanced Excel skills with the ability to build reports, dashboards, and tracking tools.

Highly organised, detail-oriented, and process-driven with strong problem-solving skills.

Experience with tools such as HubSpot, 
, or similar CRM/project management platforms is preferred.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Ability to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and meet deadlines in a remote environment.

Comfortable handling both strategic support and hands-on administrative tasks.





Finer Details



Schedule: TBD

Start Date:

TBD

title: WordPress Developer (Ongoing Maintenance & Support – Retainer Role)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented WordPress Developer to manage and maintain two existing websites on an ongoing basis.

This is a long-term opportunity for someone who values clear communication, consistency, and proactive problem-solving. The role will begin as a monthly retainer for routine maintenance, with additional paid work available as needed.



Websites Overview

• Platform: WordPress (both sites) 

• Hosting: GoDaddy & Namecheap 

• Access: Full admin access will be provided 



Core Responsibilities (Monthly Retainer)

• Perform routine WordPress maintenance 

• Update plugins, themes, and WordPress core 

• Monitor site performance, uptime, and security 

• Perform and verify regular backups 

• Identify and fix broken links or minor issues 

• Ensure both websites remain fast, secure, and fully functional 



Tracking & Analytics (Important)

• Maintain and troubleshoot Google Tag Manager (GTM) setups 

• Ensure accurate GA4 tracking and conversion events 

• Verify tracking for Google Ads conversions and website actions 

• Diagnose and fix tracking issues when they arise 

• Ensure data accuracy for reporting and marketing decisions 



Additional Work (As Needed)

• Troubleshoot and fix new issues or errors 

• Implement content or design updates 

• Improve website speed and performance 

• Assist with landing pages or small builds 

• Support integrations (CRM, forms, etc.) 

• Recommend proactive improvements 



Workload Expectation

• Typically light to moderate monthly workload 

• Additional hours available depending on site needs 



Communication & Availability

• Preferred communication:
 or Google Chat 

• Must respond within 24 hours 

• Should be available to address urgent issues within that timeframe 

• Preferred (not required): Some overlap with US Central Time 



What We’re Looking For

• Strong experience with WordPress maintenance and troubleshooting 

• Solid understanding of Google Tag Manager (GTM) and GA4 

• Experience with conversion tracking and Google Ads integration 

• Ability to work independently and proactively 

• Clear, consistent, and professional communication 

• Strong attention to detail 

• Ability to explain issues and solutions in simple terms 



Expectations (Please Read Carefully)

• You must clearly define: 

 -What is included in your monthly retainer 

 -What is considered additional billable work 

• Provide your: 

 -Monthly retainer fee 

 -Hourly rate for extra work 

 -Typical turnaround times 

• Proactive communication is required, no long gaps in response 

• You should flag potential issues before they become problems 



Bonus Skills (Highly Preferred)

• Website speed optimization 

• Basic SEO knowledge 

• Landing page design 

• Experience with CRM integrations (especially KVCore or similar) 



How to Apply

Please include the following:

1. Your experience with WordPress maintenance 

2. Links to websites you currently manage 

3. Your monthly retainer rate and what it includes 

4. Your hourly rate for additional work 

5. Your response time and turnaround expectations 

6. Your preferred communication method 

7. Confirmation you are available for ongoing work 

8. Your experience with Google Tag Manager (GTM) and GA4, including: 

 -How you typically set up and verify conversion tracking 

 -Any experience connecting tracking to Google Ads 

 -Your opinion on utilizing GA4 without GTM for conversion tracking in Google Ads. 



Important

We are looking for someone long-term who is dependable, responsive, and proactive. Clear expectations and consistent follow-through are critical for success in this role.



Please do not submit AI-generated or copy/paste responses, we value your personal experience, process, and communication style. Applications that feel overly generic or do not directly answer each question will not be considered.

To confirm you’ve read this entire post, include the word “reliable” in your application.

title: Senior SEO and Marketing Specialist
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior SEO Specialist to join our dynamic CNSS marketing team. The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of search engine optimization strategies and techniques, with a proven track record of driving organic traffic and improving search rankings. This role requires a blend of technical expertise and creative problem-solving skills to enhance our online presence and maximize the effectiveness of our digital marketing efforts.



TRACKING SOFTWARE IS MANDATORY FOR ALL OUR EMPLOYEES. WE USE TERAMIND



Duties

Minimum 3 years of experience

Develop and implement comprehensive SEO strategies to increase organic search visibility and traffic.

Conduct keyword research to identify high-value opportunities for content creation and optimization.

Analyze website performance using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Tag Manager to monitor traffic trends and user behavior.

Optimize website content, structure, and on-page elements (including HTML, CSS, and JavaScript) for improved search engine rankings.

Collaborate with the content team to create SEO-friendly content that aligns with business goals and audience needs.

Perform technical SEO audits to identify issues affecting site performance and provide actionable recommendations for improvement.

Stay updated on industry trends, algorithm changes, and best practices in SEO to ensure ongoing optimization efforts are effective.

Manage E-commerce SEO initiatives to enhance product visibility and drive sales through organic search channels.

Utilize Adobe tools for design enhancements that support SEO strategies.

Build high-quality backlinks and improve domain authority

Plan, launch, and manage Google Ads campaigns

Requirements



Proven experience as an SEO Specialist or similar role, with a strong portfolio demonstrating successful projects.

Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and WordPress; familiarity with website development is a plus.

Experience with E-commerce platforms and optimizing product listings for search engines.

In-depth knowledge of Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Google Tag Manager, and other relevant SEO tools.

Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and make data-driven decisions.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams.

A proactive approach to problem-solving with attention to detail.

If you are passionate about SEO and eager to make a significant impact in a fast-paced environment, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.

title: Senior Technical Project Manager (6+ Years Experience)
description:

Full Time



A successful candidate will be available consistently between 9-5pm, 7-3pm, or 8-4pm USA 

MDT Timezone



The Opportunity

EETech is a growing systems integrator with our own proprietary commerce technology. We are currently hiring two Senior Technical Project Managers to join our overseas team. Our development environment is highly mature, featuring strong, autonomous developers and excellent architects. Because our technical team operates with a high degree of independence, this role is not about micromanagement. Instead, we are looking for professionals who excel at meticulous tracking, capacity visibility, and clear reporting. We are currently managing resources between Azure Boards and 
, and we need project managers who can keep this data flawlessly organized so our US leadership always has an accurate view of project

health.



You will be stepping into two main roles,

 so that a task is always accurately reflected for US leadership.

Client Engagement & Communication

Required Qualifications

 while we evaluate dedicated resource software.

? Experience thriving in an environment where you are trusted to manage the process while letting the engineers manage the code.

? Deep expertise in Azure DevOps, specifically Azure Boards, and modern tracking tools like 
.



Preferred Traits
