title: Full-Time Video Editor & AI Content Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are a growing social media agency producing short-form video content for multiple clients. We're looking for a full-time Video Editor & AI Content Specialist to join our team. Someone who edits great short-form clips and uses AI video tools to produce specific content assets following our internal Standard Operating Procedures.



This role will not be about creative strategy, but about precise execution. You'll be given clear briefs and documented processes for every task. What we care about most is that you follow systems, deliver consistent quality, and are genuinely hungry to learn. If you haven't used every tool on our stack yet, that's okay we'll teach the right person.



What You'll Do

Video Editing

• Edit raw talking head footage into high-retention short-form clips (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

• Add captions, text overlays, transitions, sound design, and B-roll using CapCut

• Maintain brand consistency across multiple client accounts

• Follow client-specific style guides and creative briefs closely

• Incorporate revision feedback quickly and accurately

• Deliver a consistent daily volume of polished edits on schedule



AI Clip Generation

• Use HeyGen, Kling, and Veo3 to generate AI video assets as directed

• Execute step-by-step SOPs precisely through prompts, settings, and output formats are pre-defined

• Quality-check all AI outputs before submitting (accuracy, artifacts, sync issues)

• Flag any SOP gaps or tool issues so processes can be improved

• Organize and label all generated assets clearly for handoff



General

• Handle multiple client projects at once without missing deadlines

• Keep files organized with clear naming conventions

• Communicate proactively about workload, timelines, and blockers



Requirements

Must-Haves

• Demonstrated experience editing short-form video content (portfolio required)

• Strong proficiency in CapCut

• Comfortable working within SOPs: you execute the process first and suggest improvements second

• Detail-oriented with a strong eye for quality

• Able to manage multiple projects simultaneously without dropping the ball

• Reliable internet connection and a dedicated workspace

• At least 4 hours of timezone overlap with the team

• Clear written communication in English

• Hungry to learn, coachable, and willing to be trained on new tools



Nice-to-Haves

• Experience with HeyGen, Kling, Veo3, or any other AI video generation tool

• Background working in a content or social media agency

• Understanding of what makes short-form video perform (hooks, pacing, retention)

• Familiarity with Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve or Capcut

•  Access to a VPN service



What We Offer

• Stable, full-time remote role with consistent work

• Clear SOPs and briefs for every task so you'll always know what's expected

• Training on AI tools for the right candidate

• A communicative team that respects your time and gives clear feedback

• Room to grow as we scale

• Performance bonuses up to 50% of monthly wage

• Access to tools



How to Apply

Please include all of the following incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



• A portfolio or reel of your best short-form edits (Google Drive, Notion, or direct links)

• 2–3 examples of talking head videos you have edited

• Any examples of AI-generated video content you've created (if applicable)

• A short note (3–5 sentences): What do you do when you receive an SOP and something is unclear?

• Your current timezone and available working hours



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Expert Construction Virtual Assistant for Australian Builder
description:
About Us



Evolve Homes Queensland is a fast growing residential building company based in South East Queensland, Australia.



We specialise in fixed price full turn key homes with premium inclusions and a 16 week express building program. We are focused on quality, speed, strong systems, and excellent client service.



The Role



We are looking for an Expert Virtual Assistant with real construction administration experience, preferably supporting an Australian builder or construction business.



This is a full time, long term role. We need someone organised, proactive, detail focused, and confident working in a fast paced construction environment.



This is not an entry level admin role.



You must already understand how to support a busy team, manage documents, follow up stakeholders, and keep projects moving.



Important:



We are not accepting applicants who currently have multiple clients or other jobs.



This is an exclusive full time role. You must be fully available during work hours and able to commit your full focus to our business.



If you currently work for other clients, run side jobs, or have overlapping commitments, please do not apply.



Responsibilities

• Provide day to day admin support to the construction team

• Manage calendars, follow ups, meeting coordination, and general team support

• Prepare, send, file, and track construction documents

• Maintain accurate project records, reports, and timelines

• Support reporting, document control, and project systems

• Assist with presentations, spreadsheets, and general operations admin

Requirements

• Proven experience in construction admin, project coordination, or similar support role

• Strong preference for experience with Australian builders, trades, or construction companies

• Excellent written and verbal English

• Strong attention to detail and ability to follow process exactly

• Highly organised and able to manage multiple priorities

• Strong Microsoft Office skills, especially Word and Excel

• Confident using CRMs, project management tools, and cloud based systems

• Good understanding of construction terminology and workflows

• Professional, reliable, responsive, and proactive

• Stable internet, reliable computer, and quiet work from home setup

• Willing to work full time on an exclusive basis only



What We Offer

• Competitive salary based on experience

• Permanent work from home arrangement

• Australian holidays off

• 5 paid vacation leaves

• Weekends off

• Day shift schedule from 8:00 am to 5:00 pm Philippine Time

• Ongoing training and support

How to Apply

Step 1



Watch this video:

title: Conversion-Focused Copywriter
description:
CRO Copywriter

Full-time · Remote · $1,000 – $1,500/month USD



ABOUT US



We are a leading Shopify SEO & CRO agency. Our clients are fast-growing e-commerce brands who trust us to build high-converting pages. We're looking for a copywriter with a deep understanding of human psychology who understands why people make purchasing decisions and can write compelling copy that turns a visitor into a customer.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Define and interpret project briefs for one-off Shopify page builds, using data and buyer psychology to set the direction

- Write conversion-focused copywriting for landing pages, product pages, collection pages, and CRO experiments

- Apply psychological principles like social proof, loss aversion, urgency, and trust signals, deliberately and precisely

- Collaborate closely with designers: your copy sets the hierarchy and structure they build around

- Adapt tone, voice, and persuasion levers across multiple e-commerce brands



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Skills:

- Native or near-native English, flawless written communication is non-negotiable

- 2+ years writing conversion copy, not just content

- Deep understanding of buyer psychology and persuasion principles

- Strong grasp of CRO fundamentals: above-the-fold hierarchy, friction reduction, objection handling

- Ability to interpret business analysis reports and let them inform your copy decisions

- E-commerce experience, ideally Shopify

- Familiarity with frameworks like AIDA, PAS(TA), and how to apply them to e-commerce



Who you are:

- You don't just write copy, you create a story and build a world around products

- Autonomous: you can own or even create a brief that the team can translate into an effective design

- Ask smart questions before starting, not after

- Growth-driven, willing to take feedback, and hold a high standard



NICE TO HAVE



- Experience writing for A/B tests and CRO experiments

- Exposure to tools like Hotjar, Microsoft Clarity, or GA4

- Experience working inside a productised agency or structured delivery team



COMPENSATION & SETUP



- $1,000 – $1,500/month USD · full-time · based on experience

- 100% remote

- AI & other tools provided as needed

- Clear SOPs, a well-run team, and a great company culture

- Room to grow into a senior position as the agency scales



HOW TO APPLY



1. Send us a short motivation letter: who you are, why this role, and what makes you the right fit.

2. Include a short video (Loom or similar, 3–5 minutes) walking us through 2-3 examples of conversion copy you've written: cover how you researched the customer, why you chose the value propositions and messaging angles you did, the psychological levers you pulled, and the result. Applications without both won't be considered.

title: Copywriter & Creative Strategist
description:
Overview

We are seeking a "pioneer"—a proactive, high-energy Copywriter & Creative Strategist to join an experimental, high-conviction project for 2026. This is not a traditional retainer-based role; it is a pure commission-based affiliate model designed to empower our creators and scale our brands through organic social lift. 

In this role, you will act as the "owner" of your own AI-driven Instagram presence, providing the creative vision and briefs while our elite internal production studio handles the AI generation for you—free of charge.



Work Structure & Compensation

Type: Part-time / Commission-based (Affiliate).

Compensation: 10%–50% commission per sale (e.g., a 50% commission is $50 on a $100 product).

Transparency: Commission rates are tiered and will change over time as the project scales.

Growth Opportunity: The highest-performing candidates will be fast-tracked into full-time retainer roles with the company.

Work Requirement: You may have a concurrent full-time job; however, all candidates must sign an NDA



Key Responsibilities

Creative Briefing: Develop winning formats such as AI-driven podcasts, TED talks, or street interviews to sell products to a health-conscious 45+ demographic.

Production Partnership: Brief our internal AI production studio to create high-fidelity, realistic B-roll and AI-influencer content.

Account Management: Run and grow your own Instagram accounts dedicated to promoting the brand.

Performance Testing: Experiment with different formats and AI personas to find the highest-converting proof of concept.

Scaling Strategy: Identify "winner" content and whitelist these assets with our paid ads to "put gasoline on the fire" and scale results.

Strategic Iteration: Use organic performance data to refine hooks, calls-to-action (CTAs), and storytelling strategies. 



Required Skills & Experience

Direct Response Copywriting: Proven ability to write clear, compelling, and high-converting scripts and briefs focused on driving immediate action.

Strategic Thinking: Deep understanding of marketing fundamentals and consumer psychology (e.g., Eugene Schwartz’s Breakthrough Advertising) to create "thumb-stopping" social media content.

AI Awareness: Comfortable working within AI-driven workflows; if not currently comfortable, you must be highly willing to learn and adapt quickly.

Market Knowledge: Understanding of the "TikTok Shop" model and how to apply it to
 and Instagram.

Mindset: A true team player who is communicative, proactive, and maintains a "team-first" attitude while operating with a pioneer spirit.



Why Join Us?

Resource Support: We will work to provide as many resources as possible to ensure your success, including free access to our world-class production studio.

Faceless Commission: A unique, faceless way to earn significant commissions by running your own AI influencer pages.

Direct Impact: We operate on a "real relationship" basis—we don’t make money unless you make money.



To Apply

Please submit your portfolio or examples of previous creative strategies. Include a short Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you are the right person to pioneer this AI-affiliate model.

title: Visual Creator Team Lead Role (Urgent Hiring)
description:
Develop Talent. Master Execution. Drive Results.

At Right Hook, we don't just "make ads"—we engineer high-performing visual experiences that stop the scroll and drive massive growth. As the Visual Creator Team Lead, your primary mission is the growth of your people. You are the lead creative mastermind responsible for cultivating a pod of "World-Class Visual Creators."



By bridging the gap between high-level strategy and technical execution, you ensure our clients stay ahead of the curve. Your impact is measured not just by the beauty of the assets we produce, but by the evolution of your team’s skills, the efficiency of our production systems, and the ultimate success of our global client base.



Core Responsibilities

Your role is a dynamic blend of mentorship, strategic oversight, and hands-on artistry:



•Elite Coaching: Lead Monthly 1:1s to identify "skill gaps" and mentor 5-7 creatives into industry leaders.

•Execution Excellence: Conduct regular observations to ensure every ad meets our high standards for technical precision.

•Operational Architecture: Build SOPs, manage resources, and ensure the Creative Production System remains efficient and frictionless.

•Hiring & Onboarding: Scout, interview, and train top-tier talent to ensure a seamless culture fit.

•Continuous Craft Mastery: Stay active in the groundwork. Whether executing high-level ad requests or collaborating on internal marketing content, you remain hands-on to sharpen your skills, stay ahead of trends, and lead by example to develop your team's capabilities.



Growth Opportunities

We believe in "Leadership by Evolution." As a VC TL, you aren't just filling a seat; you are entering a leadership incubator:



•Leadership Incubator: Gain direct exposure to the Head of Department and Cross-Department Leads.

•Systems Mastery: Become an expert in Lean Leadership and advanced project management.

•Career Mentorship: Access specialized training designed to turn you into a top-tier organizational mentor.



What You Bring 



•3years+ Proven Leadership: Experience leading or mentoring a creative team, with a track record of improving team performance and morale.

•DTC Expertise: Deep experience in Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) advertising and a visceral understanding of what converts.

•Design Mastery: A "world-class" portfolio demonstrating expertise in graphic design, video, motion, and digital advertising.

•Strategic Brain: You understand why an ad works. You can translate complex marketing data into actionable creative direction.

•Systematic Thinking: You love a good workflow. You can identify a bottleneck in a creative sprint and build an SOP to fix it.

description:

 & Instagram).

While this role focuses primarily on image creation and editing, experience or interest in video editing is a plus, as we anticipate expanding into more video content in the future.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (TikTok/Reels)
description:
About Us:



Welpr is a US-based health & wellness brand helping families find safer, non-toxic products. We have a growing TikTok presence (~20k followers) and we're scaling our content output. We need a reliable video editor to join our team long-term.



The Role:



You'll be editing short-form talking-head videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. Our creator films the content — you make it pop.



What you'll do every week:



• Edit 8-15 short-form videos (30-90 seconds each)

• Cut out pauses, ums, dead air — keep the pacing tight

• Add animated captions/subtitles (CapCut-style, bold and engaging)

• Add text overlays, light transitions, and on-screen callouts as needed

• Light color correction

• Add trending music/sound where appropriate

• Deliver ready-to-post vertical video files



Monthly volume: Starting at 30 videos per month



What we're looking for:



• Experience editing TikTok or Reels content (send examples)

• Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

• Understands TikTok pacing and trends — you know what makes people stop scrolling

• Reliable and communicative — if something's going to be late, tell us before the deadline, not after

• Can match and maintain a consistent brand style

• Good internet connection and able to download/upload video files quickly



What this is NOT:



• Heavy VFX, motion graphics, or animation work

• Long-form YouTube editing

• A one-time gig — we want someone who grows with us



Tools we use: Google Drive for file sharing,
 for communication.



How to apply — READ THIS:



Start your message with the word "ingredients" so we know you read the full post.



Then include:



1. 2-3 links to short-form videos you've edited (TikTok, Reels, or Shorts)

2. What software you use

3. Your expected monthly rate

4. Your available hours per day and timezone



Paid test before hiring: We'll send you 3 raw clips to edit. You'll be paid for the test regardless of whether we move forward. We want to see your actual work, not just a portfolio.

title: Data Extraction Specialist (NBHWC Directory )
description:
Overview



We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and reliable contractor to support a critical data and website project. The primary objective is to extract National Board for Health & Wellness Coaching (NBHWC) coach data from a public website, organize it into a structured contact database, and prepare it for upload into our CRM system.  Over 10,000 names to build into the Excel sheet.



This role requires strong attention to detail, and accuracy.



Key Responsibilities



1. Data Extraction (Primary Task)



Systematically review the NBHWC coach directory on the website

Extract all relevant coach information, including but not limited to:

Full Name

Credentials

 Address

Phone Number 

Location (City/State/Country)

Specialty areas

Languages 

Ensure no duplicates and complete coverage of all listed coaches



2. Data Structuring & Cleaning



Build a clean, well-organized contact sheet ( Excel)

Standardize formatting (names, phone numbers, states, etc.)

Identify and remove duplicates

Flag missing or incomplete data

Validate accuracy wherever possible



3. CRM Preparation



Format the dataset for CRM upload (we will provide field structure)

Map fields appropriately (First Name, Last Name,
, Tags, etc.)

Add tags or segmentation (e.g., NBHWC Certified, Specialty Area)

Ensure file is clean and import-ready





Requirements-Proven experience with:

Data entry and data scraping (manual or tools)

Microsoft Excel  (advanced proficiency preferred)

Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy

Strong organizational skills

Ability to meet deadlines and communicate clearly

Experience working with U.S.-based teams preferred



Timeline

Project start: Immediate

Expected duration: 1–2 weeks for initial build

Potential for ongoing work based on performance



To Apply



Please include:



A brief summary of your experience with similar projects

Examples of past data extraction or CRM preparation work

Your availability and estimated timeline

Your hourly rate or fixed project fee



This will be the first of hopefully many projects together.

title: UGC Video Editor
description:
Join Our Team as a Short-Form Content Editor (UGC Ad Specialist)

We’re not looking for average. We’re looking for A-players who know how to source content and turn it into high-performing Meta ads at lightning speed.



We are a rapidly scaling brand that thrives on powerful creative. Your job is simple: find the content, cut the videos, and get them ready to launch. No hook writing, no brainstorming—just speed and execution.



What You’ll Do:

Source Content: Gather raw UGC and creator videos across TikTok, Instagram, and other platforms.



Fast-Paced Editing: Cut and assemble that footage into ready-to-launch ads for Meta.



Volume Output: Deliver high-quality edits quickly and efficiently.



Platform Optimization: Add captions and ensure the pacing is perfect for social media.



What We’re Looking For:

Speed: You are fast in your editing software and even faster at finding content.



Efficiency: You can handle a high volume of footage without slowing down.



The "Social" Eye: You know exactly what kind of creator content looks like a winning ad.



Reliability: You hit deadlines and deliver clean, final files every time.



Why Work With Us:

Pure Execution: Focus 100% on the output—no copywriting or creative strategy required.



High-Growth Environment: Be part of a team where your speed directly impacts our scaling.



100% Remote: Work from anywhere.



If you’re a fast editor who knows how to hunt for content and turn it into clean, winning ads, we want you on our team!

title: Quality Manager | Social Media & Content Editing
description:
Start your application here: 



Key Responsibilities



1. Content Quality Inspections

Conduct structured QA reviews and record findings in the project management system.

Identify recurring quality defects, track error trends by content type and tea
mber, and present monthly quality reports to leadership.

Lead root cause analysis when content errors reach clients; assign corrective actions and 



2. Compliance & Process Governance

- Maintain compliance framework that ensures all content adheres to platform community guidelines and applicable standards.

- Monitor platform policy updates and algorithm changes; rapidly communicate impacts to content and editing teams and update relevant SOPs accordingly.

- Conduct regular internal process audits; document findings and drive resolution.

- Act as the primary point of contact during client quality reviews or complaints; lead structured investigation and response.

Build and track quality KPIs and report to senior leadership.



3. SOP Creation & Documentation

- Author, own, and continuously improve Standard Operating Procedures for all core content production workflows 

- Establish documentation standards, templates, and style guides ensuring all SOPs are clear, visually structured, and accessible to tea
mbers of varying experience levels.

- Lead SOP onboarding sessions for new hires and facilitate refresher training when procedures are updated.



4. Continuous Improvement & Team Development

- Identify training needs arising from quality data

- Evaluate and recommend new QA tools, content review platforms

- Stay current on social media platform developments, content format trends to ensure quality standards remain relevant.

title: Mass Messaging Specialist
description:
Please Apply Here: 
/
/f/2kz0ma3h-1156/MHHLY4BOXCKVXG8CCW



OVERVIEW

We are looking for a highly disciplined and detail-oriented Messaging Operations Specialist to join our growth team. In this role, you are the engine room of our messaging department — accountable for the flawless execution, scheduling, and delivery of mass messaging campaigns and retention sequences.



You will be handling multiple creator accounts daily, with high message volume.



Your job is to take proven strategy and high-converting copy and ensure it reaches the right audience at the exact right time.



This is a pure execution role — not a strategy or creative position. If you pride yourself on speed, accuracy, and never missing a deadline, this role is built for you.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

> Campaign Execution - Schedule and send all mass messaging across assigned creator accounts based on the daily and weekly plan.

> Funnel Maintenance - Update and manage nudge sequences and automated follow-ups to ensure no lead goes cold.

> Retention Campaigns - Execute re-subscription and win-back campaigns based on targeting and instructions provided.

> Reporting - Track and log execution metrics to ensure all campaigns are deployed accurately and on time.

> SOP Adherence - Follow strict internal workflows to maintain consistency, accuracy, and account safety at all times.



WHO YOU ARE

> Highly Organized - You rely on systems, checklists, and precision. Nothing slips through the cracks.

> Reliable & Fast - You execute quickly without sacrificing accuracy. Deadlines are non-negotiable for you.

> Instruction-Focused - You follow SOPs exactly — no guesswork, no improvisation. You execute what's given.

> Detail-Oriented - You double-check links, pricing, targeting, and timing before every single send.

> Tech-Savvy - You navigate tools and platforms efficiently with a stable setup and reliable internet.





SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE

Performance is measured by three things:

•  On-time campaign execution

•  Zero-error sends

•  Consistent daily output volume



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

> Base Salary $400 – $600 / month (depending on experience)

> Performance Bonus - Based on execution quality, accuracy, and consistency

> Tenure Growth - Salary increases tied to consistent performance over time

> Growth Path - Opportunity to move into QA, QM, or higher operational roles



We invest in people who show up, execute consistently, and take ownership of their output. Strong performers have a clear path to grow within the operation.

title: Outbound Appointment Setter + Social Media Assistant (Dental Clinic)
description:
We’re a fast-growing dental clinic focused on high-quality patient care and consistent growth. We’re looking for a high-energy, results-driven appointment setter who can confidently speak with patients, fill our schedule, and support our social media presence.



This is not a passive VA role. You’ll play a direct role in driving revenue and patient experience.



Your Core Responsibilities



1. Outbound Appointment Setting (Primary Focus)



Call existing patients to reactivate inactive patients

Follow up with leads who have enquired but haven’t booked

Confirm upcoming appointments to reduce no-shows

Reschedule missed or cancelled appointments

Build rapport and confidently guide patients to book



2. Lead Management & Follow-Up



Work through call lists daily (CRM provided)

Track outcomes and update notes properly

Follow structured scripts but adapt naturally in conversation

Ensure every lead is followed up multiple times



3. Social Media Support (Secondary Role)



Post content on
 / Instagram

Schedule posts using provided content

Respond to basic comments and messages

Assist with keeping the clinic’s social presence active



What We’re Looking For

Strong English communication (clear, confident, conversational)

Experience in sales, appointment setting, or call centre work

Comfortable handling objections and guiding people to decisions

Positive, energetic personality (you should enjoy talking to people)

Organised and reliable with daily follow-ups

Basic experience with social media posting (FB/IG)



Bonus Points If You Have:



Experience in dental, medical, or healthcare

Experience using CRMs or dialers

Sales training or outbound calling experience

KPIs (How You’ll Be Measured)

Number of calls made daily

Appointments booked

Show-up rate for appointments

Reactivation success (old patients returning)

Compensation



Base salary + performance bonuses

Bonuses tied to appointments booked and attended

Long-term opportunity with room to grow



Why This Role Matters



You are directly responsible for filling the clinic’s schedule and driving revenue.

If you perform well, you will be highly valued and rewarded.



How to Apply



Application Requirement (Important)



To be considered for this role, please submit a short Loom video (2–3 minutes) covering:



Your experience with outbound calling or appointment setting

Why you believe you’d be a strong fit for this role



Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

title: Part-Time Social Media Manager & Operations Assistant — Fitness + Finance Brands
description:
I run two growing brands — a fitness/lifestyle content channel and a credit repair business. I need a reliable, resourceful assistant who can take ownership of the digital side while I focus on filming, client work, and operations.

This is a real opportunity to grow with a business from the ground floor. If you perform well, hours and pay increase as revenue grows. I want someone long-term, not a freelancer hopping between gigs.

WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING:

Content (daily, ~1-2 hours):

 ? Edit short-form vertical videos in CapCut (gym/fitness clips — speed ramps, text overlays, transitions, trending sounds)

 ? Write captions, hashtags, and hooks for TikTok and Instagram

 ? Post content on schedule and run a daily engagement routine

 ? Create simple graphics and quote cards in Canva for IG Stories

 ? Track content performance weekly and report results

Business Support (ongoing, ~1 hour/day):

 ? Help set up and manage online accounts (Etsy shop, Substack newsletter, social media profiles, simple website)

 ? Create and optimize Etsy product listings for digital products

 ? Monitor
 and flag anything important

 ? Research tasks when assigned (competitors, tools, trends, pricing)

 ? Keep trackers and spreadsheets updated

 ? Handle any online admin task that comes up with clear instructions provided



WHAT I AM LOOKING FOR:

Required:

 ? CapCut video editing experience (this is non-negotiable — you will edit every day)

 ? Canva experience

 ? TikTok and Instagram knowledge (posting, hashtags, engagement strategy)

 ? Strong written English

 ? Reliable internet connection

 ? Available during US evening hours (6-10 PM Eastern) at least 4 days per week

 ? Honest, communicative, and proactive — if something is unclear, ask. If you see something that needs doing, do it.

Nice to Have:

 ? Experience with fitness or finance content

 ? Etsy shop management experience

 ? Substack or
 newsletter experience

 ? Shopify experience (future need)

title: Ninja Marketing Assistance For  Fast Growing Business
description:
About the Role



We're looking for a sharp, proactive Marketing Assistant to support the growth of Digital Brand Builders and our wider portfolio. You'll work directly alongside the founding team, helping execute across paid advertising, funnels, content, and marketing operations. This is a hands-on role — perfect for someone who wants to be in the engine room of a fast-moving digital business, not just scheduling posts.

We're at the cutting edge of AI adoption in how we run and grow our brands. We use AI tools daily across content, research, copywriting, and operations — and we expect this person to be the same way. If you're already experimenting with AI to work faster and smarter, you'll fit right in.



Key Responsibilities



Meta Ads & Paid Traffic



- Assist in setting up, monitoring, and reporting on Meta 
/Instagram) ad campaigns

- Pull performance data from Ads Manager and flag opportunities or issues

- Organise ad creative assets — copy, images, video — for testing cycles

- Help manage audiences, pixel events, and campaign structures



Funnel & Conversion Support



- Assist in building and updating landing pages and funnels (Kartra or similar)

- Monitor key funnel metrics: opt-in rates, cost per lead, conversion rates

- Coordinate funnel assets including forms, thank-you pages, and
 sequences

- Support A/B testing by documenting variants and collating results



Content & Marketing Operations



- Help schedule and publish content across social channels

- Assist in producing marketing materials: ad copy,
 drafts, lead magnets

- Maintain the marketing calendar and ensure deadlines are met

- Keep asset folders, trackers, and dashboards organised and up to date



AI-Assisted Workflows



- Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, and others) to accelerate content creation, research, and reporting

- Help identify and implement AI-driven efficiencies across marketing tasks

- Stay curious about new AI tools and bring ideas for how we can apply them in the business



Reporting & Analysis



- Compile weekly performance reports across ads, funnels, and

- Maintain marketing dashboards (Google Sheets or similar)

- Flag what's working and what needs attention based on the data





What We're Looking For



Basic working knowledge of Meta Ads Manager (campaign setup, reading metrics)

Familiarity with funnel tools — Kartra, ClickFunnels, or equivalent

Comfortable using AI tools in day-to-day work (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) — we expect AI to be part of your workflow, not an afterthought

Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple tasks

A learner's mindset — eager to understand why things work, not just execute tasks

Good written communication skills

Experience with Google Sheets / basic spreadsheet skills





Nice to Have



Experience with
 marketing platforms (ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo, etc.)

Basic understanding of direct response copywriting

Exposure to e-commerce or high-ticket coaching businesses

Experience using AI for content creation, research, or workflow automation

Curiosity about emerging AI tools and how they can be applied to marketing — we're actively building AI into our systems and want someone who gets excited by that, not intimidated





What You'll Get



Direct mentorship from experienced digital entrepreneurs

Exposure to the full lifecycle of a digital marketing business

Fast-paced environment where your work has real, measurable impact

A front-row seat to how a modern, AI-first marketing operation is built

Opportunity to grow into a more senior marketing or operations role

title: AI Editor
description:
HIRING: AI EDITOR



REMOTE /WFH - FLEXIBLE SCHEDULE - LONGTERM



We are looking for someone who has real experience training AI models. This job is for people who know how to train full AI models from the beginning, not just write prompts or create LoRAs.



Requirements



• Experience using Kohya_ss, ComfyUI, or similar tools

• Experience training or fine-tuning AI models like Stable Diffusion or Flux

• Ability to prepare datasets and run model training

• A portfolio showing models you trained yourself

• Good English communication

• Reliable and able to work independently



Important:



This is not a prompting job. You must have real experience training AI models.



More details: 



• You’ll be working 4–8 hours per day (flexible schedule)

• $5/hour starting rate

• 100% fully remote



How to Apply



Start your application by filling out our Tally link: 

(You may copy and paste the link if it is not working)



Include the word “PIXEL” in your application so we know you read the full post.



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Instagram Manager
description:
HIRING: Instagram Manager



REMOTE/WFH - FLEXIBLE SCHEDULE - LONGTERM



Are you a creative, reliable Instagram expert who knows how to grow accounts strategically—not just post content? If you love spotting trends early, crafting engaging Reels, and building organic audiences, this role is perfect for you.



Key Responsibilities



• Stay updated on Instagram’s latest trends, formats, and viral content

• Create compelling Reels and posts tailored to our target audience

• Develop and implement effective content strategies

• Engage with followers through comments, DMs, and interactive stories

• Track performance metrics and optimize content based on analytics



What We Offer

• 100% remote work

• Flexible schedule

• Long-term role with growth opportunities



Compensation & Growth



• $2.50/hour (first 3 months) 

• $3.00/hour (after 3 months) 

• $3.00+/hour (after 6 months) 



Performance Bonuses



• An extra $5–$10 per day may be awarded after 3–4 weeks based on your performance.

• All pay increases are performance-based.



Requirements



• Self-motivated and dependable

• Strong written English skills

• Creative and up-to-date with social media trends

• Comfortable working independently

• Seeking a long-term position



How to Apply



Complete the application form here: 

(Note: If the link doesn’t work, copy and paste it into your browser.)



Be sure to include the word “BLUE” in your application to confirm you’ve read the full job description. Only complete applications will be reviewed.

title: Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC: Our Vision for Transformative Music



Pex Life Records is an independent label where urban music meets personal development. Founded by Wilmarck, we create high-quality tracks that resonate with the motivation of Tony Robbins, blended with the commercial sound of artists like Kanye West and Drake. Our music is purpose-driven, focusing on critical life areas: health, financial literacy, peak performance, and spirituality.



You will be joining a brand with a strong, engaged audience of over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers. Your work will directly contribute to inspiring and uplifting thousands through music.-----The Role: Drive Revenue, Build a Team, Shape a Brand



We are seeking a highly motivated Music Manager to lead our sales, operations, and team development. This is a pivotal role for a professional ready to commit to a 45-50 hour/week position that offers substantial commission potential and a clear path to high earnings.



Key Areas of Impact:

Sales & Business Development: Lead client acquisition by pitching proposals to songwriting job boards and driving profits to achieve ambitious sales targets.

Team Leadership: Recruit, hire, train, and inspire contractors and staff to ensure stellar performance and successful new releases.

Operations & Finance: Manage contracts, maintain essential financial records (bookkeeping), and ensure compliance and seamless communication across all stakeholders.

Customer Experience: Be the face of the company, creating memorable customer experiences, explaining product/service prices, and handling key inquiries.



Compensation & Uncapped Earning Potential



This is a performance-driven role with a clear path to significant monthly income through our incentive program.

Base & Growth: The hourly rate starts at $2.81 USD plus commission. The initial 10 hours/week commitment quickly scales up to 45 hours/week within 45 days, allowing for a rapid increase in base earnings.

Monthly Compensation Range: $505–$900 Guaranteed Base + Generous Commission.



Compensation Structure by Target Revenue Goal:

Achieve $1,200 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $675 Minimum. Commission Rate: 10% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement.

Achieve $2,400 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $900 Minimum. Commission Rate: 15% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: Social Security System & Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing.



Flexibility and Structure:



100% Remote Position: Work from anywhere.

Core Availability: Sunday–Thursday, 6:30 PM EST – 3:00 AM EST.

Work/Life Balance: We offer Flexible Scheduling (choose your working days/hours) and Job Sharing options.

Prospect Response Disclaimer: Maintain key client relationships by being available for 3-5 quick, 5–15 minute responses per week within a designated 8-hour window (e.g., 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST).



What We're Looking For (Skills & Qualities)



We need a relentless executor with an independent spirit and high integrity.

Essential: Superior proposal writing, persistence, time management, and strong English speaking/writing skills.

Ideal Candidate: Flexible, eager to learn, competitive, and receptive to constructive criticism.



Your Path to Full-Time: The Paid Audition



We skip the traditional hiring steps and go straight to evaluating your work. The process is designed to be fair, fast, and merit-based:

1 Submit your proposal.

2 Pass a screening exercise.

3 Participate in an interview.

4 Top candidates are selected for a paid audition to ensure a mutual fit before a full-time offer is extended.

If you are ready to be a crucial leader in a high-growth, mission-driven music company, apply now!



Application Instructions:



Demonstrate your expertise in sales management (client acquisition, appointment setting, and closing calls) in your proposal. To ensure you've read these details, please begin your proposal with the phrase "purple elephant."

title: Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC is an independent record label dedicated to producing high-quality urban music focused on health, personal relationships, financial literacy, peak performance, bodybuilding, meditation, and spirituality. Founded by Wilmarck, our music merges influences from Kanye West and Drake with motivational themes inspired by Tony Robbins. With over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers, we aim to inspire and uplift through our music.



Position: Music Manager



We are looking for a music manager responsible for:

- Pitching proposals to songwriting job boards

- Keeping our books and managing contracts

- Driving success by boosting profits and hitting sales targets

- Leading and inspiring the team to deliver stellar performance

- Recruiting, hiring, and guiding contractors

- Managing operations, scheduling, and compliance

- Creating memorable customer experiences

- Onboarding and training new hires

- Communicating seamlessly with stakeholders

- Working 45-50 hours/week, including evenings, weekends, and holidays

- Lifting up to 25 pounds when needed



Disclaimer: Prospects will respond outside of scheduled hours. There will be an established 8-hour window where you’ll be expected to respond within an hour. Ex. Your schedule hours will be 6:30 PM -3:00 AM EST (From 3-11 PM EST if a prospect responds to a proposal, you’ll be expected to respond. Each response should take 5-15 mins. You can expect 3-5 responses per week. The additional hours may be deducted from your regular schedule if it exceeds 50 hours.



Contract Details

- Hourly Rate: $2.81/hr USD + 10%-15% of revenue

- Monthly Compensation: $505-$900 + commission

- Initial Hours: 10 hours/week, increasing to 45 hours/week over 45 days

- Training: Paid training provided

- Raises: Based on work performance



Hiring Process

This is an audition-based hiring process. We will select 3-5 candidates for a paid audition. After reviewing your work, we'll choose one full-time hire.

- Interview: To assess mutual fit

- Notification: Candidates will be contacted within 48 hours regarding audition status

- Video Chat: For day 1 of the audition



Responsibilities

Immediate Focus:

- Pitching to Songwriting Job Boards

- Album Launch Tasks

- Bookkeeping

- Onboarding & Interviewing Staff

- Explaining service and product prices

- Answering customer inquiries

- Obtaining customer information for shipping/services

- Managing our production team

- Communicating with tea
mbers/leaders

- Hitting monthly revenue goals



Future Responsibilities (If Qualified):

- Leading meetings

- Managing teams

- Reporting analytics

- Servicing customers



Skills and Qualifications

Essential:

- Persistence and determination

- Proposal writing skills

- Time management

- Product knowledge

- Customer service proficiency

- Strong English speaking/writing skills

- Reliable internet connection



Ideal Candidate Qualities

- Flexible and eager to learn

- High integrity and commitment

- Relentless execution

- Ability to work independently

- Competitive spirit

- Receptive to constructive criticism

- Effective communication skills



Benefits



Music Manager Incentive Program

The program motivates music managers to achieve monthly revenue goals, fostering a productive environment.



Eligibility: Current management team as of Jan 12, 2025

New hires must be with Pex Life Records for 6 months to qualify

Monthly Revenue Goals and Benefits:

- At $1,200 Minimum:

- Guaranteed Pay: $675 Minimum

- Commission: 10% on qualifying sales

- Additional Benefits: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement



- At $2,400 Minimum:

- Guaranteed Pay: $900 Minimum

- Commission: 15% on qualifying sales

- Additional Benefits: Social Security System Reimbursement, Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing

- Contractual Availability

- Flexible Scheduling: Choose your working days/hours

- Job Sharing: Train others to complete your tasks

- Revenue Lock-In Structure

- Contractual lock-in for pay based on hitting revenue goals over 2-12 months.

- Compensation

Monthly Salary: $505 USD (ifgoal isn't attained)

Start Date: 2 weeks after the interview (if selected)

Long-term Position: 32-40 hours/week

Available Hours: Sunday-Thursday 6:30 PM EST - 3:00 AM EST

Work Location: Remote



Only one position is available; apply now!



Application Instructions

In your proposal, please start with "purple elephant" to confirm you've read this job description. Include components of sales management such as writing proposals to acquire clients, appointment setting, and performing introductory calls to close clients. If we'd like to move forward, we'll send you a screening exercise followed by an interview invite if you pass.

title: Credit Officer
description:
About the Role

You’ll be working with our Accounts Receivable team in Australia, helping to manage customer accounts, follow up on payments, and handle blocked orders. You’ll also help with account reconciliations, resolving payment issues, and making sure our customers pay on time.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage assigned customer accounts and follow up on payments

• Review blocked orders and help get them released quickly

• Negotiate payment plans with customers

• Send out statements and reminders

• Fix account errors and answer customer questions

• Flag high-risk customers and suggest next steps

• Work closely with the Credit Supervisor and team in Australia



What You Need

• 5+ years of experience in credit or collections

• Great English communication skills (written and spoken)

• Strong attention to detail and time management

• Able to work independently and solve problems

• Experience using ERP or accounting systems

• Knowledge of credit risk and collections processes



If you’re experienced, reliable, and ready to work with a great team, we’d love to hear from you!

Please send your resume and a short cover letter telling us why you're a great fit.

title: Call Center Manager / Team Leader
description:
About the Role

We are a performance-based coaching sales operation that partners with e-commerce brands to sell high-ticket wellness coaching programs to their existing customers. We are building our sales division from the ground up and need a Call Center Manager to lead, train, and scale a team of 10 sales agents.

This is a builder role — you will not inherit a running team. You will help hire it, train it, and run it.



What You Will Do

Recruit, onboard, and train a team of setters and closers

Build and enforce daily call routines, KPIs, and performance standards

Monitor live and recorded calls and provide real-time coaching feedback

Manage lead distribution across agents and brand clients

Report on team performance, revenue, and pipeline weekly

Identify underperformers early — coach up or replace fast

Build scripts, playbooks, and objection handling guides with the team

Coordinate with HR on hiring needs as the team scales



What We Are Looking For

3+ years managing an outbound sales or call center team

Proven track record of hitting team revenue targets consistently

Experience in health, wellness, nutraceutical, or DTC sales is a strong plus

Comfortable in a fast-moving, performance-driven environment

Data-driven: you live in dashboards, call metrics, and conversion rates

Strong communicator — you lead by example on the phone

Remote-first mindset — you know how to manage and motivate people you cannot see



Compensation

Base salary + performance bonus tied to team revenue

Commission override on all team closes

Growth path: as the division scales, this role scales with it

title: Sales Representative — Setter & Closer
description:
About the Role

We partner with e-commerce wellness brands to sell high-ticket coaching programs to their existing product buyers. Our leads are warm — these are people who have already purchased a product and are looking for the next step. You are not cold calling strangers.



We have two sales tracks. You will be placed based on your strengths:

Track A — Setter: Contact warm leads, build rapport, qualify the buyer, and book a discovery call. You are the first voice the customer hears.

Track B — Closer: Run the discovery call, identify the buyer's goals and pain points, present the right coaching offer, and close the sale. You are the last voice before payment goes through.



What You Will Do

Make outbound calls to warm product buyers on behalf of our brand partners

Follow proven call scripts while adapting naturally to each conversation

Run discovery conversations to identify buyer goals and obstacles

Present coaching offers clearly and confidently

Handle objections with empathy and logic — no pressure tactics

Send SMS checkout links immediately after verbal agreement on the call

Log every call outcome in the CRM accurately and on time

Participate in daily team huddles and weekly performance reviews



What We Are Looking For

1+ year of outbound sales, phone sales, or call center experience

Confident, warm, and natural on the phone — not robotic or scripted

Resilient — you do not take rejection personally

Coachable — you listen to feedback and implement it immediately

Reliable — you log your calls, you show up, you do the work

Experience in health, wellness, or coaching sales is a plus

Fluent English — additional languages (French, Spanish, Italian) are a bonus



What You Get

Base pay + uncapped commission on every close

Full training provided — scripts, objection handling, product knowledge

Clear career path: top setters become closers, top closers become team leads

Remote — work from anywhere

Weekly performance bonuses for top converters



To Apply

Send a 60-second voice memo introducing yourself and explaining why you are the right person for this role. Applications without a voice memo will not be considered.

title: Wellness & Biohacking Coach
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a certified wellness coach with a passion for biohacking, performance optimization, and human potential. You will be responsible for delivering coaching programs to clients who have purchased wellness products and are ready to go deeper — improving their energy, cognitive performance, sleep, stress resilience, and overall vitality.

You do not sell. We handle all sales. Your job is to deliver results that make clients stay, renew, and refer.



What You Will Do

Onboard new coaching clients within 48 hours of sign-up

Conduct weekly check-in calls or video sessions (30–45 minutes)

Build personalized protocols covering nutrition, sleep, movement, supplementation, and stress management

Provide daily or weekly accountability via WhatsApp or SMS

Track client progress and adjust protocols biweekly based on results

Flag disengaged clients to the operations team for retention outreach

Collaborate on program content development and curriculum updates

Deliver measurable outcomes — client results are your performance metric



What We Are Looking For

Certified in coaching, nutrition, functional medicine, or a related wellness field

Deep knowledge of biohacking fundamentals: sleep optimization, HRV, cortisol management, nootropics, adaptogens, circadian rhythm, and performance nutrition

Experience working with clients on energy, focus, stress, and lifestyle transformation

Familiar with tools like Oura, Whoop, continuous glucose monitors, or similar tracking devices is a strong plus

Empathetic listener — you meet clients where they are, not where you want them to be

Organized and reliable — you show up for every session, you follow up, you document

Comfortable working remotely with clients across multiple time zones

Results-oriented: you measure success by client outcomes, not session count



What You Get

Competitive per-client fee or revenue share

Fully booked calendar — we provide all clients, you focus entirely on delivery

Flexible schedule — you set your availability, we work around it

Opportunity to grow into a lead coach or program director role

Work with motivated clients who have already invested in their health



To Apply

Send your certifications, a brief description of your coaching philosophy, and one client result you are proud of. Applications without this information will not be considered.

title: Looking for AI Expert
description:
REQUIRED: AUDIO OR VIDEO RESUME REQUIRER 

Only applications that include an audio or video resume will be considered.



Your audio/video submission must clearly answer the following questions:



1. What is your direct experience building AI agents or automation systems for real businesses? Give specific examples.

2. I want to connect my Zoho CRM or database to an AI system using APIs.   Can you do this? 

3. If you were hired for this role, how would you approach building an AI assistant that can answer questions about project status using Zoho CRM data?

4. What tools and platforms would you recommend for our use case (AI agents, automations, integrations), and why?



---



Job Title: AI Automation / AI Agent Expert for Solar Company (Advisory + Hands-On Setup)



I own a solar company and im looking for a high-level AI expert. We need someone who can advise us, help design the right setup, and then actually walk us through implementing AI into our day to day processes.  



We want to leverage AI agents and automation in a practical way across our business.



What we want to build

We are looking for someone who knows how to set up AI tools, agents, workflows, and integrations that can help with tasks such as:



- Responding to
s  

- Pulling CRM data through API connections  

- Connecting CRM/project data to GPT or similar AI tools  

- Allowing sales reps or staff to ask questions and get live answers about project status  

- Building internal AI assistants for operations, customer service, and project management  

- Recommending the right architecture, tools, and workflow setup for a real business environment  



Examples of what we need

- Connect our CRM data through API so an AI assistant can answer questions about projects, deal status, milestones, missing items, next steps, etc.  

- Help us understand the best way to structure this securely and reliably  

- Set up agent-style workflows that can take actions, not just chat  

- Help us determine what should be done through GPTs, APIs, automations, webhooks, middleware, or custom applications  

- Walk us through implementation and best practices  



Important

We are not looking for someone who only knows prompts or surface-level ChatGPT use.



We want someone who:

- Truly understands AI agents, automations, APIs, integrations, and business workflows  

- Can think strategically  

- Can explain things clearly  

- Can actually help build and implement  

- Can work hands-on with us and guide setup from start to finish  



Ideal experience

Please apply only if you have real experience with some of the following:

- OpenAI / Claude/ Open Claw 

- AI agents  

- API integrations  

- CRM integrations  

-
 automation  

- Webhooks  

- Zapier / Make / n8n / similar tools  

- Building internal business assistants  

- Knowledge retrieval from business data sources  

- Prompt architecture and workflow design  

- Security / permissions / access control for AI systems

title: SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist – HealthTech Startup (Australia)
description:
Role Overview

We’re an Australian HealthTech Startup looking for a hands-on full-time or part-time SEO Specialist who understands local AU SEO, ranking service-based businesses, and generating qualified inbound leads, not just traffic.

This role is for a hands-on "doer" who can leverage AI tools to assist in scaling execution, analyze results, and continuously improve rankings for high-intent keywords related to medical services.



Details

Work Schedule: Must be available to start at 7:00 AM PH Time.

Job Type: Full-time / Part-time

Budget: TBD (Based on experience)



Key Responsibilities

- Local SEO & GMB: Manage and optimize Google Business Profiles for multiple locations to dominate the Map Pack..



- Content That’s Meant to Rank (and Be Read):

   -- Produce content with no generic, trend-based, or clickbait titles.

   -- No filler or obvious AI-generated content (assistive only).

   -- Content must answer the search properly, be easy to scan, and lead somewhere useful.

   -- Each piece requires: A clear intro, proper headings, internal links, and a CTA that makes sense for the page.



- Image Optimization: Every page and blog needs relevant main images and sub-images (you’ll be assisted by our graphic designer). Ensure proper file names, Alt text, and Metadata. All images must be compressed for speed and must support the content.



- Publishing & Ownership: 

   -- You own uploading content, formatting, and final checks.

   -- Maintain a zero-backlog policy (no “content waiting to go live”).



- On-Page Implementation: Optimize existing website copy, blogs, and landing pages (H1/H2 structures, keyword placements, and URL slugs).

- Technical SEO: Perform audits and implement fixes directly in WordPress, including schema markup and indexing issues.

-  Ad Support: Oversee Meta Ads, Google Ads, and TikTok Ads.





Performance Expectations

- Minimum Output:

- Part-time: 1 post/week PER website

   -- Full-time: 2 posts/week PER website

   -- Note: We currently have 3 active domains

   -- Improve local map pack visibility for all service locations.

- Increase organic leads and inbound phone calls.

- Maintain consistent month-over-month SEO and Ad improvements.



What We’re Looking For

- Proven SEO Experience: Strong understanding of Google ranking factors for service-based businesses.

- Ad Platform Knowledge: Experience managing or assisting with Meta Ads, Google Ads, and TikTok Ads.

- Market Experience: Preferably AU market experience (understanding Australian search intent).

- Technical Skills: Familiar with Ahrefs/SEMrush, GSC, GA4, and WordPress CMS.



Culture Fit 

- Communication: Strong English communication (written and spoken) for reporting, collaboration, and on-page optimization.

- Reliability & Ownership: High level of accountability, a results-focused work ethic, and strong personal responsibility for deliverables.



- Work Style & Culture Fit: We value initiative, ownership, and proactive communication. Tea
mbers take responsibility without needing managers to chase them. Tea
mbers are also expected to:

   -- Take full ownership of tasks and outcomes.

   -- Proactively provide clear updates on progress, blockers, and next steps.

   -- Manage their own workload responsibly.

   -- Communicate early and transparently when support is needed.



How to Apply

- Fill out the application form (remove spaces): https: // forms.gle / BX1QjLcCh2cqG58L8

- Upload your CV/resume inside the form

- Download WhatsApp (if you don’t already have it)

Only candidates who complete the form will be considered.

title: Founding Engineer - React / Node
description:
Founding Engineer (Part-Time ? Full-Time)



Full Stack / DevOps / “Vibe Coder”

Cannabis Tech | POS + Marketplace Platform



We’re not building a concept.

We’re building real infrastructure for licensed dispensaries.



A system that combines point-of-sale, marketplace, and operational intelligence into one clean platform.



We’re an Austin-based company, and we operate fast, focused, and during real working hours.

We’re hiring our first engineer to help bring this to life.



What This Role Actually Is



This isn’t a “join a team” role.

You are the beginning of the team.



You’ll be:



Our first DevOps + engineering hire

Helping define how everything is built, deployed, and scaled

Working directly with founders—fast decisions, zero bureaucracy



Starting at ~20 hours/week, with a clear path to full-time as we launch and grow.



Being early here matters. The people who build the foundation naturally earn more opportunity as things scale.



What You’ll Be Doing



Build and ship across our POS + marketplace platform

Own work across frontend, backend, and infrastructure

Set up and manage AWS environments (end-to-end)

Design and integrate REST APIs and third-party services

Work with AI integrations and model orchestration

Write and manage cloud-based code and services

Take ideas from rough concept ? production-ready features

Help us move fast without breaking what matters



Tech Stack (Must Have Real Experience)

Frontend: React + Tailwind

Backend: Node.js

Mobile: React Native (iOS only)

Cloud & DevOps: AWS (full stack)

Fargate

RDS

Infrastructure + security best practices

Database: PostgreSQL

APIs: REST + third-party integrations

AI / LLMs:

AWS Bedrock

Experience working with models like Claude, Haiku, or similar

Cloud Code:

Experience building and managing cloud-based services (serverless, microservices, or similar architectures)



If you’ve actually built and deployed systems with this stack—not just experimented—we want to talk.



Working Style (Important)

Austin-based company (Central Time)

You must be available Monday through Friday, 8am–5pm CST

This starts part-time (~20 hrs/week), but those hours need to overlap within that window



We move quickly and collaborate in real time—this isn’t an async-only role.



What We’re Looking For

You’ve shipped real products end-to-end

You’re comfortable owning infrastructure, backend, and frontend

You have real experience writing and managing cloud-based code

You’ve worked in a team environment or can clearly operate like a strong independent builder

You understand AWS deeply, especially security and scaling

You can move fast and think clearly

You communicate well and take ownership

You enjoy early-stage environments where things aren’t perfectly defined yet



Bonus if:



You’ve worked with POS systems, marketplaces, or fintech

You’ve built in regulated environments

You’ve integrated AI into real production workflows

What This Is NOT

Not a ticket-taking role

Not a slow-moving team

Not a place where everything is already figured out



If you need heavy structure before you can build, this won’t be a fit.



Compensation:

Hourly to start (part-time)

Scales with responsibility and hours as we grow

Clear path to full-time

Early builders gain meaningful upside as the company expands



How to Apply

Send:

A short intro (keep it real)

Links to things you’ve built or shipped

GitHub or portfolio

Your hourly rate expectation

Anything else that shows you can execute

title: Master Video Editor Wanted (For One Of The World’s Largest YouTube Education Channels)
description:
— WHO WE ARE —



We’re a small group of timeline-hacking, status-quo-bucking, out-of-the-box thinking, digital gangsters breaking out YouTube education content with the passion of a thousand suns :D



On a serious note, we create industry-leading content to help YouTubers grow their channels on the ‘Marcus Jones’ channel 
 









— WHO WE‘RE LOOKING FOR —



We’re looking for remote, experienced YouTube Editors + Animators, who want to be on the cutting-edge of YouTube editing.



Here are the main things we’re looking for in our applicants:



VIDEO EDITING (Required): Obviously, you must be an exceptionally talented video editor from a technical perspective. However, you must also have the passion, creativity, and sense of humor to be able to turn bland, average footage into highly engaging videos that educate AND entertain viewers.



ANIMATION (Required): You must be capable of creating high-quality 2d overlay, titling, and keyframing animations that visually illustrate the concepts we discuss in our videos.



AMBITION: We have a friendly and supportive team culture, but expect to be held to exceptionally high standards because our goal is to become the #1 YouTube Education channel in the world in 2026. So if you hate going hard, dealing with lots of revisions/feedback, or innovating, you won’t fit in here.







— WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU —



Here are just some of the areas where you’ll have the opportunity to learn and grow at our company.



STABLE & SECURE: No more uncertainty from wishy-washy clients. You get a guaranteed monthly paycheck. 



LEADERSHIP OPPORTUNITIES: If you prove yourself, you will likely be presented with senior leadership opportunities down the track.



WORK WITH THE BEST: With us, you get to learn from and work with people who are constantly striving to be the best YouTube editors in the world. We’ve got each other’s backs, but we also hold each other to very high standards.



FLEXIBLE WORK HOURS: You can choose your working hours. However, we expect you to make yourself available for tea
etings (We’re based in Sydney Austraila, and tea
etings are usually in the early afternoon).







— TO APPLY —



If you're interested, please submit the following form (No need for a CV or cover letter. It’s not the 1900s): 







All successful job applications will start with a virtual interview and trial project/s to make sure that we’re the right fit for each other.



Thank you for your consideration and best of luck on your job search!

What you'll be doing:



• Researching and identifying well-aligned creators (micro to macro) on YouTube and
/IG

• Managing ongoing creator relationships, follow-ups, and tracking

• Vetting creators for genuine audience alignment (not just follower count)

• Reporting weekly on outreach volume, response rates, and pipeline status



What we're looking for:



• Prior extensive experience doing influencer outreach specifically for supplement, wellness, or health brands. This is non-negotiable. Please share examples.



• Strong written English. Your outreach
s need to feel like they're coming from someone on our team, not a template blast.



• Good instincts for brand alignment. You should be able to look at a creator's content and audience and know within 60 seconds whether they're a fit.



• Self-starter. We'll give you direction but you need to own the process day to day.



• Someone who is relentless and takes personal responsibility who is consistent, persistent, and loves being part of a fun team.



In your application, please include:



1. 2-3 examples of supplement or wellness brands you've done influencer outreach for and what results looked like



2. Pick 3 YouTube or
 creators you'd pitch our brand to and tell us in one sentence each why they're a good fit (our site is 
)



3. What software or tools you use for influencer discovery and outreach management. If you don't use any, explain your manual process in detail.



4. How many creators can you realistically identify, vet, and do personalized outreach to per week?



This is an ongoing role, not a one-off project. Starting at 20 hrs/week with room to grow to full time.



We have scaled well on Meta and Google ads and now want to really drive hard into Youtube integrations/dedicated videos, IG and FB promos, and maybe X promotions. Not interested in Tiktok.



We want to create a social snowball of authority similar to companies like AG1, Seed, and more.



We want someone who can build this channel the way a strong in-house marketing hire would.

title: Customer Retention Specialist
description:
IMPORTANT REQUIREMENT:

CANDIDATES MUST HAVE PRIOR EXPERIENCE IN RETENTION-FOCUSED POSITIONS SUCH AS CUSTOMER SUCCESS REPRESENTATIVE, RETENTION SPECIALIST, OR ACCOUNT MANAGER.



PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOUR EXPERIENCE IS LIMITED TO GENERAL CUSTOMER SUPPORT ROLES, AS THESE WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.





HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered for this opportunity, please follow the steps below:



• Use “RETENTION” as the subject line of your application

• Submit a short cover letter highlighting your relevant experience

• Include a link to your updated CV/Resume



Note: Applications without a CV/Resume will not be processed





ROLE SUMMARY:

We’re looking for a people-first, proactive Customer Retention Specialist who thrives on building relationships and keeping customers happy long-term.



This is not just a support role — you’ll play a key part in retention, customer satisfaction, and overall experience improvement.



If you enjoy working with customers, solving problems, and making sure customers stay loyal, this role is for you.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

• Build strong relationships with assigned customers and become their trusted point of contact

• Handle customer concerns, questions, and service-related issues

• Proactively check in with customers to ensure satisfaction

• Identify risks early and prevent churn

• Suggest and implement improvements to enhance customer experience

• Work closely with internal teams to resolve issues quickly

• Monitor feedback and identify trends affecting retention

• Assist with onboarding new customers

• Maintain accurate CRM records and updates

• Support renewals and long-term account growth



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

• Strong English communication skills (spoken and written) - MUST

• Experience in Customer Success, Customer Retention, Account Management, or similar Retention-Driven Roles - MUST

• Experience using CRM or support tools - MUST

• Strong relationship-building skills

• Ability to multitask and manage multiple customers

• Problem-solver with strong attention to detail

• Calm and professional under pressure

• Analytical mindset (can understand customer feedback and trends)



WORK SETUP & SCHEDULE:

• Full-time, work-from-home position

• 8 hours per shift, 5 days per week

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Graphic Designer | Job Description



Location: Remote (Philippines)



This is a 100% remote role, offered on a contractor basis. You will work from home, with in-person tea
etups twice a year for collaboration and celebrations. You should be reasonably accessible to Manila for these meetups. You will join a growing and embedded Philippines-based team that plays an important role in the continued expansion of the business.



About Kitto



Kitto is a specialist marketing agency working exclusively within the recruitment industry. We partner with recruitment businesses around the world to help them stand out through strategic, creative marketing. Our services include branding, design, video production, animation, and copywriting.



We operate as a fully remote global team, collaborating across time zones to deliver high-quality creative solutions.



The Role

- We are looking for an experienced Graphic Designer to join our growing creative team.

- You will play a key role in delivering high-quality visual assets across a wide range of client projects, supporting recruitment brands at different stages of growth.



This role suits someone who:

- Is confident working across multiple formats

- Can manage several design tasks at once

- Communicates clearly with account managers and other creatives

- Has strong creative judgement and takes pride in producing thoughtful, considered work

- We are not looking for generic, templated design output. We want someone with a strong eye, clear creative opinions, awareness of trends, and evidence of this in their portfolio.



Key Responsibilities



Design & Creative Delivery

- Create high-quality visual assets across print and digital channels, including social media, presentations, brochures, and branded documents

- Design logos and visual identities in line with client briefs and brand guidelines

- Produce assets for both organic and campaign-based marketing activity

- Ensure all creative work meets brand, quality, and accessibility standards



Collaboration & Communication

- Work closely with account managers and the creative team to understand briefs, objectives, and timelines

- Clearly communicate design concepts and rationale to internal stakeholders

- Participate in feedback and iteration cycles, refining designs based on client and internal input



Brand & Quality Control

- Maintain consistency across all client brand touchpoints

- Apply strong design thinking to solve visual communication challenges

- Manage multiple projects simultaneously, prioritising workloads effectively and flagging capacity issues when required



Core Design Capabilities (Required)



Applicants must be confident creating:

- Social media assets for multiple platforms (including LinkedIn)

- Brochures and professionally designed documents

- A wide range of print and digital assets (e.g. event banners, business cards,
 signatures)

- Microsoft PowerPoint presentations for design use

- Logos and visual identity elements



Additional Experience (Desirable)



Experience in the following areas would be an advantage, but is not required:

- Animation and/or 3D animation

- Photo editing (e.g. headshots, office photography)

- Video editing (e.g. podcasts, social media clips)

- Generative AI tools for image and asset creation

- Newsletters and landing pages

- Brand design and development



If you are developing skills in any of the above, we welcome examples of self-led learning or practical application.



Tools & Platforms



Required

- Adobe Creative Suite (particularly Illustrator, Photoshop, and InDesign)

- Canva

- Microsoft 365 (particularly Word and PowerPoint)



Desirable

- Adobe Premiere Pro

- Adobe After Effects



Skills & Attributes



Required

- Strong understanding of typography, colour theory, layout, and composition

- Strong written and spoken English, demonstrated through qualifications or professional experience

- Clear and confident communication skills

- Excellent time management and organisational ability

- Ability to work in a fast-paced agency environment with multiple concurrent briefs

- Confidence explaining and justifying design decisions to non-design stakeholders



Desirable

- A strong point of view on design and creative direction

- Awareness of current design trends and the ability to apply them appropriately

- Curiosity about new tools and technologies, including generative AI

- Evidence of continued professional development



Experience & Qualifications

- 3–5 years of professional design experience and/or a relevant university degree

- A strong portfolio demonstrating a range of design work is essential. Your portfolio should demonstrate more than basic layout work. We are looking for evidence of concept development, visual judgement, and considered design thinking.



Personality & Fit



We are looking for someone who is:

- Collaborative and team-oriented

- Confident but not ego-driven

- Trustworthy and dependable

- Proactive in communicating workload and challenges

- Motivated to grow with the business as we continue to expand



This is an opportunity to become part of a growing Philippines-based function that is increasingly central to the success of the wider agency.



What We Offer

- Fully remote working

- Structured contractor engagement with paid public holidays, annual leave, and sick leave entitlement

- A collaborative and supportive team environment

- Exposure to a wide variety of global recruitment brands

- Opportunities to develop skills across branding, campaigns, and emerging tools

- Twice-yearly in-person tea
etups

- Mentoring and professional support



Kitto is committed to maintaining fair and transparent holiday and sickness policies that support work/life balance and wellbeing across our global team.
