title: Admin to the Chief Marketing Officer
description:
Join Our Value-Centered Team: Where Passion Meets Purpose!



Application Process:

1.
 us your resume in PDF format only. Include ALL of the jobs you've worked at with Month and Year. Do not leave anything out of your resume. Do not leave anything off.  You must provide an explanation of any gaps in your work history.  Include all compensation for every job, project, etc. Do not give us your hourly pay, only your annual compensation or total compensation.  If there is any gap in your resume without an explanation of the gap, you will be disqualified.

2.
 us a 60-second video of yourself answering the following question:

What are the 3 most important things that the company you work for MUST do to show you that they care about you? For example, if they don’t give me these 3 things then that means they don’t care about me. The video CANNOT EXCEED 60 seconds, or you will automatically be disqualified. Be honest, don’t give us nice to hear words.

3. IMPORTANT: Please
 the above two items to 
 to follow the above instructions will result in automatic termination for further interview process.



Company: Achieve Integrative Health, No. 1 Acupuncture Clinic in Cedar Park and Austin surrounding areas

Website: 
/



About the Company:

Join Achieve Integrative Health, Austin, TX's premier acupuncture clinic, and be part of a transformative healthcare journey. For over 18 years, we've championed health restoration, empowering thousands to reclaim their energy, vitality, and joy. Our success stems from a unique blend of Traditional Chinese Medicine and advanced technologies.



At Achieve Integrative Health, we're not just about healthcare; we're about life-changing care. Join us to deliver unparalleled service and results, reshaping healthcare one patient at a time. Let's make lives great again, together!



Let's build the future together! Your skills, combined with our vision and aligned with our values, will pave the path for a brighter tomorrow.



Why Join Us?

• Transform Lives: We're not just another company. At Achieve Integrative Health, WE MAKE a real difference by bringing joy and health back into lives with every interaction.

• Unbounded Growth: There is no limit to your growth with our company. We're on a mission to grow, with plans to expand our healing touch in Austin, Texas and its surrounding areas.

• Empowerment Team Culture: We are known for our team culture because we make it our mission to help our tea
mbers achieve their professional, financial, and personal goals. 



We're Seeking Individuals Who Are Aligned with Our Core Values...

• Service Above Self: You have a CARING heart and a HUMBLE attitude to put patients’ needs before yours.

• Commitment: You are persistent and disciplined in reaching your OWN goals that are demonstrated by your consistent performance and growth.

• Accountable: No excuses allowed. You are responsible for everything that happens to you and everything that doesn’t happen to you. You are responsible for everything that you have and everything that you don’t have.

• Results Oriented: While we acknowledge your effort, you are only rewarded when producing results that are measured via the statistics for your positions and for the company.

• Transparency: You maintain and practice clear, honest, and direct communication about your thoughts and intentions with every tea
mber and every patient.

• Inspirational: You lead by example to inspire our patients to live a healthy lifestyle by living a healthy lifestyle yourself and you lead by example to inspire each tea
mber by constantly striving to reach your own potential.



WHAT WE OFFER:

• Competitive total Compensation: Base salary + performance bonuses in the acupuncture industry that rewards you based on the RESULTS you produce. If you are looking for a guaranteed salary w/o being accountable to meeting KPIs, this is not the team for you.

* A team and environment that is collaborative, accountable, caring, supportive, honest, transparent, as we remove all employees who talk behind peoples back and lack integrity

• Learning & Growth Opportunities: Access a wealth of resources to keep sharpening your mindset, communication, and customer service skills.

• Wellness Initiatives: Benefit from complimentary virtual health services, ensuring your well-being is always a priority.

• Work from Home: Be able to build a career working from home, no more 3-4 hour commutes to work.

• Other Benefits: Paid-Time off and medical insurance for qualified tea
mbers after successfully completing the 90-day training period.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

* assist the Chief Marketing Officer in reviewing
s, marketing material, uploading videos onto social media

* use Editing Apps that integrate AI (ie. CapCut, Canva, ChatGPT) to generate thumbnails, images, reels

* organize all of our marketing tasks and make sure all tasks are executed in a timely manner w/ excellence

* respond to social media comments

* create newsletters

* track All marketing stats

* Transcribe videos into
s and blogs

* vitally important = be able to follow the CMO's instructions

* and additional admin tasks



CHARACTER REQUIREMENTS & QUALIFICATIONS

• You must truly have a caring heart and truly want to help people improve their health, if you are mainly focused on how much money you can make, we are not the team for you

• You must be organized and be able to handle multiple tasks and responsibilities everyday. If you’re looking to only do one or two tasks per day, we are the wrong team for you.

• You must be able to follow instructions exactly as written, if you don’t like reading or following instructions, we are not the right team for you

• You must value Results over effort. If you like to be paid based on how many tasks you completed or how much responsibilities you have, we are not the team for you. We pay ONLY based on you meeting your KPIs, metrics, quotas.

• You must sleep the same schedule 7 days a week. Your Health is our priority, and if you don’t value your own health we don’t want you on our team.

• You must be honest and have integrity. If you are caught lying, you will be immediately terminated.

• You must want to EARN your pay (ie. base salary + bonuses) instead of being given a pay (ie. focused only on base salary) that you didn’t earn.



Computer/Laptop/Internet Requirements:

• Fast and reliable wired internet connection of not less than 10 Mbps

• Secondary and Tertiary Back up Internet

• Intel Core i5 or higher Operating System with at least 8gb RAM

• Excellent quality headset with microphone, and a working webcam

• Quiet, private home office free from noise background or distractions



WORK HOURS

* Option Full-time =  40 hours per week, work schedule is based on your time zone and must be consistent work hours, you cannot work whenever you want.

* Option PART-TIME = Part-time 20 hours/wk, in your timezone, but assignments/projects/tasks must be completed by 6am CST everyday M-F 

* BOTH must attend our morning marketing huddle mon-fri 8:09am CST - 8:45am cst





COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS:

* be able to build a career working from home, no more 3-4 hour commutes to work

* monthly salary for full-time

* pay is based on your ability to produce measurable results and not experience

* the more Qualified Leads you help our clinic generate the higher your compensation

* we offer lucrative performance based bonuses that are paid monthly

* Paid Time Off, Paid Holidays for qualified tea
mbers

* Medical Insurance for qualified tea
mbers

* The biggest Benefit of joining our team is we help our tea
mbers achieve their Personal, Professional and Financial Goals. When was the last time you joined a company that invested resources to help you achieve YOUR professional, financial and personal goals? We could be your first.

title: Influencer Marketing Manager (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
About Us



We're a growing influencer marketing agency that connects brands with content creators for sponsored partnerships. We work across multiple platforms and verticals, managing the full lifecycle — from influencer discovery and outreach to deal negotiation and campaign delivery.





The Role



We're looking for a sharp, organized Influencer Marketing Manager to help us scale operations. You'll be responsible for finding the right creators, managing outreach, coordinating between brands and influencers, and making sure campaigns run smoothly from start to finish.





What You'll Do



- Research and identify creators across platforms (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, podcasts, etc.) that match specific brand/client briefs — niche, audience size, engagement, and content style

- Manage cold outreach to influencers via
 — writing personalized messages, following up, and negotiating rates

- Maintain and update our CRM with influencer data, deal status, and communication history

- Coordinate campaign timelines between brands and creators (briefs, drafts, revisions, publishing dates)

- Track deliverables and ensure creators hit deadlines and content requirements

- Pull basic performance data post-campaign (views, engagement, clicks) and compile into simple reports

- Communicate with clients to provide updates, manage expectations, and flag issues early

- Help build and organize influencer lists and databases across platforms for future outreach





Who You Are



- 1-3+ years of experience in influencer marketing, talent management, or a related agency/coordinator role

- You understand how creator sponsorships work across major platforms — integrations, dedicated posts, stories, reels, long-form video, podcast mentions, etc.

- Strong written communicator in English (you'll be writing outreach
s and client updates daily)

- Highly organized and can manage multiple campaigns and creator relationships at once without dropping balls

- Comfortable using tools like Google Sheets, CRMs (e.g., GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar), and
 platforms

- Proactive — you flag problems early and suggest solutions instead of waiting to be told what to do

- Can work independently with minimal supervision in a fast-paced, small-team environment





Nice to Have



- Experience with cold
 outreach tools or sequences

- Familiarity with influencer discovery platforms (e.g., Modash, CreatorIQ, or manual research methods)

- Basic understanding of media buying or paid social

- Experience working with North American clients or brands



Schedule and Compensation:



- Full-time (40 hrs/week), flexible schedule with some overlap with North American business hours (EST)

- Compensation: [insert rate]

- Long-term role with room to grow into a senior/team lead position.

title: Ads manager
description:
AI-Powered Ads Manager — Virtual Assistant

Full-Time | Remote | $600–$950/mo USD

Texas Estate Construction LLC & Green Century Services, Inc. | Houston, TX



WHO WE ARE

Two fast-growing Houston-based construction companies scaling hard toward $1M+: Texas Estate Construction LLC (TEC) — residential and commercial general contracting — and Green Century Services, Inc. (GCS) — landscaping construction. We run lean, we move fast, and we only hire people who take ownership. If you need babysitting, keep scrolling.



THE ROLE

We need a results-obsessed Ads Manager VA who lives inside Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads daily. Your job is simple to define and hard to execute: bring in qualified leads for construction and landscaping projects in the Houston, TX market at a cost we can scale. You will own ad strategy, creative testing, budget optimization, and weekly reporting. You report directly to the CEO. Your performance is measured in leads and cost-per-lead — nothing else.

This is not a "boost posts" job. This is not a "set it and forget it" job. If you are not checking campaigns daily and making decisions based on data, you are not the right person.



YOUR CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



Build, launch, and manage paid ad campaigns on Meta 
/Instagram) and Google (Search, LSA, Display) targeting Houston-area homeowners and commercial property managers

Own the full funnel: ad creative direction, copy, audience targeting, landing page alignment, and lead follow-up handoff to GHL

Run structured A/B tests on creative, copy, and audiences — document what works and what does not, and act on it fast

Manage daily budgets and bids — scale what converts, kill what does not, no emotional attachment to ads that are not performing

Maintain clean campaign structure: proper naming conventions, UTM tagging, conversion tracking, and pixel/tag setup

Connect ad leads directly into GoHighLevel (GHL) pipeline — ensure every lead hits the CRM instantly and triggers the right automation

Produce weekly performance reports with the numbers that matter: spend, impressions, clicks, CPL, conversion rate, booked jobs. No vanity metrics.

Stay current on Meta and Google algorithm changes, creative trends, and what is working in the home services/construction space specifically

Proactively flag budget waste, audience fatigue, and creative burnout before they tank performance





WHAT YOU MUST KNOW — NON-NEGOTIABLE

Do not apply if you do not have real, proven experience with ALL of the following:



Meta Business Suite / Ads Manager — campaign build, audience creation (custom, lookalike, interest), creative testing, pixel events, CAPI setup

Google Ads — Search campaigns, Local Services Ads (LSA), conversion tracking via Google Tag Manager

Conversion tracking — pixel events, GTM, GA4 integration. If you cannot set up a lead event from scratch, do not apply.

GoHighLevel (GHL) — you must know how to connect ad leads into GHL pipelines. Bonus if you can build the automation on your end too.

Basic Canva or Adobe — enough to resize, adapt, or direct ad creatives without waiting on a designer for every iteration

Google Sheets / Data Studio / Looker Studio — for building and maintaining performance dashboards

Excellent written English — you will write ad copy. It must be punchy, local, and conversion-focused.





NICE TO HAVE



Experience running ads specifically for construction, home services, roofing, landscaping, or trades

Familiarity with Local Services Ads (LSA) and Google Guarantee badge process

Experience with reputation management (Google reviews, GMB) as part of a local lead gen strategy

Knowledge of retargeting strategies for longer sales cycles (construction projects are not impulse buys)

Experience with video ad editing or direction for short-form creative (Reels, YouTube pre-roll)



HOW TO APPLY — READ THIS IN FULL

Generic applications get deleted. You must include ALL of the following:



A Loom video (2–4 minutes) walking us through a real ad campaign you managed — show us inside Ads Manager. Show us results. CPL, spend, leads generated. If you cannot show real numbers, show us your campaign structure and explain your decisions. Live screen share only, no slideshows.

A written answer to this question: A Meta campaign for a Houston landscaping company has been running for 14 days. Spend is $400. CPL is $180. The client's target CPL is $75. What do you look at first and what do you change?

Your resume listing every ad platform, tool, and niche you have worked in — be specific.

Start your message with the words: LEADS NOT LIKES — so we know you read every word of this.

title: Creative Strategist & Content Producer
description:
About the company

At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health & improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain & discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain & distress others have to endure.

Job description

We're looking for a Creative Strategist & Content Producer to shape how our health & pharmaceutical brands communicate across both digital & offline channels. You'll craft effective strategies that translate scientific credibility into compelling storytelling & creative assets - helping us engage our diverse audience as we expand our presence regionally. 



The Creative Strategist & Content Producer will be the visionary link between our brand identity, compelling content creation & drive measurable performance across all key channels. This role is responsible for developing & testing high-impact creative strategies as well as producing content assets (visual, video, copy) internally, specifically designed to drive traffic, increase conversion rates, lower Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) & drive overall revenue growth for our Shopify, Shopee & Lazada stores via social media as well as paid advertising platforms.



You'll work across multiple channels & markets to plan, create & optimize content that builds awareness, strengthens partnerships & supports the new channels of the business. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys balancing creativity, analytics & brand strategy in the health supplement industry. 



Key Responsibilities:

Creative Strategy

- Platform & Channel Strategy: Craft tailored creative strategies for B2C & B2B audiences optimized for platform-specific best practices & formats that align with brand goals & regulatory requirements in each market (e.g., Meta carousel ads, vertical video for TikTok/Reels, static product carousels for Shopee/Lazada e-commerce banner ads).

- Hypothesis Generation & A/B Testing: Develop robust creative testing matrices, formulate clear hypotheses for creative elements (hooks, calls-to-action, visual styles, copy length) that drive measurable improvements in Click-Through Rate (CTR) & Conversion Rate (CVR).

- Audience Segmentation: Translate target audience data & segmentation provided by media buyers into resonant creative themes, ensuring content speaks directly to different stages of the marketing funnel (awareness, consideration, conversion).

- Competitive Analysis: Continuously keep up to date with competitors & industry trends, identifying new & successful creative formats, hooks & messaging to finetune our strategy.

In-House Content Production & Execution 

- Performance Creative Development: Lead the end-to-end creative concept development & production for all organic & paid media campaigns (Meta, TikTok, Google/YouTube, etc.) that align with brand & campaign goals, focusing on high-volume, quick-turnaround testing required for performance marketing.

- Hands-on Asset Creation: Directly produce & edit native social content & performance ads using existing assets, stock libraries & internal resources. This includes:

i. Plan platform-specific content calendars: Cover educational, promotional & corporate communications

ii. Static/Image Editing: Adapt product photography, create ad variations & design simple graphics & banner ads

iii. Video Editing: Fast-paced assembly, cutting, adding text overlays, music & effects for short-form, vertical video (UGC-style, product demos, testimonials)

- Copywriting: Develop high-converting ad copy, landing page headlines & social media captions that align with the creative strategy & brand voice, with a focus on clear value propositions & strong CTAs.

- Asset Management: Ensure all campaign assets are correctly tagged, archived & deployed across relevant channels (Shopify, Shopee, Lazada store fronts & advertising platforms).

- Testing & Optimization: apply insights & analytics to refine & optimize content effectiveness across platforms.

Performance & Reporting

- Data-Driven Insights: Work closely with the Marketing Manager to analyze creative performance reports, identifying which creative variables are driving results (or failing) across Shopify, Shopee & Lazada traffic.

- Iteration & Optimization: 

i. Develop, adapt or review content & formats to improve engagement & performance

ii. Use performance data (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CVR) to rapidly iterate on existing creative assets & inform future strategy, ensuring a continuous cycle of improvement & optimization

Storefront Integration: Integrate winning creative messages & visuals onto the respective e-commerce storefronts (product pages, banners) to ensure a cohesive customer journey.

Multi-Channel Storytelling

- Content cohesion: Ensure content is aligned where possible across digital & print media, including LinkedIn, Instagram,
, YouTube, e-commerce platforms, brochures & trade materials.

- Tailor content: To achieve relevance & effectiveness across different stages of the audience journey — from brand awareness & education to conversion.

- Storytelling & visual consistency: To strengthen brand trust & recognition.

Compliance & Brand Integrity

- Uphold regulatory & ethical communication standards across all marketing activities.

- Ensure all content complies with regulatory guidelines & marketing requirements in each country we operate in, including product claims, advertising language & digital promotions.

- Maintain brand credibility by ensuring all communications are factual & aligned with company values.

- Collaborate with internal teams to review materials for accuracy, effectiveness & compliance before publication.



Requirements:

- 3–5 years of experience in creative strategy, content creation, social media, or brand marketing — ideally in health supplements, healthcare or wellness.

- Strong understanding of social media trends & platform best practices (Meta (FB/IG), LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Google, Generative AI).

- Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro), CapCut, Canva, Figma, or similar tools.

- Excellent writing, editing & visual storytelling skills — adopt a strategic approach to design that integrates marketing & commercial goals.

- Excellent communication, project management & cross-functional collaboration skills.

- Familiarity with regulatory communication standards or track record in health supplements or healthcare industry is a plus.



Please send your applications to

title: Brand & Content Designer (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Job description



At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health and improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain and discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain and distress others have to endure.



We’re seeking a full-time Brand and Content Designer to lead the creative direction of our brand across packaging, offline marketing, and digital platforms. This role is ideal for a strategic, hands-on creative who can own both design and content production, from ideation to execution, while supporting our expansion across Southeast Asia and global markets.



As a key member of the team, you'll be responsible for producing compelling visuals and content that reflect the heart of our brand and connect meaningfully with consumers, healthcare professionals, and distribution partners.



Key Responsibilities:



-Brand Development & Creative Direction-

*Lead development of visual identity for new and existing brands, including logos, packaging, brand guidelines, typography and brand story

*Propose and implement creative directions from Pantone color palettes to iconography, font systems and photography guidelines

*Establish and maintain consistent branding across all physical and digital touchpoints, while ensuring all brand assets are stored and updated in an organized, easily accessible database



-Graphic & Marketing Design-

*Design high-impact materials such as product packaging, brochures, point-of-sale displays, in-store visuals and Continuing Medical Education (CME) event collaterals

*Develop pitch decks, sales presentations and brand kits for internal and external stakeholders

*Create visuals for promotions, campaigns, and trade shows for greater awareness and conversion



-Content Creation & Copywriting-

*Collaborate with the team to develop content ideas and messaging for various platforms (digital ads, social media, web,
)

*Write and edit marketing copy as needed, including taglines, brand messaging, product descriptions, and promotional materials

*Contribute to storytelling, campaign ideation, consumer education initiatives, and customer loyalty initiatives



-Digital & Multimedia Content-

*Produce digital assets for ecommerce platforms, social media ads, newsletters, and display ads (Google Ads Meta, TikTok)

*Edit videos and animations for campaigns, tutorials, events, and educational content using tools like CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects

*Repurpose content across multiple formats and languages when applicable



-Cross-Functional Collaboration-

*Work closely with marketing, sales, pharmacists and leadership to turn strategic goals into compelling creative output

*Participate in product launch discussions and brand development brainstorming sessions

*Coordinate with external freelancers or vendors as needed



-Regional Support & Market Expansion-

*Adapt assets for regional markets including Singapore, Malaysia, Mainland China & Hong Kong and future expansion areas

*Ensure consistency across regions while accounting for local cultural, language, market and regulatory differences



-Requirements-

*Minimum 3–5 years of experience in graphic design, brand development, content creation, or multimedia production

*Strong portfolio showcasing design, branding, and content/copywriting capabilities across print and digital

*Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro), CapCut, Canva, Figma, or similar tools

*Excellent understanding of branding, packaging, digital marketing, and customer communication

*Creative thinker with strong attention to detail and an eye for aesthetic balance

*Highly organized, self-driven, and able to manage multiple timelines in a fast-paced environment

*Strong communication and collaboration skills, especially in remote work settings

*Experience in the health, wellness, pharmaceutical, or consumer goods sector is a plus

*Degree in Design, Marketing, Communications, or a related field preferred but not mandatory



Kindly submit your updated CV and sample portfolio to 
 for our review.

title: Sales Representative
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW:

We are iSellForYou, an international affiliate network and e-commerce company specializing in Skincare and Nutra products. As we expand our operations, we’re building a new remote call center team of agents and are looking for a skilled and motivated Sales Representative to join our growing team.





JOB DESCRIPTION:

We are looking for a skilled and customer-oriented Sales Representative to handle inbound/outbound calls and provide excellent service to our customers. The ideal candidate will identify opportunities to upsell or recommend additional products and services. This role requires strong communication, product knowledge, and a proactive approach to achieving sales targets while maintaining high customer satisfaction.





DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES:

• Meet or exceed individual and team sales goals while maintaining quality service standards.

• Stay updated on product knowledge, promotions, and company policies to provide accurate information.

• Maintain detailed call logs and documentation in the company’s CRM system.

• Previous sales or customer service experience (minimum 1 year)

• Clear communication skills

• Tech-savvy (will use CRM, dialer, multiple tools)







QUALIFICATIONS:

• Experience in a call center, customer service, or sales role required (at least 6 months)

• B2B sales background and ecommerce industry experience preferred.

• Excellent verbal communication and listening skills.

• Persuasive and confident in promoting products and services.

• Ability to multitask, handle pressure, and meet sales targets.

• Basic computer skills and familiarity with CRM or call management software (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.)

• Willing to work flexible shifts, including weekends or holidays if needed.

title: IVR/TECH SPECIALIST
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW:

We are Offersify, an international affiliate network and e-commerce company specializing in Skincare and Nutra products. As we expand our operations, we are looking for someone who possesses strong technical troubleshooting skills, attention to detail, and a proactive approach to improving system performance and user experience.



JOB OVERVIEW:

The IVR (Interactive Voice Response) / Tech Specialist is responsible for the setup, configuration, maintenance, and optimization of the company’s IVR systems and related technical platforms. This role ensures smooth call flow management, technical functionality, and system integrations that support the efficiency of client and internal communications.

The ideal candidate possesses strong technical troubleshooting skills, attention to detail, and a proactive approach to improving system performance and user experience.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Configure, monitor, and maintain IVR systems and related telephony software.

 • Manage call routing, menus, prompts, and workflows to ensure efficient caller navigation.

 • Support system integrations with CRM, AI tools, and communication platforms.

 • Troubleshoot and resolve IVR or telephony-related issues promptly.

 • Collaborate with the IT and Operations teams to enhance automation and call-handling efficiency.

 • Ensure compliance with data security and privacy protocols in all technical operations.

 • Provide technical documentation, reports, and recommendations for process improvements.

 • Assist with technical onboarding and training for new system users or agents.

 • Coordinate with vendors or third-party service providers for system updates and maintenance.



Qualifications:

 • Minimum of 2 years of experience in IVR configuration, telephony systems, or related technical roles.

 • Proficiency in VoIP technologies, PBX systems, and cloud-based communication tools.

 • Familiarity with HubSpot, Twilio, Aircall, or similar platforms is a plus.

 • Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills.

 • Experience with telephone systems, API integration, rapid troubleshooting

 • High attention to detail, organization, and time management.

 • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.



HOW TO APPLY:

title: Record Label Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC is an independent record label dedicated to producing high-quality urban music focused on health, personal relationships, financial literacy, peak performance, bodybuilding, meditation, and spirituality. Founded by Wilmarck, our music merges influences from Kanye West and Drake with motivational themes inspired by Tony Robbins. With over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers, we aim to inspire and uplift through our music.



Position: Music Manager



We are looking for a music manager responsible for:

- Pitching proposals to songwriting job boards

- Keeping our books and managing contracts

- Driving success by boosting profits and hitting sales targets

- Leading and inspiring the team to deliver stellar performance

- Recruiting, hiring, and guiding contractors

- Managing operations, scheduling, and compliance

- Creating memorable customer experiences

- Onboarding and training new hires

- Communicating seamlessly with stakeholders

- Working 45-50 hours/week, including evenings, weekends, and holidays

- Lifting up to 25 pounds when needed



Disclaimer: Prospects will respond outside of scheduled hours. There will be an established 8-hour window where you’ll be expected to respond within an hour. Ex. Your schedule hours will be 6:30 PM -3:00 AM EST (From 3-11 PM EST if a prospect responds to a proposal, you’ll be expected to respond. Each response should take 5-15 mins. You can expect 3-5 responses per week. The additional hours may be deducted from your regular schedule if it exceeds 50 hours.



Contract Details

- Hourly Rate: $2.81/hr USD + 10%-15% of revenue

- Monthly Compensation: $505-$900 + commission

- Initial Hours: 10 hours/week, increasing to 45 hours/week over 45 days

- Training: Paid training provided

- Raises: Based on work performance



Hiring Process

This is an audition-based hiring process. We will select 3-5 candidates for a paid audition. After reviewing your work, we'll choose one full-time hire.

- Interview: To assess mutual fit

- Notification: Candidates will be contacted within 48 hours regarding audition status

- Video Chat: For day 1 of the audition



Responsibilities

Immediate Focus:

- Pitching to Songwriting Job Boards

- Album Launch Tasks

- Bookkeeping

- Onboarding & Interviewing Staff

- Explaining service and product prices

- Answering customer inquiries

- Obtaining customer information for shipping/services

- Managing our production team

- Communicating with tea
mbers/leaders

- Hitting monthly revenue goals



Future Responsibilities (If Qualified):

- Leading meetings

- Managing teams

- Reporting analytics

- Servicing customers



Skills and Qualifications

Essential:

- Persistence and determination

- Proposal writing skills

- Time management

- Product knowledge

- Customer service proficiency

- Strong English speaking/writing skills

- Reliable internet connection



Ideal Candidate Qualities

- Flexible and eager to learn

- High integrity and commitment

- Relentless execution

- Ability to work independently

- Competitive spirit

- Receptive to constructive criticism

- Effective communication skills



Benefits

 

Music Manager Incentive Program

The program motivates music managers to achieve monthly revenue goals, fostering a productive environment.



Eligibility: Current management team as of Jan 12, 2025

New hires must be with Pex Life Records for 6 months to qualify

Monthly Revenue Goals and Benefits:

- At $1,200 Minimum:

  - Guaranteed Pay: $675 Minimum

  - Commission: 10% on qualifying sales

  - Additional Benefits: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement



- At $2,400 Minimum:

  - Guaranteed Pay: $900 Minimum

  - Commission: 15% on qualifying sales

  - Additional Benefits: Social Security System Reimbursement, Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit                    Sharing

- Contractual Availability

- Flexible Scheduling: Choose your working days/hours

- Job Sharing: Train others to complete your tasks

- Revenue Lock-In Structure

- Contractual lock-in for pay based on hitting revenue goals over 2-12 months.

- Compensation

Monthly Salary: $505 USD (ifgoal isn't attained)

Start Date: 2 weeks after the interview (if selected)

Long-term Position: 32-40 hours/week

Available Hours: Sunday-Thursday 6:30 PM EST - 3:00 AM EST

Work Location: Remote



Only one position is available; apply now!



Application Instructions

In your proposal, please start with "purple elephant" to confirm you've read this job description. Include components of sales management such as writing proposals to acquire clients, appointment setting, and performing introductory calls to close clients. If we'd like to move forward, we'll send you a screening exercise followed by an interview invite if you pass.

mbers/leaders

title: Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC: Our Vision for Transformative Music



Pex Life Records is an independent label where urban music meets personal development. Founded by Wilmarck, we create high-quality tracks that resonate with the motivation of Tony Robbins, blended with the commercial sound of artists like Kanye West and Drake. Our music is purpose-driven, focusing on critical life areas: health, financial literacy, peak performance, and spirituality.



You will be joining a brand with a strong, engaged audience of over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers. Your work will directly contribute to inspiring and uplifting thousands through music.-----The Role: Drive Revenue, Build a Team, Shape a Brand



We are seeking a highly motivated Music Manager to lead our sales, operations, and team development. This is a pivotal role for a professional ready to commit to a 45-50 hour/week position that offers substantial commission potential and a clear path to high earnings.



Key Areas of Impact:

Sales & Business Development: Lead client acquisition by pitching proposals to songwriting job boards and driving profits to achieve ambitious sales targets.

Team Leadership: Recruit, hire, train, and inspire contractors and staff to ensure stellar performance and successful new releases.

Operations & Finance: Manage contracts, maintain essential financial records (bookkeeping), and ensure compliance and seamless communication across all stakeholders.

Customer Experience: Be the face of the company, creating memorable customer experiences, explaining product/service prices, and handling key inquiries.



Compensation & Uncapped Earning Potential



This is a performance-driven role with a clear path to significant monthly income through our incentive program.

Base & Growth: The hourly rate starts at $2.81 USD plus commission. The initial 10 hours/week commitment quickly scales up to 45 hours/week within 45 days, allowing for a rapid increase in base earnings.

Monthly Compensation Range: $505–$900 Guaranteed Base + Generous Commission.



Compensation Structure by Target Revenue Goal:

Achieve $1,200 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $675 Minimum. Commission Rate: 10% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement.

Achieve $2,400 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $900 Minimum. Commission Rate: 15% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: Social Security System & Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing.



Flexibility and Structure:



100% Remote Position: Work from anywhere.

Core Availability: Sunday–Thursday, 6:30 PM EST – 3:00 AM EST.

Work/Life Balance: We offer Flexible Scheduling (choose your working days/hours) and Job Sharing options.

Prospect Response Disclaimer: Maintain key client relationships by being available for 3-5 quick, 5–15 minute responses per week within a designated 8-hour window (e.g., 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST).



What We're Looking For (Skills & Qualities)



We need a relentless executor with an independent spirit and high integrity.

Essential: Superior proposal writing, persistence, time management, and strong English speaking/writing skills.

Ideal Candidate: Flexible, eager to learn, competitive, and receptive to constructive criticism.



Your Path to Full-Time: The Paid Audition



We skip the traditional hiring steps and go straight to evaluating your work. The process is designed to be fair, fast, and merit-based:

1 Submit your proposal.

2 Pass a screening exercise.

3 Participate in an interview.

4 Top candidates are selected for a paid audition to ensure a mutual fit before a full-time offer is extended.

If you are ready to be a crucial leader in a high-growth, mission-driven music company, apply now!



Application Instructions:



Demonstrate your expertise in sales management (client acquisition, appointment setting, and closing calls) in your proposal. To ensure you've read these details, please begin your proposal with the phrase "purple elephant."

title: Youtube Video Editor for Marketing Edutainment Channel
description:
I run a marketing-focused YouTube channel where I talk directly to camera about marketing strategy, AI, branding, and business growth. I'm looking for a skilled video editor who can turn my raw talking-head footage into polished, engaging, high-retention videos, the kind that educate and entertain at the same time.



This is not a "just cut out the pauses" role. I need an editor who can bring energy to the footage through motion graphics, on-screen text, B-roll inserts, data callouts, and smart pacing. Think edutainment, not lecture.

Reference Channels (Please Watch Before Applying)



Study these three channels closely, they represent the editing style I'm going for:

- Wes McDowell, 
 (clean talking-head editing with smooth B-roll inserts, branded graphics, and a professional but approachable feel)

- Adam Erhart, 
 (high energy, quick cuts, bold on-screen text, strong transitions, motion graphics that reinforce key points)

- Exposure Ninja, 
 (excellent use of charts, data visualizations, screen recordings, animated diagrams, and B-roll to keep viewers engaged through educational content)



What all three have in common (and what I want): talking-head footage brought to life with kinetic text, motion graphics, relevant B-roll/screenshots, data callouts when stats are mentioned, clear section transitions, and pacing that holds attention without feeling frantic.



What You'll Be Doing

- Editing 6-12 minute talking-head YouTube videos (raw footage provided)

- Adding on-screen text and kinetic typography to reinforce key points

- Creating or sourcing relevant B-roll, screenshots, and visual inserts when I reference people, brands, platforms, or data

- Designing simple motion graphics (charts, diagrams, stat callouts)

- Adding background music, sound design, and audio normalization

- Clean jump cuts to maintain energy and remove dead air

- Applying light color grading (warm, natural, not cinematic or flat)

- Flagging thumbnail-worthy frames from the footage

- Delivering 1–2 videos per week (volume may grow)



Required Skills

- Proficient in FinalCut 

- After Effects (or equivalent) for motion graphics and text animations

- Strong understanding of YouTube retention editing, you know why viewers click away and how to prevent it

- Ability to match an editing style from reference videos

- Good eye for typography, layout, and visual hierarchy

- Reliable internet and ability to handle large video files



Nice to Have

- Experience editing marketing or business YouTube content

- Thumbnail design skills (Photoshop/Canva)

- Familiarity with Canva, Descript, or CapCut as supplementary tools

- Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, descriptions, chapters)



What I'm NOT Looking For

- Generic "cut the pauses" editing with no visual flair

- Overly cinematic or movie-trailer style editing

- Heavy use of stock footage or AI-generated visuals

- Trendy editing gimmicks (subway surfers splits, excessive 
 inserts)



How to Apply

Please include in your application:

1. A link to your portfolio or 2–3 YouTube videos you've edited (marketing/business content preferred)

2. Watch one video from each of the three reference channels above and tell me in 2–3 sentences what you notice about their editing style

3. Your rate (per video or monthly) and availability

4. A short Loom video (1–2 min) introducing yourself and why you'd be a good fit



Start your message with the word "EDUTAINMENT" so I know you read the full posting.



Compensation: Open to discussion based on experience. Looking for a long-term partnership, not a one-off gig. Part-time to start with potential to grow.

title: AI Content Writer for NY Digital Marketing Agency  Remote | Philippines | Must Work USA EST Hours
description:
New York-based digital marketing agency looking for an AI-savvy Content Writer and Marketing Assistant who can work during USA Eastern Time business hours.



We work with clients in:



Home improvement

Medical and aesthetic

Hospitality and events

Local service businesses



We need someone who can use AI tools intelligently, not lazily.



That means you know how to turn rough ideas into strong content, use AI to speed up research and drafting, and then refine everything so it sounds natural, strategic, and conversion-focused.



This role is for someone who understands that good marketing content is not just writing. It is about clarity, trust, structure, SEO, and lead generation.



What You Will Be Doing



Writing and editing website pages, service pages, blog posts, landing pages,
 campaigns, social captions, ad copy, and marketing content



Using tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Grammarly, and similar tools to assist with outlining, rewriting, content development, and research



Turning voice notes, rough drafts, bullet points, and client input into polished marketing content



Writing SEO-friendly content for local businesses in industries like home services, healthcare, aesthetics, and hospitality



Reviewing AI-generated content and improving it so it feels human, clear, persuasive, and brand-appropriate



Proofreading, fact-checking, and tightening copy before it is delivered



Helping organize content files, revisions, and production workflows



Collaborating with our internal team during USA EST hours



Who We Are Looking For



You write excellent English



You are comfortable using AI tools every day



You know how to prompt well and improve weak output



You can write in different tones depending on the client and industry



You understand marketing and are not just a generic article writer



You are dependable, organized, responsive, and can meet deadlines



You are comfortable working during Eastern USA time hours



Required Skills



Strong written English



Experience in content writing, copywriting, SEO writing, or digital marketing



Practical experience using AI tools for content creation and workflow support



Ability to write website copy, blogs, social content, and
 marketing content



Ability to self-edit and improve clarity, grammar, structure, and marketing effectiveness



Strong attention to detail



Reliable internet and work setup



Availability during EST working hours



Preferred Experience



Writing for home improvement businesses such as plumbing, HVAC, roofing, remodeling, or electrical



Writing for medical, med spa, dental, dermatology, or concierge medicine brands



Writing for hospitality businesses such as hotels, venues, restaurants, or events



Basic understanding of local SEO, keyword structure, headings, title tags, and search intent



Experience with WordPress, Google Docs, ClickUp, Basecamp, Trello, or similar systems



Important



This is not for people who simply copy and paste AI output.



We are looking for someone who can use AI as a competitive advantage while still applying human thinking, editing, structure, quality control, and marketing judgment.



If your content sounds robotic, repetitive, vague, or generic, you will not succeed in this role.



Schedule



You must be able to work during USA EST hours.



Please do not apply if you are only available for a few random overlap hours. We need someone dependable during our core workday.



Compensation



Please include your expected monthly salary or hourly rate based on your experience.



How To Apply



Please send:



Your resume



A short paragraph about your experience



Three relevant writing samples



A list of AI tools you use regularly



Your available working hours in EST



Your expected salary



In the first line of your application, write: Ready for EST Content Excellence



Also, include the word Buffalo somewhere naturally in your application so we know you read the full job post carefully.

title: Paid Ads Specialist (Google & Meta)
description:
Paid Ads Specialist (GooJob Title: Performance Marketing Manager

 Location: Remote

 Job Type: Full-time

About Wandering Lion

Wandering Lion is a strategy-led growth studio helping founder-led businesses build premium brands, install scalable growth systems, and generate measurable commercial outcomes — without chaos. We do not sell marketing activity for the sake of it. We build structured growth systems that connect brand, performance, systems, and reporting to real business results.

Our model is disciplined: foundation first, then build, then scale. That means we care deeply about clarity, accountability, and making sure paid media works inside a stronger commercial system — not in isolation.

The Role

We are looking for a commercially sharp Performance Marketing Manager to lead campaign execution, optimisation, and channel development across Google Ads, Meta Ads, and other current or emerging paid acquisition platforms.

This role is not limited to today’s core channels. As the business grows, this position may also support expansion into additional advertising ecosystems, marketing technology, AI-enabled tools, automation platforms, and other digital growth systems that improve performance, reporting, and operational efficiency.

This is not a button-pushing media buying role. We want someone who understands that ads amplify clarity — they do not create it — and who can help translate strategy into efficient, measurable growth.

You will work across founder-led brands that need more than clicks and impressions. They need disciplined media execution, better conversion performance, clearer reporting, and someone who understands the commercial outcome behind the spend. Our ideal clients value structure, proof, and accountability, so your work must reflect that standard.

Key Responsibilities

Paid media strategy and planning

 Build channel strategies across Google, Meta, and other relevant paid platforms based on client goals, audience behaviour, customer journey stage, and conversion priorities.

Campaign setup and execution

 Launch, manage, and optimise campaigns across search, display, remarketing, paid social, and future paid channels where appropriate.

Audience, keyword, and market research

 Conduct keyword research, audience segmentation, competitor review, and targeting refinement to improve efficiency and lead quality.

Creative and messaging alignment

 Work closely with strategy and creative to ensure ad messaging reflects the brand, strengthens trust, and supports conversion.

Testing and optimisation

 Run structured tests across headlines, copy, creative, offers, landing pages, audience segments, and funnel stages to improve performance over time.

Budget and bid management

 Allocate spend carefully, adjust bids based on performance, and manage budgets with commercial discipline.

Performance reporting

 Translate campaign and funnel data into clear reporting that explains what happened, what it means, and what we do next.

Technology and AI adoption

 Help identify and implement useful tools, AI software, automation workflows, and platform enhancements that improve campaign performance, efficiency, internal reporting, or client delivery.

Conversion and systems thinking

 Monitor lead quality, conversion paths, attribution, and funnel performance — not just platfor
trics — to support real business outcomes.

What We’re Looking For

Proven experience managing Google Ads and Meta Ads accounts with measurable results

Strong understanding of paid media fundamentals, attribution, conversion tracking, and optimisation

Confidence learning and adapting to new advertising platforms, AI tools, and digital systems as the role evolves

Ability to think beyond platfor
trics and connect spend to commercial outcomes

Strong communication skills and the ability to explain performance clearly

A structured, accountable, detail-driven approach to campaign management

Comfort working in a business that values quality over volume and clarity over noise

Preferred

Experience across service-based businesses, eCommerce, trades, or founder-led brands

Familiarity with landing page optimisation and CRO principles

Experience using AI tools, automation platforms, reporting dashboards, or workflow software to improve marketing operations

Google Ads certifications

Meta advertising certifications

Experience using CRM, analytics, and reporting platforms

What Success Looks Like in This Role

Campaigns are well-structured, well-managed, and commercially aligned

Reporting is clear, useful, and trusted by clients

Paid media performance improves through disciplined testing and optimisation

Useful tools and systems are introduced where they genuinely improve efficiency or outcomes

Clients feel confident that spend is being managed with accountability

You contribute to a premium client experience, not just campaign delivery

Why Join Wandering Lion

You’ll be joining a business built around calm authority, commercial clarity, and human confidence. We are not trying to become a high-volume agency. We are building a quality-protected growth studio that integrates brand, performance, and systems under one roof.

That means:

You’ll work on higher-quality engagements

You’ll be part of a strategy-led model, not random execution

You’ll collaborate with a team that values standards, structure, and outcomes

You’ll help build growth systems that genuinely move businesses forward

Before We Proceed

Before we potentially move to the interview stage, we’d like to gather a few details to make sure the role is a strong fit and that you’ll be set up for success working remotely with our team.

1. PC / Laptop specifications + internet speed

 Please share your device specifications, including CPU, RAM, and storage, along with a recent internet speed test result. Reliable performance and strong internet are essential for day-to-day work.

2. Current employment or side work

 Are you currently employed or doing any freelance or side work? We are open to offshore tea
mbers having multiple roles. What matters most to us is transparency, so we understand your typical schedule and can support you properly.

3. Hubstaff tracker

 Are you comfortable using Hubstaff time tracking? Our whole team operates remotely, including our field and admin staff in Australia. Hubstaff helps us understand time allocation across projects, improve internal reporting, and provide clearer updates to clients.

4. Working hours / availability

 Can you commit to the required hours? Our standard workdays are Monday to Friday, generally within 9:00am–5:00pm Philippines time. We offer reasonable flexibility — family and life come first — but we do need consistency and clear communication.

5. Expected salary (PHP)

 If this differs from what was listed in the advert, please confirm your expected salary in PHP.

6. CV / Resume

 Please attach your CV if you have not already done so.

7. Relevant training / courses

 Please include any relevant training, certifications, or courses you have completed.

8. English level

 Please confirm your English level (C1 or C2) and your confidence in both written and spoken English.

Team Context

For context, we currently have a team of 10 people in the Philippines, all working from home, and we are continuing to grow. We value honesty, transparency, and teamwork. We are looking for people who are humble, reliable, and easy to work with — because every role matters, and the most important thing is a happy team doing work they enjoy, surrounded by like-minded people.

How to Apply

Please send your CV, a short introduction, and responses to the questions above, along with 2–3 examples of accounts, campaigns, platforms, or systems you have worked on and the commercial outcomes achieved.

Thank you. We look forward to hearing from you.





gle & Meta)

title: Senior Bookkeeper / Accounting Lead
description:
Job Title: Senior Bookkeeper / Accounting Lead (Full-Time, Remote – PH)

About the Role

We are seeking a highly capable, detail-oriented Senior Bookkeeper / Accounting Lead to own and manage the day-to-day accounting operations for a growing multi-location franchise education business in the U.S. (24+ locations, expanding), as well as a small portfolio of franchise fitness businesses in the U.S.

This is not a basic data-entry role — you will act as the primary bookkeeping lead, ensuring accurate, timely, and decision-useful financials across multiple entities, with a focus on building a clean, scalable, investor-ready finance function.

 

Key Responsibilities

Core Bookkeeping & Close

•	Own full-cycle bookkeeping across multiple locations/entities (QuickBooks Online) 

•	Manage monthly close process (target: <10 days) 

•	Reconcile bank, credit card, and intercompany accounts 

•	Maintain clean, audit-ready general ledger 

Multi-Unit / Franchise Accounting

•	Track performance at center, district, and portfolio levels 

•	Maintain class-based or location-based reporting in QBO 

•	Allocate shared costs and manage intercompany transactions 

Financial Reporting

•	Produce monthly financial packages: 

o	P&L (by location + consolidated) 

o	Balance sheet 

o	Cash flow summaries 

•	Identify inconsistencies and proactively flag issues  

Process & Systems

•	Build and document standardized accounting processes 

•	Improve workflows, automation, and reporting structure 

•	Help implement best practices for a PE-ready finance function 

Ad Hoc / Strategic Support

•	Support budgeting and forecasting inputs 

•	Assist with diligence preparation (eventually) 

•	Partner with leadership on financial clarity and insights 

 

Ideal Candidate Profile

•	5+ years bookkeeping/accounting experience (U.S.-based clients required) 

•	Strong expertise in QuickBooks Online (required) 

•	Experience with multi-entity or multi-location businesses (strongly preferred) 

•	Familiarity with U.S. GAAP basics and accrual accounting 

•	Experience with class/location tracking and consolidated reporting 

•	High attention to detail + strong internal quality control 

•	Comfortable working independently with minimal oversight 

•	Strong written and verbal English communication 

 

Nice to Have

•	Experience with franchise businesses or roll-ups 

•	Experience preparing books for investors, lenders, or diligence 

•	Familiarity with tools like Paylocity and 
 

Success Metrics

•	Monthly close completed accurately and on time 

•	Clean, reconciled books with minimal corrections 

•	Clear, decision-useful reporting across all locations 

•	Reduced need for oversight over time

title: Telecom Rollout Specialist.  Telecom tech leader for set up
description:
We use ring central and need someone to set up the system over again for us.

Our phones are set up to route to the next of 3 offices if the first office cannot pick up.  This is backfiring.

We need someone who can 

1) remove that rollover function 

2) Set up "This call is being recorded for quality assurance....please let us know if you'd prefer us to call you back on a non recorded line."

3) Set up routing: "Press 1 if you'd like to explore services for your family,.  Press 2 if you'd like to talk to our Scheduling Department.  Press 3 if you'ld like to talk to a RECRUITER about becoming a caregiver.  Press 4 to dial by first or last name.

4) Set up optional choice to leave a message or to dial zero to be connected back to a live person

5) Set up assurances that voi
s are notified to people via
.

6) Set up ranking for how soon someone would like a call back (within 20 minutes, within two hours, before office staff go home, next day)

7) Then take the prerecorded soundbites I've done and make hold time "Music" spliced with them as I direct over time.



Then we have to collect everyone's Verizon cell phones, download ring central and teach them how to use it.  We need to prevent them from  calling out via their verizon cell number ever again.  There are 18 staff.  You likely will require individual appointments back to back to set up  each cell phone with them via
 correctly and train them how to make their own number invisible.  You'd need to talk to verizon about how to do that.



We'd like all this done within a matter of weeks.

title: Media Buyer - E-Commerce
description:
WE ARE HIRING: Media Buyer – Paid Social Growth (DTC E-Commerce)

Part-Time | EST Time Zone | Remote

Industry: DTC/E-Commerce (Regulated/Restricted Advertising Space)



About the Company:

A growing direct-to-consumer e-commerce brand serving a highly engaged audience. Our team focuses on high-quality products, strong branding, and data-driven marketing across Shopify, TikTok, Instagram, and Meta.



We operate in a regulated advertising space, requiring careful and compliant execution.



Role Overview:

We’re looking for a skilled Media Buyer to manage and scale paid ad campaigns across TikTok, Instagram, and Meta.



This is a hands-on role focused on execution, optimization, and performance. You will work closely with the team to improve results across the full customer journey.



Key Responsibilities:

- Plan, launch, and optimize paid ad campaigns across TikTok, Instagram, and Meta

- Monitor daily performance metrics (CPA, ROAS, MER, CTR, CPC)

- Execute testing strategies (creatives, audiences, offers)

- Collaborate with the team to improve ad creatives

- Align campaigns with retention and
 marketing efforts

- Ensure compliance with advertising policies

- Analyze funnel performance and identify opportunities for improvement

- Provide clear and actionable performance reports



Tools & Platforms:

- Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager

- Shopify

- Klaviyo (view-level insights)

- Claude / Open Claw Dashboards

- Notion and Slack

- Analytics dashboards (CAC, MER, LTV tracking)

- Creative tools (Canva, Adobe – view/review only)



Requirements:

- At least 3 years of experience in paid social media buying (Meta + TikTok)

- Proven experience scaling e-commerce brands

- Strong analytical and performance-driven mindset

- Solid understanding of full-funnel marketing

- Familiarity with key metrics (CPA, ROAS, MER, LTV)

- Experience working within ad policy restrictions

- Ability to work independently while collaborating with a team

- Excellent English communication skills



Strongly Preferred:

- Experience in regulated industries

- Familiarity with Shopify and conversion rate optimization (CRO)

- Understanding of ad creative strategy (hooks, messaging, angles)

- Experience in fast-paced environments



If you are a results-driven Media Buyer who enjoys optimizing campaigns and driving growth, we’d love to hear from you.



APPLY NOW!

title: YouTube Gaming Video Editor
description:
— WHO WE ARE —…



We are a small group of friends looking to make our mark on the YouTube landscape, with our action-packed and humorous gameplay and challenges.



Check out our channel: 



— WHAT WE‘RE LOOKING FOR —



We’re looking for remote, highly experienced Video Editors who aspire to be the best YouTube editors in the world. Period.



If hired, you will spend the majority of your time editing and animating fast-paced, highly engaging YouTube videos (our style could be compared to Game Theory, MortarMarv, or Finzar).



Our team culture is always supportive and encouraging, but you should also expect to be held to an exceptionally high standard because that’s how we become the best in the world at what we do (If you hate getting lots of revisions/feedback on your work, you won’t fit in here).



Your day-to-day will also involve analyzing previous videos' Viewer Retention Analytics Graphs to uncover opportunities to improve future edits.



— THE IDEAL CANDIDATE —



Here are the main skills and abilities we’re looking for in our applicants:



VIDEO EDITING (Required): Obviously, you must be an exceptionally talented video editor from a technical perspective. However, you must also have the passion, creativity, and sense of humor to be able to turn bland, average footage into highly engaging videos that educate AND entertain viewers.



ANIMATION (Required): You must be capable of creating high-quality 2d overlay, titling, and keyframing animations that visually illustrate the concepts we discuss in our videos.



— YOUR KPIs —



Your performance will be graded using the following KPIs:



1 Good Audience Retention, which we’ll be able to measure and learn from through our YouTube analytics. 



2 The number of revisions the videos you edit require before being finalised (the less, the better)



3 The number of hours it takes you to create a video (the less, the better)



— WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU —



Here are just some of the areas where you’ll have the opportunity to learn and grow at our channel.



STABLE & SECURE: This is a very stable and secure job. Our most senior editors have been working with us full-time for 3+ years. No more wishy-washy freelance gigs.



LEADERSHIP OPPORTUNITIES: If you prove yourself and we continue with our current growth rate, you will likely be presented with senior opportunities down the track.



LEARN FROM THE BEST IN THE WORLD: With us, you get to learn from people who are constantly striving to be the best in the world. We’re supportive and encouraging of one another, but we also hold each other to very high standards.



CREATIVE FREEDOM: Once you’ve mastered our style, we encourage outside-the-box thinking. We’re always open to experimenting with new techniques and styles, and then we analyze the data to see how viewers react.



FLEXIBLE WORK HOURS: You can work whenever you want within reason; however, we expect you to be available for tea
etings (We are based in California, and tea
etings are usually in the late evening PT).



— TO APPLY —



If you're interested, please submit the following form (No need for a CV or cover letter. It’s not the 1900s anymore :D): 







Please note: All successful job applications will start with a virtual interview and trial project/s to make sure that we’re the right fit for each other.



Thank you for your consideration, and best of luck on your job search!
