title: Seeking Experts for Feedback:Bilingual Parents, and Sport Enthusiasts (Basketball Book Focus)
description:
Looking for Beta Readers: "The Inspiring Basketball Stories For Kids"



Hello!!!



We’re a growing educational publishing team at Petite Dreamer, creating "human-crafted," engaging books for children—especially those in multilingual and multicultural families who may find traditional books boring. Right now, we’re looking for thoughtful experts and beta readers to provide detailed feedback on our newest title: "The Inspiring Basketball Stories For Kids: 24 Epic Tales of Grit".



We are especially interested in those with a passion for basketball, any sports and personal or professional experience in coaching, sports education, or children's literature.



???? About the Book:



Beyond the Stats: Unlike typical sports books that focus on dry numbers, this book focuses on "Grit"—the failures, heartbreaks, and the "4 AM" workouts that make a champion.



Epic Tales of Grit: Features 24 stories of basketball G.O.A.T.s, including Kobe Bryant’s "Mamba Mentality," Larry Bird’s early morning repetitions, and Michael Jordan's "Breakfast Club".



Engaging Format: Includes 100+ facts, trivia, "Grit Checks," and interactive quizzes designed to grab the attention of reluctant readers.



Multilingual Support: Written to support bilingual/multilingual households and encourage "Future Legends" at home.



???? We’re looking for someone who:



Has experience writing professional feedback or editorial content for children's books.



Can provide constructive insights that resonate with parents, educators, and young sports fans.



Understands the value of resilience-based non-fiction for kids.



Has experience as a teacher, bilingual parent, or a deep background in the Sport(basketball,Football) niche (coach, player, or super-fan).



? Bonus if you:



Have personal experience teaching or parenting bilingual children.



Have written or edited children’s sports books or educational non-fiction.



Are familiar with the "Mamba Mentality" or the history of SPort, basketball, Football(NFL) legends.



???? What You’ll Get:



A full PDF copy of the book in advance.



An opportunity to join our growing team of collaborators (with potential future projects across stories, facts, trivia books, and more).



How to Apply:

Please send a brief summary of your experience with Sport, basketball and children’s education/literature. Mention if you are a bilingual parent or educator!

title: Customer Service Trainer and Coach
description:
Remote Customer Service Trainer and Coach – Inspire Teams, Drive Success | PH-Based Only



Create and facilitate online training programs that enhance customer satisfaction, drive e-commerce growth, and build top-performing teams.



(Salary Package: PHP 20,000–25,000 per month (negotiable only within this range; if you are not comfortable with this, please do not apply))



What You’ll Be Doing

 • Design and deliver training programs for new CSRs

 • Create and update training materials including slides, manuals, scripts, LMS content, and videos

 • Conduct coaching sessions using mock calls, role-plays, live demos, and simulations

 • Monitor trainee progress, provide feedback, and ensure training goals are met

 • Evaluate trainee performance and endorse graduates for deployment

 • Collaborate with Recruitment, Operations, and QA to align training with client needs

 • Continuously improve training systems, LMS courses, and knowledge base content



What We’re Looking For

 • 1+ year of experience in BPO training, coaching, or learning & development roles

 • Experience in e-commerce support such as Amazon, Shopify, eBay, or Walmart is a plus

 • Strong facilitation, presentation, and training development skills

 • Analytical, adaptable, and passionate about helping people grow

 • Reliable internet and quiet home workspace

 • Backup device and power source



What We Offer

• Monthly salary: PHP 20,000–25,000

• Career Growth: Clear progression from Senior Trainer to Director level

• Hands-On Experience: Work on fast-paced, global e-commerce projects

• Flexible Work: 100% remote, long-term work-from-home setup

• Professional Development: Opportunities to upskill, lead initiatives, and make a real impact

• Salary Review: Possible after the probation period, based on performance



Please click the link below to proceed with the next step in the application process:





Who We Are

RingCould partners with top brands to drive innovation in smart home technology and AI. Our remote-first culture supports growth, creativity, and results that truly matter.

title: Maintenance/Operations Manager (Real Estate & Construction)
description:
Please send a voice introduction to be considered.



Overview:



I’m looking for a highly organized Virtual Assistant to help manage day-to-day operations, maintenance, and construction coordination for several rental properties. The ideal candidate has a strong background in property management or bookkeeping, combined with hands-on experience working directly with general contractors and tradespeople. You will be the central hub keeping finances, utilities, vendor relationships, project bids, and documents organized with minimal supervision.



Responsibilities:



*Contractor & Maintenance Coordination: Act as the primary liaison with general contractors, subcontractors, and handymen to request bids, schedule repairs, and track timelines for routine maintenance, unit turnovers, and renovation projects.



*Expense & Project Tracking: Track and categorize expenses per property, accurately separating routine maintenance costs     from capital expenditure (CapEx) construction projects.



*Document Management: Organize receipts, contractor invoices, lien waivers, and financial documents for taxes and refinancing. Collect and file contractor compliance documents (W-9s, COIs/insurance certificates, contracts).



*Financial Operations: Pay utility bills, keep property accounts current, and maintain simple monthly P&Ls and project budget trackers in Google Sheets.



*Reporting: Provide weekly summaries of cash flow, upcoming bills, construction/renovation progress, and immediate maintenance priorities.



Requirements:



*Experience in property management, bookkeeping, or construction administration.



*Proven experience working with and coordinating contractors, vendors, and maintenance teams.



*Familiarity with basic construction, renovation, and maintenance terminology.



*Strong English communication skills (written and spoken) to effectively negotiate and follow up with vendors.



*Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple projects at once.



*Proficient with Google Sheets and QuickBooks.

title: Property Management & Bookkeeping Virtual Assistant
description:
Please send voice introduction to be considered. 



Overview:



I’m looking for a highly organized Virtual Assistant to help manage day-to-day operations for several rental properties. The ideal candidate has experience in property management or bookkeeping and can keep finances, utilities, vendors, and documents organized with minimal supervision.



Responsibilities:

 • Pay utility bills and keep property accounts current

 • Track and categorize expenses per property

 • Maintain simple monthly P&Ls and Google Sheets trackers

 • Organize receipts, invoices, and documents for taxes and refinancing

 • Coordinate with vendors and schedule maintenance

 • Provide weekly summaries of cash flow, upcoming bills, and priorities



Requirements:

 • Experience with property management or bookkeeping

 • Strong English communication

 • Very organized and detail-oriented

 • Proficient with Google Sheets and QuickBooks

title: Property Manager - (Operations & Finance)
description:
*Must be proficient in English*



Hi, I’m TJ, founder of Yesler Capital, a small but growing real estate and property management company based in MA (U.S)



I’m currently running everything by myself and looking for one full-time, long-term virtual assistant to work only with me as my right hand.



This isn’t a short-term gig — it’s a chance to become the first tea
mber in a business that’s growing. I’m not a big company, but I care deeply about the people I work with. If you’re loyal, honest, and take initiative, I’ll always treat you with respect, pay you on time, and help you grow personally and professionally. You’ll be part of the family here.



Must-Haves:



*Excellent spoken and written English — you’ll speak with tenants, vendors, and contractors



*Trustworthy, proactive, and highly organized



*Comfortable working US hours or overlapping time



*Committed to working exclusively with me, long-term





Your Role:



*Assist with construction and rental projects



*Communicate with people on my behalf



*Manage schedules, follow-ups, documents, and research





To Apply:



*Send a short intro, why this role excites you, and your 1–2 minute voice recording.



Let’s build something meaningful together.

title: Construction & Real Estate Business Manager
description:
How to Apply:



Send your resume, a 1–2 minute voice/video intro, and any sample trackers or tools you’ve used.



I own a small real estate company in the U.S. with 30 rental units. I renovate apartments, rent them out, and manage them myself, but I need help.



I’m looking for an experienced Construction, Business Manager VA to help me stay organized during renovations. You’ll track project progress, follow up with contractors, manage receipts and invoices, and keep everything moving behind the scenes.



Must-Haves:

 • 2+ years experience in construction or renovation coordination

 • Excellent English (spoken + written)

 • Very organized and proactive

 • Strong with Google Sheets or project tools (ClickUp, Trello, etc.)



Nice to Have:

 • Worked with U.S. contractors or investors

 • Familiar with property tools like Buildium, or AppFolio

 • Light bookkeeping experience

 • Bonuses for performance

 • Full-time, with 2–4 hours overlap with U.S. Eastern Time

 • Paid PH holidays

 • Long-term role — I want someone I can rely on



Looking forward to working with you!

title: CAD Drafter/Renderer - Kitchen (2020 Design)
description:
We are seeking a skilled CAD Drafting & Rendering Specialist to support our kitchen design and production team. This role is responsible for producing accurate CAD drawings, 3D renderings, and detailed takeoffs for kitchen projects, helping bring designs from concept to build-ready plans.



The ideal candidate is highly detail-oriented, organized, and familiar with 2020 Design. Responsibilities include preparing floor plans and elevations, creating presentation-quality renderings, generating cabinet and material takeoffs, managing revisions, and ensuring drawings align with project specifications, measurements, and design standards. Experience with cabinetry layouts, kitchen construction details, and strong communication skills to collaborate with designers and project teams is preferred.



Must apply using this link,

title: Video Editor (Part-Time, Long-Term)
description:
I'm a solo video and photo producer based in the US. I work with ongoing clients across real estate, ministry/leadership, and small business — shooting and producing content that actually moves the needle for the people I serve. It's a lean, quality-first operation. The work you do matters, and you're not one of a hundred editors in a queue.

I have consistent, recurring volume. If you do good work, you stay busy. If you're great, this role grows with you.



THE ROLE

I'm looking for a part-time video editor to start, with a real path to full-time as volume and trust grow. This is a long-term hire — not a gig. I want someone who shows up consistently, executes to a standard, and builds something together over time.

Priority #1 from day one: Editing and full content packaging for an ongoing YouTube and social media channel — weekly teaching and leadership content for pastors and church leaders. Consistent, recurring work. You'll own it end to end.

Priority #2: Real estate video editing — cinematic property walkthrough videos for residential and rural/land listings.



WHAT YOU'LL BE EDITING

HNI YouTube & Social Content — Primary, starts immediately

This is a teaching/leadership channel for church leaders and ministry teams. Clean, professional talking-head content with minimal, purposeful editing. Volume: 4 YouTube videos + 4 Reels per month.

Footage delivered via Dropbox. Files published to YouTube and
 through my systems.

Your full deliverable for every long-form video:

EDIT (Adobe Premiere Pro):



A-roll trimming, color correction, audio mastering, and minimal on-screen text/titles

Clean, professional style — purposeful cuts, not flashy

Detailed editing SOPs and style references provided when you start



DELIVERY PACKAGE:



Finished video export

Original .prproj file with all assets

Thumbnail expression stills

Uploaded to Dropbox and shared via link



CONTENT PACKAGE (AI-assisted via Claude — you generate options, I make final calls):



3 title options — use Claude to generate, submit your 3 best for my final selection

YouTube description (SEO-aware, includes chapter markers)

Tags/keywords

3 Canva thumbnail options — using expression stills, branded text overlay — I choose the best one



Detailed SOPs and Claude prompts for this workflow will be provided.

Your deliverable for each Reel/Short:



30-90 seconds clipped from long-form — strong hook + clear payoff

Vertical format (9:16), captions added, music if appropriate

Ready to post on YouTube Shorts +
 Reels





Real Estate Video — Secondary, consistent volume

Cinematic property walkthrough edits for residential homes and rural/land listings.



Average length: ~2 minutes

Style: quality-focused, not flashy — good music, smooth color grade, clean pacing

Footage shot on Sony cameras, S-Log 3 with Phantom LUTS — color correction from log required

Drone/aerial footage integration is common

Deliver finished export + original .prproj file every time





Additional Project Types (grows over time):



Church and event recap videos

Client brand and promo videos

Short-form social content

Personal brand YouTube content





SKILLS & REQUIREMENTS

Required:



Adobe Premiere Pro — all edits happen here.

S-Log 3 / log footage color correction — Sony cameras, Phantom LUTS used

Audio processing fundamentals — gain, compression, hard limiting

Canva — thumbnail creation with text overlays and branded design

Claude (Anthropic) — I work out of Claude for all AI-assisted tasks. Comfortable using it required; prior Claude experience is a strong plus

Deliver both a finished export and the original .prproj file for every project, every time

Dropbox delivery for everything

Comfortable working across multiple project types and styles



Strongly Preferred:



YouTube editing experience (talking-head/teaching content)

Short-form Reels/Shorts editing — vertical format, captions, clipping long-form

Real estate or property video editing experience

Drone/aerial footage integration



Nice to Have:



Experience with Dehancer





PAY



$5-$10/hr depending on experience and demonstrated skill

Higher skill = higher starting rate — if you're genuinely good, I'll pay for it

This is not a ceiling. Rate and hours grow as you prove yourself.

The goal is full-time. That's where this heads if you deliver.





TURNAROUND



Standard: 3-5 business days per project

Consistent on-time delivery is one of the most important things I track





TIME TRACKING & INTRODUCTORY PERIOD



TimeProof required to start — protects both of us while we build trust

The first 2-3 months are an introductory period — performance evaluated on task completion, quality, communication, and overall fit

If it's a good fit, this becomes a long-term role with growing hours and rate





COMMUNICATION



Primary communication via WhatsApp — day-to-day updates, feedback, and check-ins all happen there. You need to have it and use it.

Responsive and reliable — not 24/7, but timely

Occasional video calls will happen — be comfortable on camera with clear English

Written English fluency required. Ask questions early.





WHO I'M LOOKING FOR

The technical skills matter. But these things matter just as much:



Overdeliver. Don't just do what's expected — go a little beyond and wow people with something they're not even paying for. Value the relationship more than the transaction.

Be a pleasure to work with. It's not just the final product people are paying for — it's the entire process from A to Z. Be a human being that people genuinely enjoy working with. This matters even more working remotely.

Enjoy what you do. You only do well what you love. If editing feels like a chore, this isn't the right fit.

Be efficient. A lot of people who are less talented get more work because they turn things around on time and don't procrastinate. Deadlines are not suggestions.

Be precise. Every revision note needs to be followed — fully, the first time. Missing the same note twice is a bigger deal than most people think. This is the one I take most seriously.

Set expectations, then meet and exceed them. If something's going to be late or you're unsure — say so early. I'd rather know than be surprised.



I'm not looking for the most experienced editor in the world. I'm looking for someone hungry, skilled, and genuinely enjoyable to work with. Personality matters just as much as the work.



THE HIRING PROCESS



Apply with your portfolio or reel — YouTube and/or real estate samples are a strong plus

Top candidates selected based on portfolio and application quality

Brief written or video screening with finalists

Paid test edit for final candidates — you'll receive raw footage and a reference cut to match





EXAMPLE WORK

Take a look at these before applying — this is exactly what you'd be editing:

HNI YouTube (primary — the channel you'd be editing for):



Teaching/leadership content for pastors and church leaders. Talking-head/podcast style, desk setup. Mix of long-form (45min-1hr+) and shorter clips (8-20min). Bold text-heavy thumbnails, curiosity-driven titles. Study a few videos before applying.

Real estate videos (secondary workload):



Land, hunting tracts, luxury properties, rural/residential across Georgia and Virginia. Cinematic, quality-focused.

My personal YouTube channel (style reference):





HOW TO APPLY

Use the subject line "Video Editor Application" — applications without this will not be reviewed.

Include:



Link to your portfolio or reel (required — no link, not reviewed)

Any YouTube, real estate, or social media editing samples

Brief overview of your Premiere Pro, S-Log 3/color, and Canva experience

Your timezone and availability



Answer ALL of the following questions:



Where in the Philippines are you?

How are power outages where you live?

Do you have your own computer? What are the specs?

How fast is your internet connection?

Do you have another job? If so, where and how many hours per week?

How long have you been doing video editing?

What have you done in the last 12 months to improve your editing skills?

What's the best piece of work you've ever done — and why did it turn out so well?

How long would you expect to work with me if you get this role?

Do you have any other skills not listed that might be useful?



Final required question (answer this last):

"Describe one editing project where you had to match a specific style that wasn't your own. How did you approach it, and what was the result?"

Applications that skip the questions will not be reviewed.

Remote position. Strong preference for availability overlapping US Eastern or Central business hours.

title: AI Content Operator & Video Editor (Short-Form / Growth-Focused)
description:
We run a fast-growing online health company helping people get out of pain and move better without relying on traditional healthcare. We create a lot of content (short-form videos, ads, educational content), and we’re looking for someone who can help us turn 1 video into 10–30 high-performing pieces of content using AI.



This is NOT a basic video editing job. This is NOT just dropping a video into OpusClip (or other similar tool).

We are looking for someone who understands content, attention, and performance. Great English communication is required.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

Take raw video footage and turn it into:

- Short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

- Editing Long form videos (youtube)

- Adding AI b-roll or creating AI generated videos based on a script. 

- Ad creatives

- Create multiple variations of the same content (different hooks, captions, pacing)



Use AI tools to:

- Rewrite hooks and scripts

- Generate new content ideas

- Add captions, fast cuts, zooms, and edits that improve retention



TOOLS YOU SHOULD BE FAMILIAR WITH:

- Descript

- CapCut/Premiere Pro/Final Cut

- Claude/ChatGPT or similar for scripting + ideation

- HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana, Opus, or AI content tools



THIS JOB IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

- You don’t use AI tools regularly

- You only know how to edit but don’t understand content performance

- You need step-by-step instructions for everything

- You focus on making things “look pretty” instead of performing well



THIS JOB IS FOR YOU IF:

- You enjoy breaking down viral videos and recreating them

- You like testing different hooks and ideas

- You want to grow with a company long-term

- You’re excited about AI and using it to work faster and smarter



If you're interested, add the words, Orange Cactus, to the end of your
.



Hope to hear from you!

title: Social Media Content Specialist (VA)
description:
???? Social Media Content Specialist (VA) – Fitness Brand



We’re a fast-growing fitness business based in Australia, and we’re looking for a high-quality Content Specialist to take ownership of our social media execution.



This is not a basic VA role.

We want someone who can take direction and turn it into engaging, high-performing content... consistently.



???? What You’ll Be Responsible For

Editing short-form video content (Reels / TikTok style)

Selecting the best clips from raw footage

Adding captions, hooks, pacing, and structure to videos

Writing captions in our brand voice

Scheduling and posting content



???? Content Output

You will be responsible for:

Personal brand: 4 posts per week

Business Brand: 8–10 posts per week



???? Total: 12–14 posts per week



All content direction will be provided via a 30-day content planner.



???? How We Work

We film and provide raw content

You take that content and turn it into finished, polished posts

You manage posting and ensure consistency across both accounts

This role is about execution at a high level, not just following basic instructions.





???? Editing Standard (Important)

We are looking for someone who can;

Create clean, engaging edits (not basic cuts)

Use strong pacing and flow

Add captions that are easy to read and engaging

Understand hooks and attention-grabbing formats

Replicate trending styles when relevant



???? If your edits feel basic, this role is not for you.



?? Working Structure

Flexible working hours

Must ensure all content is edited, scheduled, and posted on time

Strong organisation and consistency is critical



???? Compensation

Mid-range monthly salary (based on experience)

Opportunity for long-term growth within the business



? What We’re Looking For

Strong experience editing short-form video (Reels / TikTok)

Ability to take raw footage and turn it into quality content

Good understanding of social media trends and formats

Strong attention to detail

Ability to match tone and style of an existing brand

Reliable, consistent, and accountable



???? Not For You If

You only do basic edits

You need step-by-step instructions for every post

You struggle with consistency or deadlines



???? Why This Role Is Different

We already have:

A clear content strategy

A strong brand voice

A high volume of content



We just need the right person to execute at a high level consistently.





???? How To Apply

Send your application to 
 directly with;



Examples of short-form videos you’ve edited 

Links to accounts you’ve worked on 

A short video (1–2 mins) explaining your editing process & a bit about you

Your favourite piece of content you’ve created and why (and share it with us)



If you’re confident you can take raw content and turn it into engaging, high-quality posts consistently, we want to hear from you.

title: Next Level YouTube Editor WANTED
description:
— WHO WE ARE —…



We are a small group of friends looking to make our mark on the YouTube landscape, with our action-packed and humorous gameplay and challenges.



Check out our channel: 



— WHAT WE‘RE LOOKING FOR —



We’re looking for remote, highly experienced Video Editors who aspire to be the best YouTube editors in the world. Period.



If hired, you will spend the majority of your time editing and animating fast-paced, highly engaging YouTube videos (our style could be compared to Game Theory, MortarMarv, or Finzar).



Our team culture is always supportive and encouraging, but you should also expect to be held to an exceptionally high standard because that’s how we become the best in the world at what we do (If you hate getting lots of revisions/feedback on your work, you won’t fit in here).



Your day-to-day will also involve analyzing previous videos' Viewer Retention Analytics Graphs to uncover opportunities to improve future edits.



— THE IDEAL CANDIDATE —



Here are the main skills and abilities we’re looking for in our applicants:



VIDEO EDITING (Required): Obviously, you must be an exceptionally talented video editor from a technical perspective. However, you must also have the passion, creativity, and sense of humor to be able to turn bland, average footage into highly engaging videos that educate AND entertain viewers.



ANIMATION (Required): You must be capable of creating high-quality 2d overlay, titling, and keyframing animations that visually illustrate the concepts we discuss in our videos.



— YOUR KPIs —



Your performance will be graded using the following KPIs:



1 Good Audience Retention, which we’ll be able to measure and learn from through our YouTube analytics.



2 The number of revisions the videos you edit require before being finalised (the less, the better)



3 The number of hours it takes you to create a video (the less, the better)



— WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU —



Here are just some of the areas where you’ll have the opportunity to learn and grow at our channel.



STABLE & SECURE: This is a very stable and secure job. Our most senior editors have been working with us full-time for 3+ years. No more wishy-washy freelance gigs.



LEADERSHIP OPPORTUNITIES: If you prove yourself and we continue with our current growth rate, you will likely be presented with senior opportunities down the track.



LEARN FROM THE BEST IN THE WORLD: With us, you get to learn from people who are constantly striving to be the best in the world. We’re supportive and encouraging of one another, but we also hold each other to very high standards.



CREATIVE FREEDOM: Once you’ve mastered our style, we encourage outside-the-box thinking. We’re always open to experimenting with new techniques and styles, and then we analyze the data to see how viewers react.



FLEXIBLE WORK HOURS: You can work whenever you want within reason; however, we expect you to be available for tea
etings (We are based in California, and tea
etings are usually in the late evening PT).



— TO APPLY —



If you're interested, please submit the following form (No need for a CV or cover letter. It’s not the 1900s anymore :D):






Please note: All successful job applications will start with a virtual interview and trial project/s to make sure that we’re the right fit for each other.



Thank you for your consideration, and best of luck on your job search!

title: Full-Time UI/Product Designer for Software Company - Long-Term Role
description:
Hi! We're a software and AI company based in the US. We build B2B and B2C web apps, mobile apps, browser extensions and desktop applications. We're looking for a full-time designer to join our team long-term.



This is not a freelance gig. I'm looking for someone who wants a stable, ongoing role where you grow with the company and become an essential part of the team.



The design work includes:

• Website design (landing pages, marketing pages)

• Dashboard and web app UI design

• Mobile app design (including onboarding flows)

• App Store and Google Play listing graphics

• Desktop application installer design

• Icons, social media graphics, and marketing materials

• Other product listing visuals (Chrome Web Store, Google Marketplace)





I'll provide detailed training on our brand, style, and processes. I do a lot of this design work myself right now, so I can teach you exactly how I think about it and how I do it. What I need from you is strong design fundamentals and a willingness to learn my approach.



What I'm looking for:

• Strong proficiency in Figma (this is our primary design tool)

• Clean, modern visual design sense

• Good English communication (we work together daily)

• Reliable internet connection and your own computer



Nice to have (not required):

• Experience with Canva, Photoshop, or Illustrator

• Experience designing for SaaS or tech products



Salary is negotiable and based on your experience. 

This is a full-time role (40 hours/week). 

I believe in paying fairly, providing 13th month pay, and building a long-term working relationship.



In your application, tell me a bit about yourself and include a link to your portfolio or examples of your best design work. To apply, please include the phrase 'blue design sea' at the end of your application subject line so I know you read this carefully. 



Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Still Hiring! Virtual Receptionist VA (Remote) | Fast Hiring – 24-Hour Review
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Staff Accountant
description:
Staff Accountant Remote | Philippines-based | Full-Time Contractor | CDT Hours $15.00 - $18.00/hour USD



The Company



Bolt Farm Treehouse exists to help couples slow down, reconnect, and strengthen their relationship through intentional, deeply restorative experiences. We are building a distinct brand centered on renewal, reconnection, and emotional transformation - creating beautiful, private environments that help people step out of the noise of everyday life and return to what matters most. More than a place to visit, Bolt Farm is designed to create meaningful change in the lives and relationships of the people we serve.



This is an exciting time to join Bolt Farm. As we continue to elevate the experience and build the team shaping what comes next, we are looking for people who want to do meaningful work inside a distinctive, growing company. For the right person, this is a chance to help build something special - a brand with real 
ntum, a clear mission, and the opportunity to make a lasting impact.



Your Team



This role sits within Bolt Farm’s finance function inside All Co, the shared-services backbone that supports the business through financial controls, systems, automation, and internal scale support. The finance team helps ensure leadership has clean, reliable information to make better decisions and move faster with confidence.



You’ll support the day-to-day accounting rhythm of a fast-moving company where accuracy, timeliness, and follow-through matter. This is a strong fit for someone who takes pride in keeping financial records clean, maintaining consistency across recurring workflows, and reducing friction for the team around them.



Your Role



As Staff Accountant, you will help keep Bolt Farm’s accounting records clean, accurate, and current through disciplined daily execution. You will own recurring workflows across reconciliations, transaction coding, expense tracking, reporting support, and record maintenance so the finance team and leadership can operate with better visibility and less cleanup burden.



This is an execution-heavy role for someone who works well independently, catches issues early, and follows through consistently. For the right person, this is an opportunity to step into a high-ownership seat with meaningful day-to-day impact inside a company that values speed, clarity, and reliable execution.



Responsibilities



Perform nightly and recurring revenue reconciliations across systems

Manage transaction coding, categorization, and record accuracy in QuickBooks Online

Review and track expenses in Ramp, including coding accuracy and follow-up

Support payroll review checks and reporting validation in Gusto

Maintain organized financial records across multiple entities

Prepare recurring daily and weekly reports for leadership visibility

Identify discrepancies, investigate routine variances, and flag issues when needed

Help document and maintain accounting SOPs and process documentation

Minimum Requirements



3-5 years of accounting, bookkeeping, or staff accounting experience

Strong proficiency in QuickBooks Online

Experience handling reconciliations, transaction coding, and record accuracy

Experience supporting recurring financial reporting and expense tracking

Ability to work independently in a remote role aligned to U.S. Central Time business hours



Nice to Have



Experience with Ramp, Gusto, or similar finance tools

Experience supporting multi-entity accounting workflows

Experience in hospitality, construction, startup, or other fast-moving operating environments

Familiarity with SOP documentation, process improvement, or automation tools

Compensation & Details



Location: Remote, Philippines-based

Schedule: Full-Time contractor, aligned with U.S. Central Time business hours

Compensation: $15.00-$18.00/hour USD

title: AI Automation Marketing Manager
description:
THE ROLE



We are looking for a sharp, tech-fluent Virtual Assistant who will OWN the execution of our marketing automation systems. This is not a social media manager job. This is not a content scheduler job. This is an automation operations role. You will be hands-on inside GoHighLevel (GHL), building workflows, managing funnels, running
/SMS campaigns, connecting integrations, and making sure our pipeline never goes cold. You will report directly to the CEO and your output will directly impact revenue.



If you need to be told what to do every hour, this is not the job for you. If you can look at a broken workflow and fix it without being asked, keep reading.



YOUR CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



Build, manage, and optimize automated workflows inside GoHighLevel (GHL) — lead nurture sequences, follow-up campaigns, pipeline triggers, and appointment booking flows

Set up and maintain
 and SMS marketing campaigns: segment lists, write copy (or refine AI-generated copy), A/B test, and report on performance

Manage GHL CRM: keep pipelines clean, tag contacts correctly, ensure leads are moving and no one falls through the cracks

Connect and maintain third-party integrations (Zapier, Make/Integromat, webhooks, API connections between GHL and other platforms)

Support AI voice agent workflows — coordinate with vendor platforms (Bland.ai or similar), test call flows, troubleshoot issues

Build and maintain landing pages and funnels inside GHL

Produce weekly performance reports: leads in, leads converted,
 open rates, campaign ROI — no fluff, just numbers

Proactively identify broken automations, dead leads, or gaps in the pipeline and fix them before the CEO has to ask

Support vendor sourcing automations — coordinate outbound call or
 sequences for pricing and availability requests



WHAT YOU MUST KNOW — NON-NEGOTIABLE



Do not apply if you do not have hands-on experience with ALL of the following:



GoHighLevel (GHL) — workflows, pipelines, campaigns, funnels, calendars. Not surface-level. You must know it cold.

Zapier or Make (Integromat) — building multi-step automation flows

 marketing fundamentals — deliverability, segmentation, sequences, open rate optimization

Google Workspace — Docs, Sheets, Drive — you will use these daily

Excellent written English — you will be writing copy, SOPs, and reports



NICE TO HAVE (BONUS POINTS)



Experience with AI voice platforms (Bland.ai, Vapi, Retell, or similar)

Experience in the construction, home services, or trades industry

Familiarity with reputation management (Google reviews, GMB optimization)

Basic video editing for short-form content (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

Experience with ChatGPT, Claude, or other AI tools for content/automation



Your application must include ALL of the following or it will not be reviewed:



A short video (2–4 minutes, Loom preferred) walking us through a GHL workflow or automation you personally built. Show us the inside of GHL. No screenshots. Live screen share only.

A written answer (3–5 sentences) to this question: A lead came in through a GHL form 3 days ago, was assigned to a nurture sequence, but has not received any messages. You are the automation manager. What do you do first?

Your resume with specific tools and platforms listed — not generic descriptions.

Start your subject line or message with the words: AUTOMATION READY — so we know you read this in full.

title: CHARMING ASSERTIVE PUZZLE MASTER NEEDED
description:
YOU WANT ONE JOB ONLY--YOU DON'T WANT CONTRACT JOBS.  You want  longer term relationships with coworkers, to be a part of something w/ long term growth.  WE WANT TO BE YOUR MAIN OR ONLY EMPLOYER.  This job takes too much long term training--you'll need to get to know all our 85 caregivers with facetiming and pictures and phone calls.  We need you committed to the full 40 hrs with DIRECT ATTENTION so if this is a side job you are looking for, WE are not a fit.



People who love puzzles make good elderly personal care schedulers. People with medical appt scheduling are NOT encouraged to apply as this field of work is nothing like that.  This is like runing 85 cars on 30 lane superhighway without allowing any of them to crash.  You've got new cars entering that highway all the time too.  You have to love timed games where you compete against yourself.



The right person hired will have another experienced remote Tagalog person training her along with our United States based MASTER SCHEDULER at the office here,  The goal is to take on your own office and grow proficient to being able to handle 2000 hours a week on your own.  Your two women mentioned above would always be here to assist for any reason and help solve as a team.  We have 3 offices total.   People who are naturals at this like scheduling because they get a little endorphin rush from seeing the filled shifts change color accordingly.   



There are 500+ shifts to fill weekly--in can intimidate the hell out of someone  if they aren't warned about it.  Some are repetative with the same caregiver over and over.  The software will show you who has been to the home before.  Our goal is to limit the people going in and out of the home to a very small team like 3-4.  



We also get 2-4 caregiver call outs a day we need to fill even FASTER within the hour usually in a team fashion.  



You will start each day by watching the LIVE schedule and staying aware of it.  This would probably feel bewildering on the first week but get more comfortable over time.  Then you are working to open shifts shifts (color coded)..

You are filling  shifts by eachingout to caregivers via
 blasts, then individually by phone and waiting to hear back from them as you work the other open shifts too.  Waiting for them to get back can be tedius but if you are the right person for the role, it should feel like a master puzzle to beat the clock (the shift start time).  



Your job is to get every shift staffed before the time it starts- AND after an initial period of support, you'd also be responsible for calling the client or client family to update them about the caregiver who is coming.  



You should get a rush from filling the pink shifts with names as you staff it (if you are the right candidate).



That means you have to be PURSUASIVE sometimes, CHARMING sometimes, and when it comes to filling a shift same day, you are BOSSY and ASSERTIVE.  You know when to ASK VS TELL a person something. Your English is easy to understand.)  

You have attention to detail. 



We want a long relationshiip with you and we want to be YOUR ONLY JOB.  We are an award winning company that treats people well!

title: Marketing & Business Development Coordinator
description:
Marketing & Business Development Coordinator – Virtual Assistant

About the Company



We are a tech-forward hospitality and short-term rental (STR) management company focused on scaling a portfolio of high-performing properties. Beyond just managing "Airbnbs," we are building a world-class, data-driven co-hosting platform powered by smart systems, aggressive marketing, and strategic partnerships.



We are moving quickly to expand our footprint. We need a tea
mber who is not just an administrator, but a growth-minded partner excited by the challenge of finding new leads, out-maneuvering competitors, and keeping our properties at the top of search results.



Position Summary



The Marketing & Business Development Coordinator will be the engine behind our growth and property visibility. This role is split between two primary objectives: Property Performance (ensuring our current listings dominate the market) and Portfolio Growth (finding and securing new co-hosting clients).



The ideal candidate is analytical, persuasive in writing, and comfortable with digital marketing tools. You won’t just be waiting for guests to book; you will be actively driving traffic, analyzing trends, and reaching out to local partners to expand our business.



Core Purpose



To maximize the revenue of our existing portfolio through expert digital marketing and to aggressively identify and nurture new business leads for our co-hosting services.



Key Responsibilities

1. Digital Marketing & Visibility (Primary Focus)



    Multi-Channel Marketing: Execute and monitor marketing campaigns across FB Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and niche
 Groups to drive booking traffic.



    Data Analytics: Utilize Google Trends and Google Analytics to identify seasonal shifts, guest behavior, and high-intent search terms.



    SEO & Ranking: Perform regular audits of Airbnb/VRBO page rankings; implement optimizations to ensure our properties stay on Page 1.



    Dynamic
 Campaigns: Draft and send marketing
s to past guests and leads featuring local "fun activities," events, and seasonal "reasons to stay" to drive repeat bookings.



2. Business Development & Lead Gen (Growth Focus)



    Realtor Outreach: Manage a referral program targeting local realtors; handle outreach and relationship nurturing to secure professional referrals for our co-hosting business.



    Lead Sourcing: Proactively find and "cold" research potential property owners who could benefit from professional management.



    Audit Scripting: Create and refine "Mini-Audit" scripts—concise, high-value teardowns of a potential client's current listing to show them exactly how we can increase their ROI.



    Competitor Analysis: Regularly monitor local "comps" to analyze their pricing, amenities, and guest sentiment, ensuring our portfolio maintains a competitive edge.



Requirements & Qualifications



    STR Experience: Prior experience in Short-Term Rental marketing or VA support for Airbnb hosts is highly preferred.



    Technical Marketing Literacy: Familiarity with Google Analytics,
 Ad Manager, and LinkedIn outreach tools.



    Growth Mindset: A background in sales support or lead generation; you aren't afraid to "knock on digital doors."



    Exceptional English: High-level written English is a must for drafting professional outreach to realtors and engaging marketing
s.



    Analytical Skills: Ability to look at a spreadsheet of competitor data or a Google Trend line and turn it into an actionable marketing "win."



Systems & Platform Experience



    Marketing Tools: FB/LinkedIn Ad Managers, Google Analytics, Google Trends.



    STR Tools: Airbnb/VRBO Ranking Trackers, PriceLabs or Wheelhouse (for competitor analysis).



    CRM & Outreach: Experience with
 marketing software (Mailchimp, Beehiiv, etc.) and CRM tools for lead tracking.



    Google Workspace: Expert level in Google Sheets for data tracking and competitor logs.



Ideal Candidate Traits



    Proactive Researcher: You don’t wait for instructions; you see a dip in ranking and investigate why.



    Persuasive Writer: You can write an
 to a realtor that feels like a partnership, not a "sales pitch."



    Data-Driven: You enjoy the "game" of SEO and seeing how your changes affect page ranking.



    Ambitious: You are excited by the prospect of helping a small business scale into a large-scale management firm.



Compensation & Schedule



    Schedule: Flexible/To be discussed (Expected 20–40 hours per week).



    Compensation: Base rate + performance-based bonuses tied to successful lead generation and referral conversions.

title: Marketing & Sales Support Coordinator
description:
Marketing & Sales Support Coordinator (Part-Time, Remote | Approx. 20–25 Hours/Week)



Falcon Paper & Trading is looking for a highly organized, hands-on Marketing & Sales Support Coordinator to help us improve our marketing presence, support lead generation, organize lead and customer information, run outreach and reactivation campaigns, and bring more structure to our marketing and sales support efforts.



This is a practical, execution-focused remote role for someone who is strong in written English, organized in their work, comfortable using modern digital tools, and able to manage recurring tasks with consistency and follow-through. We are not looking for a fluffy social media marketer or a pure salesperson. We need someone who can support marketing, lead generation, outreach, organization, and campaign execution in a way that is useful and measurable.



About Us

Falcon Paper & Trading is a paper trading and recycling company based in Miami. We work with paper, cardboard, recycling programs, inventory movement, and operational solutions for businesses. We are looking for someone who can help us build a stronger marketing presence while also supporting lead generation, sales-related follow-up, outreach, and customer organization.



Important to Know

We currently do not have a strong social media presence, so part of this role will involve helping us build and organize that presence from the ground up across platforms like LinkedIn,
, and Instagram in a practical and professional way.



Hours

Approximately 20–25 hours per week. Some flexibility is okay, but some overlap with Miami business hours is preferred.



Key Responsibilities



* Organize and clean up lead lists, customer databases, and outreach records

* Support lead generation through research, list building, prospect identification, and outreach preparation

* Segment leads and customers by type, status, and opportunity

* Support outreach to current, inactive, and prospective clients

* Send inventory
s, reactivation campaigns, and other client-facing communications

* Help build and organize our social media presence from the ground up across LinkedIn,
, and Instagram

* Help improve our website, Google presence, and digital marketing materials

* Support campaign creation, scheduling, and tracking

* Help coordinate review requests, marketing materials, and branding projects

* Assist with projects such as truck wrap coordination, one-pagers, and marketing assets

* Use modern digital and AI tools to improve speed, quality, and organization

* Report weekly on completed work, campaign activity, lead generation efforts, and next priorities



Who We’re Looking For



* Strong written English

* Highly organized and comfortable working with spreadsheets, lists, and systems

* Experience in marketing coordination, lead generation, sales support, campaign execution, outreach support, or related work

* Comfortable using a variety of modern AI and digital tools for research, writing, organization, and content support

* Able to work independently and turn ideas into finished work

* Good judgment, strong follow-through, and attention to detail

* Comfortable working in a fast-moving small business environment

* Experience with Canva or similar design tools, Google Workspace, CRM tools,
 platforms, and social/media tools is a plus

* B2B, industrial, logistics, recycling, or operations-related experience is a plus



**Success in This Role Looks Like**



* Lead and customer information becomes more organized and usable

* Lead generation becomes more structured and consistent

* Old clients are contacted more regularly

* Campaigns are sent and tracked properly

* Social media presence is built in a more professional and consistent way

* Marketing presence becomes stronger overall

* Projects move forward without constant supervision



**To Apply**

Please send:



1. Your resume

2. A short paragraph about why you are a fit for this role

3. Examples of relevant work you have handled

4. A short note explaining what digital and AI tools you use regularly in your work

5. Your expected monthly compensation for a part-time remote role

6. A brief explanation of how you would approach your first 30 days in this role





We are looking for someone practical, organized, proactive, and strong at execution.

title: Amazon FBA Wholesale Assistant
description:
Hiring: Experienced Wholesale Sourcing VA



I’m looking for an experienced VA to support a growing UK-based FBA wholesale business doing big numbers.

title: Expert Video Editor
description:
Job Description: Expert Video Editor – Surge Marketing

Company Overview: Surge Marketing

Surge Marketing is a performance-driven marketing agency committed to scaling businesses with high-quality ad campaigns and creative content. Our system is designed to manage 100+ client accounts through pods of specialists (Meta, Google, Video, Client Success) under structured leadership. Creative, compelling video content is at the heart of our success, making the role of Video Editor critical to driving client results.

Job Type: Full-Time (Remote)

Salary: Competitive, based on experience ($5–$8 per hour)

Working Hours: Flexible, must have at least 4 hours overlap with EST/PHT business hours

About the Role

The Expert Video Editor will be responsible for producing engaging, high-converting ad creatives for Meta, Google, and YouTube campaigns. This role requires strong storytelling ability, technical editing skills, and an understanding of what drives performance in paid advertising. The Video Editor will work closely with ad experts and strategists to craft videos that stop the scroll, capture attention, and drive conversions.

Key Responsibilities

Edit raw footage into polished, compelling video ads for social media and paid campaigns.





Apply motion graphics, captions, and effects to enhance engagement.





Adapt videos for multiple platforms and formats (FB, IG, YT, TikTok, Display).





Collaborate with marketing strategists to align creatives with campaign goals.





Continuously test new creative approaches to improve performance.





Stay current on video trends, editing techniques, and advertising best practices.





Manage multiple projects simultaneously while meeting deadlines.



Qualifications

Proven experience as a video editor, ideally in digital marketing or advertising.





Proficiency in editing software (Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Final Cut, etc.).





Strong portfolio showcasing ad creatives or social media content.





Understanding of what drives conversions in performance marketing creatives.





Ability to adapt editing style to different brands and audiences.





Preferred

Experience creating short-form content for TikTok and Reels.





Knowledge of copywriting and ad psychology.





Skills in graphic design and motion graphics.



What We Offer

Competitive pay with performance bonuses.





100% remote role with flexible hours.





Growth opportunities in a creative and performance-focused team.





The chance to directly influence client success with your creative skills.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

To confirm you’ve read this job post carefully, include the word "Surge Video" in your subject line or first sentence when applying.

Submit the following:

A link to your updated OnlineJobs.ph profile.





A short intro about your video editing experience.





Samples of past ad creatives or video work (links or portfolio required).





Your expected monthly salary in PHP.



As part of your job application, please answer the following five questions (short and clear answers are fine):



What type of marketing or ad-focused videos have you edited before? Share a link if possible.



How do you approach editing videos specifically for high-converting ads on Meta or YouTube?



What editing tools and software are you most skilled in (e.g., Premiere Pro, After Effects)?



Describe a time when you tested or modified a creative that significantly improved ad performance.



How do you stay updated on trends in short-form video content (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)?



To be considered, please also complete this form:

title: Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC: Our Vision for Transformative Music



Pex Life Records is an independent label where urban music meets personal development. Founded by Wilmarck, we create high-quality tracks that resonate with the motivation of Tony Robbins, blended with the commercial sound of artists like Kanye West and Drake. Our music is purpose-driven, focusing on critical life areas: health, financial literacy, peak performance, and spirituality.



You will be joining a brand with a strong, engaged audience of over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers. Your work will directly contribute to inspiring and uplifting thousands through music.-----The Role: Drive Revenue, Build a Team, Shape a Brand



We are seeking a highly motivated Music Manager to lead our sales, operations, and team development. This is a pivotal role for a professional ready to commit to a 45-50 hour/week position that offers substantial commission potential and a clear path to high earnings.



Key Areas of Impact:

Sales & Business Development: Lead client acquisition by pitching proposals to songwriting job boards and driving profits to achieve ambitious sales targets.

Team Leadership: Recruit, hire, train, and inspire contractors and staff to ensure stellar performance and successful new releases.

Operations & Finance: Manage contracts, maintain essential financial records (bookkeeping), and ensure compliance and seamless communication across all stakeholders.

Customer Experience: Be the face of the company, creating memorable customer experiences, explaining product/service prices, and handling key inquiries.



Compensation & Uncapped Earning Potential



This is a performance-driven role with a clear path to significant monthly income through our incentive program.

Base & Growth: The hourly rate starts at $2.81 USD plus commission. The initial 10 hours/week commitment quickly scales up to 45 hours/week within 45 days, allowing for a rapid increase in base earnings.

Monthly Compensation Range: $505–$900 Guaranteed Base + Generous Commission.



Compensation Structure by Target Revenue Goal:

Achieve $1,200 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $675 Minimum. Commission Rate: 10% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement.

Achieve $2,400 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $900 Minimum. Commission Rate: 15% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: Social Security System & Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing.



Flexibility and Structure:



100% Remote Position: Work from anywhere.

Core Availability: Sunday–Thursday, 6:30 PM EST – 3:00 AM EST.

Work/Life Balance: We offer Flexible Scheduling (choose your working days/hours) and Job Sharing options.

Prospect Response Disclaimer: Maintain key client relationships by being available for 3-5 quick, 5–15 minute responses per week within a designated 8-hour window (e.g., 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST).



What We're Looking For (Skills & Qualities)



We need a relentless executor with an independent spirit and high integrity.

Essential: Superior proposal writing, persistence, time management, and strong English speaking/writing skills.

Ideal Candidate: Flexible, eager to learn, competitive, and receptive to constructive criticism.



Your Path to Full-Time: The Paid Audition



We skip the traditional hiring steps and go straight to evaluating your work. The process is designed to be fair, fast, and merit-based:

1 Submit your proposal.

2 Pass a screening exercise.

3 Participate in an interview.

4 Top candidates are selected for a paid audition to ensure a mutual fit before a full-time offer is extended.

If you are ready to be a crucial leader in a high-growth, mission-driven music company, apply now!



Application Instructions:



Demonstrate your expertise in sales management (client acquisition, appointment setting, and closing calls) in your proposal. To ensure you've read these details, please begin your proposal with the phrase "purple elephant."

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
Description: We are looking for a Full Stack Developer / Software Engineer to join the Nave Security delivery team supporting a healthcare platform development. Your primary responsibility is code review, working alongside a lead developer to ensure the codebase is well-structured, secure, and maintainable as new modules are built and shipped. This is not a feature development role at this stage. You are the second set of eyes on a fast-moving, production-bound codebase handling protected health information.



Responsibilities:

- Review code commits and pull requests from lead developer — focusing on code quality, security, maintainability, and HIPAA-relevant data handling

- Identify and communicate security issues, architectural concerns, and code quality gaps in a constructive, developer-friendly way

- Review new module implementations for consistency with the existing architecture and security patterns

- Flag any PHI handling, authentication logic, access control, or input validation concerns before they reach production

- Collaborate with security lead to ensure findings align with the broader security and compliance posture of the platform

- Participate in meetings to discuss findings, priorities, and upcoming development work





Required:

- Strong proficiency in Node.js and Express

- Solid understanding of NoSQL data modeling

- Experience with server-side rendered web applications

- Familiarity with authentication and authorization patterns

- Understanding of web application security fundamentals

- Experience working with Google Cloud Platform or a comparable cloud provider

- Strong written communication

- Ability to work independently and manage your own time across a fractional engagement

title: Creative Strategist at Raycon Global
description:
WHO WE ARE: We are a consumer tech e-commerce brand selling products in the US market. We are looking to hire a skilled creative strategist to join our team. 

OUR RECRUITING PROCESS: Please read this full post and carefully answer all the questions below for us to best get to know you and your capabilities! We review applications within 48 hours on weekdays and will reach out to your
 if you are selected for an interview.

If selected, please respond to the
 and schedule an interview within 24 hours for optimal consideration as our hiring process moves very quickly!



MISSION: Help us build a high-performing content engine for paid channels including concepting, scripting, and optimizing creative assets (primarily UGC videos and static ads). 

TASKS INCLUDE: 

Lead creative concepting, copywriting, and scripting for short-form video and static ads, including writing briefs for UGC content creators and looking through existing footage to create new concepts to direct video editors 

Leverage AI tools to accelerate ideation and production workflows 

Analyze performance metrics (ROAS, CTR, hook rate, thumbstop rate) to inform ongoing creative decisions

YOU MAY BE A GOOD FIT IF YOU HAVE THE FOLLOWING QUALITIES:

2+ years of experience in creative strategy or performance marketing

Strong understanding of paid social and what makes scroll-stopping, high-converting content 

Experience with UGC production and creator briefing

Hands-on experience with AI tools for creative workflows (using ChatGPT / Claude to write briefs, etc.)

Highly organized and able to move fast without sacrificing quality

Natural storyteller with a sharp eye for copy and branding

Are proactive 

Speak great English 

Bonus: Data-literate — comfortable reading dashboards and turning insights into action



WHAT MAKES THIS AN EXCITING OPPORTUNITY:

We offer a lot of stability once we find the right candidates. We have some VAs who have been working with us for 4+ years already!



LOGISTICS: This role will start as a full-time position (40 hours per week) with a 30-day probation period to ensure a smooth onboarding and performance alignment.



There is an opportunity for pay increases as candidates take on greater responsibility and perform well.

The application process will consist of: 

Initial application 

Short follow-up case study

20-minute final round interview 

Offer

PLEASE ANSWER THE FOLLOWING QUESTIONS: 

This job requires a portfolio. Please share examples of creative work you've led—ad concepts, scripts, or briefs—organized in clearly labeled folders.

Have you worked on creative that drove measurable performance results? Tell us about it.

Which tools do you use day-to-day? (editing, project management, AI tools, analytics, etc.)

What are your preferred time zone / working hours?* (options: Philippines / London / New York / No preference or flexible / Other)

What is your expected monthly salary?

title: Software Tester
description:
We are a real estate company currently developing a new digital platform, and we are looking for a Software Tester to help us ensure everything runs smoothly across our applications and websites.



This role is ideal for someone who is tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with digital tools, even if you don’t have a programming background.



Responsibilities:

• Test our web applications and websites to identify bugs or issues

• Report problems clearly and provide feedback on user experience

• Ensure features work correctly across different devices and browsers

• Collaborate with our team to improve overall product quality



Requirements:

• Comfortable using computers, apps, and online platforms

• Strong attention to detail

• Good communication skills

• No coding experience required (this is not a developer role, just testing)



Nice to have (but not required):

• Previous experience testing software or websites

• Basic understanding of how apps/websites work

title: Social Media & Customer Experience Specialist
description:
About Giggle Adventures

Giggle Adventures is the leading soft play and party rental company serving the NYC Tri-State

Area. Since 2018, we’ve transformed 1,200+ children’s birthday parties with premium,

Instagram-worthy play zones. We’re growing fast and need a rockstar team member to help us

double our bookings in 2026.

Check us out: 
 | 



Why This Role Matters

You won’t be a “general VA.” You’ll be our lead generation and customer conversion engine.

Every post you create, every DM you respond to, and every follow-up
 you send directly

drives bookings and revenue. You’ll have real ownership over our growth and see the impact of

your work every single week.



What You’ll Do Every Day

1. Social Media Content Creation & Posting (50% of your time)

• Create and post 1–2 Posts on Instagram/TikToks per day from raw event footage we provide

• Design Instagram stories, carousels, and posts using Canva

• Write engaging captions optimized for reach and saves

• Track what content performs best and do more of what works

• Monitor trending audio and formats in the kids’ party / events niche

• Maintain a weekly content calendar (we’ll build this together)

2. DM &
 Management — Speed Is Everything (30% of your time)

• Respond to every Instagram/TikTok DM within 15 minutes during business hours

• Answer inquiries using our script playbook (provided — you’ll help improve it over time)

• Follow up on all open quotes at 24 hours and 72 hours if no response

• Manage
 inbox: respond to inquiries, send confirmations, and coordinate details

• Log every inquiry in our lead tracker with status (inquiry ? quoted ? booked ? completed)

• Send post-event thank you messages and request Google/Yelp reviews

3. Personalization, Design Coordination & Admin (20% of your time)

• Coordinate custom theme requests with clients (colors, decals, signage)

• Help upsell clients from Mini  to Large packages or add-ons

• Update package availability and scheduling

• Maintain and organize client records and booking details

• Assist with any other digital customer-facing and admin tasks as needed





Requirements

Must-Haves:

• 2+ years managing social media accounts for a brand or business (not just personal

accounts)

• Strong Canva skills — you can turn raw photos/videos into polished, on-brand content

• Excellent written English — your DM responses should feel natural, warm, and professional

• Experience with Instagram Reels and/or TikTok video editing (CapCut or similar)

• Reliable internet and available during EST business hours (9 AM – 6 PM EST, Mon–Sat)

• Fast communicator who checks messages frequently throughout the day

• Detail-oriented and organized — nothing falls through the cracks



Nice-to-Haves:

• Experience in events, party planning, or kids’ entertainment industry

• Familiarity with Google Workspace (Sheets, Gmail, Drive)

• Basic understanding of Instagram/TikTok algorithms and what drives engagement

• Experience with
 marketing (Mailchimp, etc.) is a bonus

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
ABOUT US



Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) / Appointment Setter
description:
About Leda

We make LEDA, a learning experience platform that makes leadership development easy! We use expert interviews, animations, games, self-assessments and practical activities to turn managers into better leaders.

We work with CEOs and People & Culture leaders across Australia and APAC to help them develop the many people in their organisations. Our mission? Better organisations, by making it easy for companies to develop their established and emerging leaders. High quality and fun leadership development for all!

We're a small, profitable startup based in Melbourne. We like to laugh and have fun. And yes — you'll get leadership training too.



The Role

We're looking for someone to join our small but growing team with an SDR background wanting an accelerated pathway to Inside Sales.

This is a rare opportunity to become a critical member of a profitable start-up that has a real and positive impact on people's lives.



What You'll Be Doing



Converting inbound leads from our campaigns into conversations with the founders and yourself

Calling warmed leads (40–50 calls per day)

Nurturing and growing new business opportunities within the SMB segment (companies with <600 employees) in APAC

Understanding prospective customers' pain points and educating them on Leda's value

Guiding prospects through the sales process with the founder

Managing some opportunities to close, readying yourself to move into an Inside Sales role



Skills You'll Need



Minimum 12 months experience in an SDR or Inside Sales role

Highly empathetic and likeable on the phone, with great communication skills to explain, influence and persuade

Clear English with confident, friendly delivery

Preferably experience in tech, training, online learning, or selling to HR / People and Culture teams

Familiarity with Australian business culture is a plus





Hours & Pay

Schedule:



Part-time to start: 20 hours/week (Mon–Fri, 10am–12pm and 1–3pm AEST)

Path to full-time for top performers



Compensation:



$7 USD/hour base

$40 USD per sat meeting

Part-time earnings: ~$680–780/month

Full-time performers: $1,400–1,600+/month



Technical Requirements:



Your own computer or laptop (not a phone or tablet)

Stable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps)

Headset with microphone

Quiet workspace with minimal background noise



Prove you can deliver, and we'll give you more hours and a clear path to Inside Sales.



How to Apply



Fill in this form 

(
/form/623bfc36-e96a-4fc
a795ea5cdb)

and we'll send you our short screening process (about 30–45 minutes). It involves a speaking assessment, sales simulations, and a short video recording.

You'll have 72 hours to complete it. No resume needed — just show us what you can do.

Thank you very much for your time and interest!

Team Leda

/SMS workflows)
