title: Experienced Shopify & HubSpot Developer (E-commerce Focus – Apply with Examples)
description:
IMPORTANT: Please read carefully before applying. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.



About the Role:

We’re looking for an experienced, detail-oriented developer to support our e-commerce and marketing operations. This role requires strong hands-on experience with Shopify and HubSpot, with the ability to build, integrate, and automate systems that drive sales and operational efficiency. You will work closely with the GM to improve internal workflows.



Key Responsibilities:

• Build, update, and maintain Shopify websites, including B2B portal maintenance, UX improvements, and site optimization. 

• Develop and manage Shopify flows, automations, and integrations to support marketing and sales initiatives. 

• Configure and optimize HubSpot CRM, including pipelines, workflows, sequences, and automation. 

• Migrate and structure historical data into HubSpot, ensuring clean pipelines and accurate deal stages. 

• Build and automate end-to-end sales workflows (call cycles, re-engagement, follow-ups, and training prompts). 

• Develop dashboards to track team activity, pipeline performance, revenue, and lead response times. 

• Implement and manage TikTok Shop and Amazon Seller Central, ensuring: 

o Products and catalogs are set up accurately 

o Inventory is synced and maintained across platforms 

o Orders flow correctly into fulfillment systems 

o Tracking details are returned, and orders are marked as fulfilled 

• Troubleshoot website, CRM, marketplace, and integration issues as they arise. 



Required Experience (Do not apply if you do not meet these):

• Proven experience with Shopify (theme edits, apps, B2B functionality, troubleshooting) 

• Working knowledge of HubSpot (CRM setup, workflows, automations, integrations, reporting) 

• Experience with TikTok Shop and Amazon Seller Central integration and order flows 

• Experience with system integrations and data migration 

• Ability to work independently, problem-solve, and meet deadlines 



Highly Preferred:

• Experience with TikTok (Ads or Shop) 

• Experience with Amazon Seller Central 

• Familiarity with Zendesk or similar platforms 



To Apply (MANDATORY):

Please fill out this Google Form to submit your application:





Work Details:

• Remote (Philippines-based) 

• Flexible hours (part-time to start, with potential for more) 

• Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

title: We’re Hiring: Experienced All Rounder Accountant (Australian Accounting Firm Background Preferred)
description:
We’re Hiring: Experienced All Rounder Accountant (Australian Accounting Firm Background Preferred)



Are you an experienced accountant with an eye for detail, a love for variety, and solid all-round accounting skills?



Join our fast-growing and friendly accounting firm, where your work truly makes a difference. We’re looking for someone who enjoys the diversity of tasks that come from supporting multiple businesses and thrives in a dynamic, professional environment.



***What You’ll Do:

End-to-end bookkeeping and all rounder in Australian clients

Bank reconciliations, payroll, accounts payable/receivable

Prepare BAS/IAS and assist with month-end reporting

Work closely with accountants to ensure accurate records

Use your initiative to problem-solve and streamline client workflows



***What You Bring:

Proven bookkeeping experience – ideally in another accounting firm

Strong skills in Xero, MYOB, and QuickBooks

Comfortable juggling multiple clients and industries

Solid understanding of Australian GST, payroll, and compliance

Attention to detail, good communication, and a proactive attitude

Accounting degree is essential for this role



***Why Work With Us?

Supportive team culture

Working from home setup

Exposure to a wide variety and diversity

Opportunity to grow with a progressive firm

If you’re a confident, all-round accounts professional who loves variety and takes pride in your work — we’d love to hear from you!





Apply now with your CV and. start your message with "I am qualified" to make sure you have read and understood the job description.

title: AI Video Content Creator - Full-time for US Agency
description:
We are a fast-growing digital marketing agency producing high-performance AI generated short-form video ads for HVAC, Plumbing, and Roofing companies across the United States.



We are looking for a highly talented AI Creative Video Producer who can utilize the newest AI video creation tools (VEO3-style platforms, OpenAI Sora, Google Veo, Runway Gen-3, Kling AI, Pika, Luma Dream Machine, Synthesia, HeyGen, PixVerse or similar) to produce realistic, high-engagement service videos.

This role goes beyond basic editing. We need someone who can research, script, source footage, generate AI visuals, and produce polished marketing videos end-to-end.

You should be comfortable using AI tools to create realistic people, environments, and service scenarios related to HVAC, plumbing, and roofing.



Only applicants who provide complete answers to all 8 screening questions will be considered for this full-time role (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST).



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Creative Scripting: Draft engaging scripts based on a provided hook and call-to-action (CTA). Structure videos for high engagement and lead generation.

-Advanced Sourcing: Research client websites to find and scrape footage from their
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

-Asset Collection: Source HVAC equipment photos from our brand folders (Canva or Google Drive) or manufacturer websites.

-Local B-Roll Research: Find relevant city and service-area footage from Google or YouTube.

-Voiceover & Audio Production: Use ElevenLabs for all voiceovers. You must be experienced in voice grooming (phonetic spelling, aliases, or dashes) to ensure zero mispronunciations.

-Technical Accuracy: Ensure correct pronunciation of HVAC terms such as SEER, AFUE, BTUs and specific city or service area names.

-Dynamic Captions: Create word-for-word captions highlighted in Yellow and positioned in safe zones (mid-screen) so they are not covered by social media interface elements.



REQUIREMENTS:

-Strong English writing skills for technical HVAC/Plumbing/Roofing scripting.

-Ability to deliver final video assets in three formats:

title: Full-Cycle Video Producer (Canva/CapCut/Premiere) – HVAC/Roofing FULL-TIME 9-5 EST
description:
We are seeking a highly detail-oriented Video Producer to manage end-to-end short-form video creation for HVAC clients.

This role goes beyond basic editing — we need someone who can research, script, source footage, and produce polished final videos with AI voiceovers and dynamic captions.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Creative Scripting: Draft engaging scripts based on a provided hook and call-to-action (CTA). Structure videos for high engagement and lead generation.

-Advanced Sourcing: Research client websites to find and scrape footage from their
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

-Asset Collection: Source HVAC equipment photos from our brand folders (Canva or Google Drive) or manufacturer websites.

-Local B-Roll Research: Find relevant city and service-area footage from Google or YouTube.

-Voiceover & Audio Production: Use ElevenLabs for all voiceovers. You must be experienced in voice grooming (phonetic spelling, aliases, or dashes) to ensure zero mispronunciations.

-Technical Accuracy: Ensure correct pronunciation of HVAC terms such as SEER, AFUE, BTUs and specific city or service area names.

-Dynamic Captions: Create word-for-word captions highlighted in Yellow and positioned in safe zones (mid-screen) so they are not covered by social media interface elements.



QUALITY & PAYMENT POLICY:

-Accuracy Standard: You are expected to deliver a high-quality first draft. Revisions required due to failure to follow instructions (incorrect phone number, wrong caption color, mispronounced terms, missing assets, etc.) must be corrected promptly.

-Billable Work: Additional payment will only be provided if the client changes the original scope or script after the first approved version.



REQUIREMENTS:

-Expert-level CapCut or Premiere Pro skills.

-Strong Canva experience.

-Pro-level familiarity with ElevenLabs including aliases, phonetic spelling, and pronunciation control.

-Strong English writing skills for technical HVAC scripting.

-Ability to deliver final video assets in three formats:

9:16 (Vertical)

1:1 (Square)

16:9 (Landscape)



HOW TO APPLY:

-Please start your proposal with "HVAC YELLOW" to verify you have read the full brief. 

-Provide 2–3 samples of your best short-form video work featuring dynamic captions and AI voiceovers.

-IF do not have portfolio showcasing work in our niche or prior experience creating HVAC/Plumbing or Roofing video ads, we’d like you to complete a short test project so we can properly evaluate your design skills, creativity, ability to follow directions, and understanding of ad structure.

-ASK: SEND ME TEST

- DO NOT submit your resume or any Figma or websites files as these are not considered as proof of your qualifications. SEND ONLY google drive or canva links to your previous work.

title: Client Care Executive
description:
Client Care Executive



Company: Neovara (on behalf of Cru Wine) Location: Remote (UAE Business Hours) Reports to: Head of Customer Success





About Neovara and Cru Wine



Neovara is a trusted back-office and operational partner supporting international businesses across operations, finance, customer service, data, and digital systems.



This role supports Cru Wine, a leading fine wine merchant serving collectors and investors globally. Cru Wine operates a premium digital platform and eShop, delivering rare wines and exceptional service to clients across multiple markets.



As part of Neovara’s Client Care function, you will play a key role in protecting and enhancing the client experience across customer service and digital touchpoints.





About the Role



We are seeking a proactive and detail-driven Client Care Executive to join our team.



This role combines:



· Customer service excellence



· CRM & invoicing accuracy



· eShop & website operational management



You will be responsible for ensuring a seamless, premium experience across phone,
, CRM, and online ordering.



This is ideal for someone who takes ownership, enjoys digital systems, and wants to grow within a structured and performance-driven organisation.





Key Responsibilities



1?? Client Care & Communication



• Act as the first point of contact for incoming phone calls and
s. • Provide prompt, accurate, and professional responses to all client queries. • Route complex queries to the appropriate internal teams when necessary. • Ensure response time SLAs are maintained. • Proactively follow up with satisfied clients to request reviews and testimonials.





2?? Order Processing & Invoicing



• Process client invoices accurately and efficiently. • Coordinate with sales, logistics, and finance teams to ensure smooth order execution. • Monitor open orders and ensure clients are updated when required. • Maintain high accuracy in billing and documentation.





3?? CRM & Data Accuracy (HubSpot)



• Maintain and clean client data within HubSpot CRM. • Ensure correct client categorisation and lifecycle stages. • Monitor duplicate records and data inconsistencies. • Assist in preparing weekly client care performance reports.





4?? Website & eShop Management



• Monitor and process all incoming eShop orders. • Track and review abandoned carts, escalating potential sales opportunities to the sales team. • Update homepage banners, featured products, and promotional content when required. • Update product pricing and ensure correct display across the eShop. • Work closely with the Data Team to review pricing accuracy and margin alignment. • Regularly check that all product listings, stock levels, and pricing are correctly displayed. • Identify and report any UX issues or friction points affecting customer experience.





5?? Continuous Improvement



• Track recurring customer issues and propose solutions. • Suggest improvements to workflows and digital experience. • Collaborate across sales, marketing, logistics, finance, and data teams to enhance overall performance









Requirements



Experience



• Minimum 2–3 years in customer service, operations, e-commerce, or client-facing role. • Experience in a premium or luxury environment is an advantage.





Communication



• Exceptional spoken and written English. • Professional and confident phone manner. • Comfortable handling high-value international clients.





Technical Skills



• Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel essential). • Experience using HubSpot or similar CRM systems. • Familiarity with e-commerce platforms or website content management systems. • Comfortable reviewing pricing data and working with structured datasets. • Experience with invoicing or ERP systems is advantageous.





Personal Attributes



• Highly organised and detail-oriented. • Takes ownership and follows through. • Structured thinker with strong problem-solving skills. • Calm and professional under pressure. • Growth-driven and interested in long-term development.





What We Offer



• Fully remote role (UAE business hours). • Annual performance-based bonus linked to company results. • Paid holidays (including official Philippine bank holidays). • Additional unpaid leave for top-performing tea
mbers. • Anniversary recognition and annual Christmas gift. • Clear opportunity for career progression within Neovara and the broader group.

title: Meta Ads Operator
description:
We are NOT looking for social media manager. 



How To Apply

Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively.



About Us

We’re a programming education company that helps experienced software engineers build real-world Rust projects and land Rust roles. We run a high-ticket, cohort-based accelerator plus self-paced training, and reach engineers through YouTube,
, and partnerships.



Role Overview

We are looking for a part-time Meta Ads Operator to implement and maintain our
 and Instagram campaigns. This is an execution-focused role: you will take clear targeting and creative direction from the founder and marketing team, then handle setup, tracking, and ongoing optimizations inside Meta Ads Manager.



Ideal for someone who enjoys clean accounts, accurate tracking, and making data-driven tweaks, not sitting in branding meetings.



Key Responsibilities

1. Implement and maintain Meta Pixel and Conversion API across our funnels (waitlist, applications, bookings, purchases).

2. Set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads according to provided specs (objectives, budgets, audiences, and creatives).

3. Create and manage custom and lookalike audiences from our traffic,
 list, and engaged users.

4. Monitor performance daily on weekdays and execute simple rules: pause obvious losers, keep winners within defined guardrails, and flag issues quickly.

5. Run basic A/B tests on creatives and audiences following our testing framework.

6. Ensure tracking events fire correctly on all key steps and troubleshoot when they do not.

7. Produce a concise weekly report (spend, cost per waitlist opt-in, cost per application, cost per call, cost per student) with 2 to 3 clear recommendations.



You Are A Good Fit If

1. You have 1 to 3 years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads (lead gen or info/education experience is a plus).

2. You are comfortable with Meta Ads Manager, Pixel, standard events, and basic CAPI.

3. You can read numbers and make simple performance-based decisions without drama.

4. You are organized, responsive, and document what you do so others can follow it.

5. You can overlap at least 2 to 3 hours per day with US time zones.

6. You’re currently freelancing or working part time and want a long term core client, not just a one off project.



This Role Is Not

1. Not a creative director or copywriter (we have a content and
 team).

2. Not a CMO or growth strategist d
 offers, funnels, or pricing.

3. Not a general social media manager (no organic posting, community management, or influencer work).



Scope & Engagement

1. Part-time contractor.

2. We’ll start at 5–10 hours/week for the first 60–90 days while we validate and scale Meta.

3. We guarantee a minimum of 20 hours/month, paid monthly, so your time is predictable.

4. If performance is strong and we scale ad spend, this role can grow into 15–20+ hours/week and potentially a full-time PH position.

5. Remote, flexible schedule as long as SLAs are met and campaigns are monitored on weekdays.

title: Tech Automation Specialist
description:
AI Agency Institute



We’re Hiring!



Tech Automation Specialist



Full-Time | Remote | $15–$25 USD/hr



About Us



AI Agency Institute is at the forefront of building AI-powered systems and automations for businesses. We leverage cutting-edge tools like GoHighLevel, AI voice technology, and automation platforms to build scalable solutions for our clients.



We are a fast-moving, innovation-driven team looking for a highly skilled automation specialist to help us build and manage advanced AI automation systems.



The Role



We’re looking for a technical automation expert who can build, manage, and scale automation systems using GoHighLevel, AI tools, APIs, and workflow automation platforms.



You will work closely with our team to develop AI-powered systems, integrations, and automations that help businesses streamline operations and improve performance.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Build and manage automation systems inside GoHighLevel (GHL)

- Develop AI voice and text bot automations using tools such as CloseBot, Retell, and similar platforms

- Create and maintain API integrations and webhooks between different platforms

- Build automation workflows using n8n

- Integrate Stripe API for payments, subscriptions, and billing workflows

- Troubleshoot and optimize existing automation systems

- Work with the team to design and deploy scalable AI automation solutions

- Document workflows and automation processes



What We’re Looking For

- Strong expertise in n8n automation workflows or equivalent platforms

- Strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) automation and CRM systems

- Proven experience building voice and text bots

- Ideally experienced with CloseBot, Retell, and n8n or equivalent tools

- Strong knowledge of API integrations and webhooks

- Experience with AI automation tools

- Experience integrating Stripe API for payment automation

- Ability to design and maintain scalable automation systems

- Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills

- Excellent written communication in English



Nice to Have

- Experience building AI voice agents or AI sales bots

- Experience working with automation agencies

- Experience integrating multiple SaaS platforms via APIs

- Experience building client automation systems or SaaS workflows



Compensation & Benefits

- $15–$25 USD per hour depending on experience

- Full-time, remote position

- Opportunity to work with cutting-edge AI automation technology

- Collaborative and flexible team environment

- Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling AI company



How to Apply



Send us your application with the following:

- Your portfolio or examples of automation systems you’ve built

- A short summary of your experience with GHL, AI automations, APIs, and n8n

- Your hourly rate within the $15–$25 USD range



We’re excited to hear from you. If you’re passionate about AI automation and building powerful systems, apply now.
